title: Lightweight SAR Ship Detection via Contrastive Distillation
comment: Accepted in GLSVLSI'26 special session 74: Efficiency In Computer Vision: From Image Generation to Decision"
summary: Deep convolutional and transformer-based detectors achieve strong performance for SAR ship detection but are often computationally prohibitive for real-time or onboard deployment. Lightweight models offer improved efficiency yet struggle to capture the complex structural relationships inherent in SAR backscatter. Most existing SAR knowledge-distillation approaches rely on feature or logit matching, which enforces localized activation similarity while neglecting the geometric relationships among object representations. We propose a Structured Unified Relational knowledGE distillation framework for SAR Ship detection (SURGE) that transfers relational geometry from a powerful teacher detector to a compact student detector using a contrastive InfoNCE objective in a shared projection embedding space. To the best of our knowledge, this work presents the first transformer-based SAR ship detector knowledge distillation framework in SAR domain. The framework is architecture-agnostic in the sense that it provides a common region-level distillation interface for two-stage, one-stage and transformer-based detectors without modifying their deployed architectures. Experiments on the SSDD and HRSID benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method yields substantial improvements for two-stage detectors, achieving up to 6.2 mAP and 8.0 AP75 gains over baseline student and even surpassing teacher performance

AI.tldr: 提出SURGE框架，通过对比学习在共享投影空间中传递关系几何知识，首次实现SAR领域基于Transformer的检测器知识蒸馏，在SSDD和HRSID上提升达6.2 mAP和8.0 AP75，且架构无关。
AI.motivation: 现有SAR舰船检测中，深度检测器计算开销大难以满足实时或星上部署需求，轻量模型虽高效但难以捕获SAR后向散射中复杂的结构关系；现有知识蒸馏方法（特征或logit匹配）仅约束局部激活相似性，忽略了目标表示间的几何关系，缺乏针对SAR检测任务的几何关系蒸馏框架。
AI.method: 提出SURGE框架，采用对比学习InfoNCE目标函数，在共享投影嵌入空间中将教师检测器的关系几何知识（区域级结构关系）迁移至紧凑学生检测器；该框架架构无关，可为两阶段、单阶段和基于Transformer的检测器提供统一的区域级蒸馏接口，无需修改部署时模型结构。
AI.result: 在SSDD和HRSID基准上的实验表明，该方法对两阶段检测器提升显著，学生检测器在mAP上提升最高达6.2，AP75提升最高达8.0，甚至超过教师检测器的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次将Transformer引入SAR舰船检测的知识蒸馏框架，验证了关系几何蒸馏优于传统局部激活匹配方法，为实现高效、可部署的SAR检测器提供了新路径，且框架的架构无关性使其具有广泛适用性。

title: SANA-Streaming: Real-time Streaming Video Editing with Hybrid Diffusion Transformer
summary: Real-time streaming video-to-video editing (V2V) is critical for interactive applications such as live broadcasting and gaming, yet it remains a formidable challenge due to the stringent requirements for temporal consistency and inference throughput. In this paper, we present SANA-Streaming, a system-algorithm co-designed framework for high-resolution, real-time streaming video editing on consumer GPUs, with the following three core designs: (1) Hybrid Diffusion Transformer architecture introduces softmax attention in part of the blocks to improve local modeling capabilities while preserving the efficiency of linear layers. (2) Cycle-Reverse Regularization is a novel training strategy that enforces semantic consistency by predicting source frames from generated content via flow matching, improving temporal consistency without requiring paired long edited videos. (3) Efficient System Co-design combines fused GDN kernels and Mixed-Precision Quantization (MPQ) optimized for the NVIDIA Blackwell (RTX 5090) architecture. By profiling real-world throughput, our MPQ maximizes Tensor Core utilization while maintaining generation quality. The resulting system achieves real-time 1280 x 704 resolution editing at 24 end-to-end FPS on a single RTX 5090 GPU, with the DiT core running at 58 FPS. Experimental results demonstrate that our co-design approach significantly outperforms existing SOTA methods in both temporal coherence and system throughput.

AI.tldr: 提出SANA-Streaming，一种系统-算法协同设计的框架，通过混合扩散Transformer架构、循环反向正则化训练策略和面向NVIDIA Blackwell架构的高效系统协同设计，在单张RTX 5090 GPU上实现了1280×704分辨率、端到端24 FPS的实时流式视频编辑。
AI.motivation: 实时流式视频到视频编辑在直播和游戏等交互式应用中至关重要，但现有方法难以同时满足高时间一致性和高推理吞吐量的严格要求，尤其是在消费级GPU上实现高分辨率实时编辑仍是一个重大挑战。
AI.method: 提出三个核心设计：（1）混合扩散Transformer架构，在部分模块中引入softmax注意力以增强局部建模能力，同时保留线性层的效率；（2）循环反向正则化，一种新的训练策略，通过流匹配从生成内容预测源帧来强制语义一致性，无需成对的长视频数据；（3）高效的系统协同设计，结合融合GDN核和针对NVIDIA Blackwell（RTX 5090）架构优化的混合精度量化（MPQ），通过分析实际吞吐量最大化Tensor Core利用率。
AI.result: 在单张RTX 5090 GPU上实现1280×704分辨率实时编辑，端到端帧率达到24 FPS，其中DiT核心部分达到58 FPS；实验结果表明该方法在时间一致性和系统吞吐量方面均显著优于现有的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统与算法的协同设计，能够在消费级GPU上实现高分辨率实时流式视频编辑，验证了软硬件协同优化在视频生成任务中的关键作用，为未来交互式视频应用提供了可行的技术路径。

title: A Novel Global Context-aware Deep Neural Network for Enhanced Brain Tumor Segmentation using Magnetic Resonance Images
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures, 6 tables. Submitted to arXiv cs.CV
summary: Brain cancer's severity necessitates precise brain tumor segmentation, which is crucial for effective brain tumor diagnosis. Manual identification, burdened by high costs, labor, and error risks, highlights the need for automated methods. In this study, we introduce the Global Context-aware Squeeze and Excite Residual UNet (GCSER-UNet), which facilitates a fusion of spatial and channel-wise attention and thus enhances the model's capacity to capture intricate spatial dependencies and contextual information. GCSER-UNet efficiently extracts tumor segments from multimodal MRI slices, delivering exceptional performance. Evaluations on benchmark databases exhibit its superiority, achieving a notable 94 percent dice score on the TCGA LGG dataset, surpassing the state-of-the-art dice score of 91.8 percent. In the BraTS 2020 dataset, the proposed GCSER-UNet ensemble approach yielded dice scores of 95 percent, 92 percent, and 90 percent for the tumor regions - Whole Tumor (W), Tumor Core (T), and Enhancing Tumor (E), respectively. The current state-of-the-art dice scores were 94 percent, 93 percent, and 88 percent. These compelling outcomes highlight the efficacy of GCSER-UNet in precise brain tumor segmentation and thus can aid neurologists in effective brain cancer management and treatment planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GCSER-UNet，融合空间与通道注意力机制，在脑肿瘤分割任务中超越现有最先进方法，在TCGA LGG和BraTS 2020数据集上分别达到94%和95%/92%/90%的Dice分数。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤的精确分割对诊断和治疗至关重要，但传统人工标注成本高、劳动强度大且易出错，因此亟需高效的自动化分割方法，现有模型在捕捉空间依赖和上下文信息方面仍存在不足。
AI.method: 提出Global Context-aware Squeeze and Excite Residual UNet（GCSER-UNet），该模型融合了空间注意力与通道注意力机制，通过增强模型对复杂空间依赖和上下文信息的捕捉能力，从多模态MRI切片中高效提取肿瘤区域。
AI.result: 在TCGA LGG数据集上，GCSER-UNet达到94%的Dice分数，超越此前最优的91.8%；在BraTS 2020数据集上，集成方法对全肿瘤（WT）、肿瘤核心（TC）和增强肿瘤（ET）分别取得95%、92%和90%的Dice分数，而此前最优分别为94%、93%和88%。
AI.conclusion: GCSER-UNet在脑肿瘤分割任务中展现了卓越性能，其精确的分割能力可为神经科医生提供有效的辅助工具，有助于改善脑癌管理和治疗方案制定。

title: Seeing Isn't Knowing: Do VLMs Know When Not to Answer Spatial Questions (and Why)?
summary: Spatial reasoning is a fundamental capability for vision-language models (VLMs) deployed in real-world environments. However, visual observations are inherently limited representations of a 3D world: occlusion can render objects invisible, and perspective can make geometric properties misleading. Despite this, existing spatial reasoning benchmarks typically assume that observations are sufficient and reliable, focusing on whether models produce correct answers rather than whether they recognize when a question cannot be answered and what additional observations would be needed. In this work, we challenge this assumption by constructing a controlled evaluation framework, SpatialUncertain, and introducing two types of observation challenges: (1) occlusion, which hides target information, and (2) perspective ambiguity, which produces misleading visual cues. For each configuration, we design spatial questions that are answerable under clean observations but require abstention under the introduced challenges. We further evaluate whether models can identify which additional viewpoints would resolve perspective ambiguity. Our results across a diverse set of frontier open- and closed-source VLMs reveal two consistent failure modes. First, models are prone to overconfident answering, attempting to solve spatial reasoning tasks even when visual evidence is incomplete or misleading, with average accuracy around 30\% under occlusion and below 10\% under perspective ambiguity. Second, even when additional views are available, some models perform near random chance in identifying which would provide reliable evidence. Together, our findings call for moving beyond answer correctness toward evaluating whether models know when to abstain and how to seek reliable evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了SpatialUncertain框架，系统评估视觉语言模型在遮挡与视角歧义条件下的空间推理能力，发现主流模型存在过度自信回答与无法识别可靠视角两大失败模式，指出评估应超越答案正确性转向模型不确定情境下的判断能力。
AI.motivation: 现有空间推理基准通常假设视觉观测是充分且可靠的，仅关注模型能否给出正确答案，而忽略了现实3D环境中遮挡导致目标不可见、视角歧义产生误导性视觉线索等根本性局限；模型是否能在信息不充分时识别问题不可回答、以及需要哪些额外观测来解决问题，尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出了SpatialUncertain控制化评估框架，系统引入两类观测挑战——遮挡（隐藏目标信息）和视角歧义（产生误导性视觉线索），为每类配置设计了在干净观测下可回答但在挑战条件下应拒绝回答的空间问题，并进一步评估模型能否识别出能够解决视角歧义的额外观测视角。
AI.result: 对多个前沿开源和闭源VLM的评估揭示了两类一致性的失败模式：模型倾向于过度自信地回答空间推理问题，即使视觉证据不完整或具有误导性，在遮挡条件下平均准确率仅约30%，在视角歧义条件下低于10%；即使在提供额外视角的情况下，部分模型在识别可靠证据视角方面表现接近随机水平。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明空间推理评估应超越单纯追求答案正确性，转向考察模型是否知道何时应当拒绝回答以及如何主动寻求可靠证据，为构建更鲁棒、更可信的视觉语言模型提供了重要方向性指导。

title: Exploring Autonomous Agentic Data Engineering for Model Specialization
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on general tasks, while often struggling to adapt to specialized domains without high-quality domain-specific data. Existing LLM-based data curation methods primarily rely on human-designed workflows, leaving it unexamined whether LLMs can autonomously execute an end-to-end data engineering pipeline for model specialization. We formalize \textbf{Autonomous Agentic Data Engineering}, a novel task designed to evaluate LLMs as autonomous data engineers that drive model specialization through end-to-end data curation. We frame data as an optimizable component and study agents that plan, generate, and iteratively optimize training data across multiple domains, guided by post-training performance improvement. Experiments show that autonomous LLM data engineers yield substantial gains, as GPT-5.2 constructs a training curriculum that improves a student model by \textbf{57.29\%}, entirely through iterative, agent-driven data adaptation. By illuminating both potential and bottlenecks, our study establishes autonomous data engineering as a measurable capability and charts a path toward agent-driven model specialization\footnote{Code will be released at https://github.com/zjunlp/DataAgent.}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了自主智能体数据工程（Autonomous Agentic Data Engineering）这一新任务，将数据视为可优化的组件，让LLM作为自主数据工程师通过迭代式端到端数据策展驱动模型专业化，实验表明GPT-5.2能够将学生模型性能提升57.29%，为智能体驱动的模型专业化开辟了新路径。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在通用任务上表现优异，但在缺乏高质量领域特定数据时难以适应专业领域；当前基于LLM的数据策展方法主要依赖人工设计的工作流，尚未探究LLM能否自主执行端到端的数据工程流水线以实现模型专业化。
AI.method: 论文形式化提出了自主智能体数据工程任务，将数据视为可优化的组件，设计智能体在多领域中进行数据规划、生成和迭代优化，以训练后的性能提升为反馈信号驱动整个数据策展过程。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，自主LLM数据工程师能够带来显著的性能提升，GPT-5.2构建的训练课程通过完全迭代式的智能体驱动数据适应，使学生模型性能提升了57.29%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将自主数据工程确立为一种可衡量的能力，揭示了其潜力与瓶颈，为智能体驱动的模型专业化指明了方向。

title: Physically Viable World Models: A Case for Query-Conditioned Embodied AI
comment: 21 pages; Adam J. Thorpe and Stepan Tretiakov contributed equally
summary: World models for embodied AI must be physically viable: constructed to answer intervention queries by representing the physical structure governing action outcomes, rather than merely predicting future observations. Existing observation-predictive world models can produce visually plausible but physically wrong rollouts. This failure is structural; distinct physical systems can look identical yet diverge under intervention. We expose this problem with controlled benchmarks that fix the visible scene while varying latent physics. We show that such models may recommend infeasible actions, mispredict interaction outcomes, or certify unsafe behavior. We argue that embodied AI requires world models that identify the simplest physical abstraction sufficient to answer an intervention query. Such a model comprises modular components, including environment representation, latent state and parameter estimation, action specification, interventional dynamics, and query-level response. An autonomous orchestrator should identify the relevant abstraction and compose compatible learned and structured components per query. When closed-form physics is unavailable, uncertain, or costly, the transition model may be analytic, simulated, learned, or hybrid, but it must preserve the structure that determines interventional outcomes. This decomposition makes the model interpretable, its components verifiable, and its outputs auditable against the query. It also provides a design principle for new world models and a feasibility test for existing ones: the right abstraction is not the most detailed model of the world, but the simplest model that preserves the distinctions relevant to the query. We demonstrate this approach on queries that existing systems fail to answer correctly, and outline how an orchestrator can dynamically assemble and adapt physically viable models for planning, control, and verification.

AI.tldr: 本文指出面向具身AI的现有观测预测世界模型无法保证物理可行性，并提出了一种以干预查询为导向的物理抽象框架，通过模块化组合与编排器动态组装，选择足以回答查询的最简物理模型，从而在保证可解释性与可审计性的同时正确回答干预性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型主要面向观测预测，能够生成视觉上合理但物理上错误的推演结果，因为不同的物理系统可能在观测上完全相同但干预响应截然不同。这种结构性缺陷导致模型可能推荐不可行动作、错误预测交互结果或认证不安全行为，因此亟需一种能保证物理可行性的世界模型设计范式。
AI.method: 本文提出以干预查询为中心的世界模型框架，要求模型识别足以回答查询的最简物理抽象，包含环境表示、潜在状态与参数估计、动作规格化、干预动力学和查询级响应等模块化组件。一个自主编排器根据每个查询识别相关抽象并动态组合兼容的学习组件与结构化组件，其中转移模型可以是解析、模拟、学习或混合形式，但必须保留决定干预结果的结构。
AI.result: 通过设计固定视觉场景而改变潜在物理参数的对照基准，暴露了现有观测预测模型在干预查询下的系统失败。作者展示了所提框架在现有系统无法正确回答的查询上的有效性，并概述了编排器如何动态组装与适应物理可行的模型以支持规划、控制和验证任务。
AI.conclusion: 正确的抽象并非最详细的世界模型，而是足以保留查询相关区分的最简模型。这种分解使模型具有可解释性、组件可验证性、输出可审计性，为设计新世界模型和评估现有模型的物理可行性提供了设计原则与测试依据。

title: VLM3: Vision Language Models Are Native 3D Learners
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) enable a unified model to solve various vision tasks through prompting. They have shown promising performance in semantic understanding. However, 3D understanding still largely relies on expert vision models with complex task-specific designs. The key argument this work wants to make is that VLMs are native 3D learners. Our in-depth large scale study shows that 1) focal length unification, 2) text-based pixel reference and 3) data mixture and scaling, are all you need for effective 3D learning. Model architecture changes, large models, heavy data augmentations, and complex losses including the regression formulation, many of which form the foundation of expert vision models, are actually not necessary conditions. As a result, we propose VLM3, a scalable method with the simplest design that enables standard VLMs to master diverse 3D tasks. VLM3 not only advances the VLM depth estimation accuracy by a large margin (0.84 -> 0.9), but also enables diverse 3D tasks such as pixel correspondence, camera pose estimation and object-level 3D understanding, matching expert vision model accuracy while maintaining standard architectures and text-based training. We believe VLM3 opens up a new paradigm for simple and scalable 3D learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLM3，通过焦距统一、文本像素参考和数据混合缩放三个方面，使标准视觉语言模型无需架构修改或复杂损失即可成为原生3D学习者，在深度估计、像素对应、相机位姿估计和物体级3D理解等任务上达到专家模型精度。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型（VLM）在语义理解上表现优异，但3D理解仍严重依赖具有复杂任务特定设计的专家视觉模型，缺乏统一且简洁的解决方案。
AI.method: VLM3提出三项关键技术：(1) 焦距统一（focal length unification），(2) 基于文本的像素参考（text-based pixel reference），(3) 数据混合与缩放（data mixture and scaling）。该方法保持标准VLM架构和文本训练范式，不依赖模型架构修改、大模型、数据增强、复杂损失或回归公式。
AI.result: VLM3将VLM深度估计精度从0.84提升至0.9，并在像素对应、相机位姿估计和物体级3D理解等任务上匹配专家视觉模型的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该工作论证了VLM是原生的3D学习者，指出模型架构修改、大模型、增强和复杂损失并非3D学习的必要条件，为简单且可扩展的3D学习开辟了新范式。

title: Domain Adaptation and Reasoning Frameworks in Language Models: A Controlled Experiment with Historical Cosmology
summary: We investigate how domain adaptation reshapes explanatory behavior in language models using historical cosmology as a controlled setting. In Phase 1, we train a small language model from scratch on a pre-Copernican corpus from which explicit heliocentric references were removed, and evaluate whether Earth-motion or heliocentric continuations nevertheless emerge. In Phase 2, we fine-tune a larger pretrained model using QLoRA on the same corpus in order to study how adaptation modifies explanatory framing and cosmological stance. Model outputs are evaluated using an LLM-as-judge framework that labels both cosmological stance (geocentric, heliocentric, or ambiguous) and explanatory frame (premodern versus modern). In the constrained setting of Phase 1, the smaller models occasionally generate local Earth-motion continuations, but these remain globally unstable and insufficient to support coherent cosmological reasoning. In Phase 2, fine-tuning induces a large and statistically significant shift toward premodern explanatory framing, while the conditional cosmological stance distributions remain comparatively stable within those frames. As a result, increases in geocentric outputs arise primarily from redistribution over explanatory regimes rather than from direct modification of stance. These results suggest that domain adaptation may primarily reshape the linguistic frameworks from which continuations are generated, with changes in stance emerging secondarily from those shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文通过历史宇宙学作为受控实验环境，研究了领域自适应如何重塑语言模型的解释行为，发现领域自适应主要通过重塑语言框架来改变输出，而立场（如地心说 vs 日心说）的变化是框架转移的次级效应。
AI.motivation: 现有研究尚未系统性地探究领域自适应在多大程度上改变语言模型的解释性框架（explanatory framing）与立场（stance），以及二者之间的因果关系——即立场变化是直接由领域数据驱动，还是由底层语言框架的迁移间接导致。
AI.method: 论文设计了两阶段实验：阶段一从零训练小语言模型于去除日心说引用的前哥白尼语料库，评估其是否自发产生地球运动或日心说续写；阶段二使用QLoRA对更大的预训练模型在同一语料上进行微调，以研究自适应如何修改解释框架和宇宙学立场。模型输出通过LLM-as-judge框架标注宇宙学立场（地心说、日心说或模糊）和解释框架（前现代与现代）。
AI.result: 在阶段一的约束条件下，小模型偶尔产生局部的地球运动续写，但整体不稳定且不足以支持连贯的宇宙学推理。在阶段二中，微调诱导了解释框架向前现代的显著且统计上大规模的偏移，而条件宇宙学立场分布在该框架内保持相对稳定；地心说输出的增加主要源于解释体制间的再分配，而非立场的直接修改。
AI.conclusion: 领域自适应可能主要通过重塑语言模型生成续写的语言框架来发挥作用，立场的变化是这些框架转移的次级涌现结果；这对理解领域微调的内在机制以及评估模型偏见来源具有重要启示。

title: Transforming and Encoding FTS for SAT Solving: What Helps, What Hurts (Extended Version)
summary:
Factored tasks are a classical planning representation that extends SAS+ with limited forms of disjunctive preconditions, conditional effects, and angelic nondeterminism. This allows for a more compact representation of tasks than traditional formalisms such as STRIPS or SAS+, and supports a wide range of task transformations. However, existing planning approaches for factored tasks have been limited to heuristic search methods.
  In this work, we investigate how to encode factored tasks in SAT. We propose several ways to encode the tasks, focusing on different strategies for translating the factored transition relation into propositional logic. We also analyze how to exploit parallelism at various levels in this setting and study the impact of common task transformations on the performance of SAT-based planners.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地研究了如何将因子化任务编码为SAT问题，提出了多种将因子化转移关系转换为命题逻辑的策略，并分析了在SAT规划中利用并行性和任务变换的影响。
AI.motivation: 因子化任务是一种比STRIPS或SAS+更紧凑的规划表示形式，支持有限形式的析取前提、条件效应和天使非确定性，但现有的规划方法仅限于启发式搜索，缺乏基于SAT的规划方法研究。
AI.method: 本文提出了多种将因子化任务编码为SAT的方法，重点设计了将因子化转移关系翻译为命题逻辑的不同策略；同时分析了在该设置下不同层次上利用并行性的方式，并研究了常见任务变换对SAT规划器性能的影响。
AI.result: 论文给出了多种编码方案的详细设计，并实证分析了并行性利用和任务变换对SAT求解效率的影响，但摘要中未报告具体的量化性能指标或基准测试结果。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明因子化任务可以有效地编码为SAT问题，且并行性和任务变换在SAT规划中具有显著影响，为未来在因子化任务上开发更高效的SAT规划器提供了理论基础和设计指导。

title: ReGuLaR: Relation-Grounded Latent Reasoning for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning has significantly improved the reasoning ability of large vision-language models (LVLMs) by verbalizing intermediate reasoning steps in natural language. However, such discrete textual rationales are often insufficient for encoding continuous visual evidence. Recent work addresses this limitation by moving reasoning into continuous latent space. Despite promising progress, existing methods leave latent reasoning insufficiently connected to the compositional and relational structure of visual evidence. To address this gap, we introduce ReGuLaR, a relation grounded latent reasoning framework that explicitly grounds latent states in these critical yet overlooked visual evidence. ReGuLaR uses a training-time ReGFormer to focus latent reasoning on question-relevant objects and inter-object relations, while at inference time the model reasons and generates answers without invoking the ReGFormer. To support training ReGuLaR, we construct RGROUNDING-351K, a real-world vision-language dataset annotated with key object bounding boxes and inter-object relations. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks show that ReGuLaR consistently outperforms existing approaches and achieves state-of-the-art performance. We include our code in the submission and will release the code and training data publicly upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出ReGuLaR框架，通过关系感知的隐空间推理显式地将连续隐状态与视觉证据中的物体和关系结构对齐，在无需额外推理开销的情况下实现了多模态推理任务的最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有链式思维推理方法依赖离散自然语言中间步骤，难以充分编码连续视觉证据；而将推理引入连续隐空间的已有方法，其隐状态与视觉证据中物体及其关系的组合结构联系不足，缺乏显式的关系级语义对齐。
AI.method: 提出ReGuLaR框架，包含一个训练时使用的ReGFormer模块，该模块聚焦于问题相关物体及其间关系，将连续隐推理显式地锚定到视觉关系结构上；推理时模型可直接生成答案而无需调用ReGFormer。同时构建了带有物体边界框和关系标注的真实世界数据集RGROUNDING-351K以支持训练。
AI.result: 在多个多样化的多模态推理基准上，ReGuLaR一致超越现有方法，取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了隐空间推理中与视觉证据关系结构显式对齐的重要性，证明了在不增加推理计算开销的前提下，通过训练阶段的关系约束可显著提升多模态推理能力，并提供公开代码与数据集以推动后续研究。

title: Can LLM Teams Play What? Where? When?
summary: Large language models (LLMs) remain limited on tasks requiring indirect reasoning, cultural knowledge, and coordinated hypothesis testing. We investigate whether team-based interaction improves LLM performance in What? Where? When? (ChGK), a quiz game designed to reward collective reasoning. We introduce three team strategies: Voting, Silent Team (the captain observes final answers), and Talkative Team (the captain observes both answers and rationales). To minimize data leakage, we evaluate these strategies on a dataset consisting of 572 ChGK questions released in 2025. Using six recent large-scale open models, we show that team-based strategies outperform single-model baselines, yielding gains of up to 20 percentage points in accuracy. The best team achieves 44.23% accuracy, and approaches human team performance on questions with available human statistics. Analysis of inter-model diversity reveals that disagreement strongly predicts lower accuracy, but explanatory communication substantially mitigates performance drops. We further examine captain behavior and find no evidence of self-preference bias; access to peer rationales improves captain judgments. Overall, LLM teams function primarily as answer selection and error-filtering mechanisms rather than generators of novel solutions. Our findings highlight the importance of interaction and suggest adaptive strategies as a promising direction for multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出团队协作策略（投票、静默团队、健谈团队）提升大语言模型在谜题问答任务中的表现，实验表明团队策略相比单模型准确率提升最高20个百分点，最佳团队达44.23%精度，并揭示LLM团队主要发挥答案筛选与错误过滤机制而非创新生成功能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在间接推理、文化知识及协调假设检验等任务上仍存在显著局限，现有研究多关注单模型能力提升，缺乏对多模型团队协作机制如何影响推理质量的系统探究。
AI.method: 本文基于"What? Where? When?" (ChGK)谜题问答任务，设计了三种团队协作策略：Voting（投票）、Silent Team（队长观察最终答案）、Talkative Team（队长观察答案及推理过程）；使用572个2025年新发布的ChGK问题构建数据集以避免数据泄露，评估六种近期大规模开源模型的表现。
AI.result: 团队策略相比单模型基线准确率提升高达20个百分点；最佳团队达到44.23%准确率，在有可用人类统计的问题上接近人类团队表现；模型间分歧度与准确率呈强负相关，但解释性通信可显著缓解性能下降；队长未表现出自我偏好偏差，获取同伴推理过程有助于提升判断质量。
AI.conclusion: LLM团队主要作为答案选择与错误过滤机制而非新颖解决方案的生成器；交互对提升性能至关重要，自适应团队策略是值得深入探索的多智能体系统发展方向。

title: Harness Updating Is Not Harness Benefit: Disentangling Evolution Capabilities in Self-Evolving LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents are increasingly deployed as systems built around editable external harnesses, including prompts, skills, memories and tools, that shape task execution without changing model parameters. Harness self-evolution adapts such agents by updating these harnesses from execution evidence. Yet it remains unclear whether a model's base capability in task-solving predicts its capabilities in harness self-evolution: which models produce useful harness updates, and which actually benefit from them? We analyze two harness self-evolution capabilities: (i) harness-updating, the capability to produce useful persistent harness updates from execution evidence; (ii) harness-benefit, the capability to benefit from updated harnesses during task solving. Our analysis reveals two findings. First, harness-updating is flat in base capability: models from different capability tiers produce harness updates that lead to surprisingly similar gains; even Qwen3.5-9B's updates yield gains comparable to those of Claude Opus~4.6. Second, harness-benefit is non-monotonic in base capability: weak-tier models benefit little from updated harnesses, mid-tier models benefit most, and strong-tier models benefit less than mid-tier. We trace low gains at the weak tier to two failure modes: weak-tier models may fail to activate relevant harness artifacts, or activate them but fail to follow them faithfully. These findings suggest investing capability budget in the task-solving agent rather than the evolver, and targeting harness invocation and long-horizon instruction following in agent training. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/A-EVO-Lab/a-evolve/tree/release/harness-evolution.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了LLM智能体的外部框架自演化能力（框架更新与框架受益），发现框架更新能力在不同能力层级模型间表现平坦（弱模型也能产生有效更新），而框架受益能力呈非单调性（中等模型受益最大），揭示了任务求解能力与自演化能力之间的非对齐关系。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体常依赖可编辑的外部框架（提示词、技能、记忆、工具）来执行任务，但其框架自演化能力与模型基础任务求解能力之间的关系尚不明确：哪些模型能产生有用的框架更新，哪些模型能真正从中受益，这一问题尚未得到系统分析。
AI.method: 本研究将LLM智能体的框架自演化能力拆分为两个维度：(i) 框架更新能力——从执行证据中生成有用的持久性框架更新的能力；(ii) 框架受益能力——在任务求解中有效利用更新后框架的能力。通过在不同能力层级模型上设计实验，分别评估这两项能力与基础能力的关系。
AI.result: 实验发现：(i) 框架更新能力在基础能力上表现平坦，不同层级模型（从Qwen3.5-9B到Claude Opus~4.6）产生的框架更新带来的性能增益惊人地相似；(ii) 框架受益能力呈非单调性：弱模型受益甚微，中等模型受益最大，强模型受益反而低于中等模型。弱模型受益低归因于两类失败模式：无法激活相关框架构件，或激活后无法忠实遵循框架指令。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，应优先将能力预算投入到任务求解智能体本身而非演化器，并在智能体训练中重点关注框架调用与长程指令遵循能力。这些发现为LLM智能体的自演化设计与能力分配提供了重要指导。

title: Crafter: A Multi-Agent Harness for Editable Scientific Figure Generation from Diverse Inputs
summary: Scientific figures are among the most effective means of communicating complex research ideas, yet producing publication-quality illustrations remains one of the most labor-intensive parts of paper preparation. Existing automated systems each target a single figure type under text-only input, leaving the diversity of types and conditions researchers actually use unaddressed; their raster outputs further cannot be locally revised. Because scientific figures are structured compositions of discrete semantic components, the localized errors generators produce on such layouts demand not a stronger backbone but a harness. We instantiate this harness in two complementary systems: Crafter, a multi-agent harness for figure generation that generalizes across figure types and input conditions without architectural changes, and CraftEditor, which applies the same pattern to convert raster outputs into editable SVGs. Moreover, we introduce CraftBench, a benchmark spanning three figure types and four input conditions with human quality annotation. Experiments show that Crafter substantially outperforms both standalone generators and the agentic baseline on PaperBanana-Bench and CraftBench, with ablations confirming each component's independent contribution; CraftEditor faithfully converts outputs into editable SVGs that surpass all baselines. Our code and benchmark are available at https://github.com/HaozheZhao/Crafter.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Crafter，一个多智能体框架，用于生成可编辑 SVG 格式的科学插图，覆盖多种图表类型和输入条件，显著优于现有生成器与基线；同时推出 CraftBench 基准和 CraftEditor 系统实现光栅到 SVG 的转换。
AI.motivation: 现有科学插图自动生成系统仅针对单一图表类型且仅支持纯文本输入，无法覆盖研究者实际使用的多样化图表类型与输入条件，且其光栅输出无法局部修改；科学图表本质上是离散语义组件构成的结构化组合，生成器的局部错误无法通过更强的骨干网络解决，而需要一种约束机制（harness）来加以控制。
AI.method: 本文提出 Crafter，一个多智能体约束框架（multi-agent harness），可在不改变架构的情况下泛化到多种图表类型和输入条件；同时提出 CraftEditor，应用相同模式将光栅输出转换为可编辑的 SVG 格式。此外，构建 CraftBench 基准，涵盖三种图表类型和四种输入条件，并配有人工质量标注。
AI.result: 在 PaperBanana-Bench 和 CraftBench 上，Crafter 大幅优于独立生成器和现有智能体基线；消融实验证实每个组件的独立贡献。CraftEditor 能将输出忠实地转换为可编辑 SVG，效果超越所有基线。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，针对科学图表结构化组合的特性，多智能体约束框架比单纯增强生成模型本身更有效，能够统一处理多样化的图表类型与输入条件，并实现可编辑输出，为科学插图自动化生成提供了有效的范式。

title: Evaluating using Mock Tool Calls to Quarantine Untrusted Prompt Inputs
summary: Large language models must frequently process untrusted inputs, such as judging an answer from another model or running tasks like spam and harm classifiers while under adversarial pressure. These inputs are often string-formatted directly into a prompt template, leaving systems fragile to manipulation. Current LLM specs from major providers like OpenAI distinguish trustworthiness along an Instruction Hierarchy, from System messages (most trusted) to Tool Results (least trusted). A possible natural mitigation is to wrap untrusted content in a mock tool call as a quarantine. We explore this hypothesis with an automated redteaming search over static attack strings across seven models and three LLM-as-a-Judge tasks. Counter to our hypothesis, tool-wrapping does not broadly improve robustness. On a binary evaluation task (GSM8K grading) it typically increases attack success rates, an apparent inversion of the instruction hierarchy. On scalar and pairwise tasks the effect is smaller and model-dependent, with no tested model reliably helped, and several showing inversion. We recommend evaluating this limitation in deployed systems, and longer-term, pursuing stronger Instruction Hierarchy training or new untrusted-input primitives.

AI.tldr: 该研究测试了将不可信输入包装成工具调用格式以隔离恶意内容的防御策略效果，发现该策略在七种模型和三项LLM作为评判者的任务中普遍未能提升鲁棒性，甚至在部分任务中显著增加了攻击成功率，表明简单的格式隔离不足以防御提示注入攻击。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理不可信输入（如来自其他模型的答案、垃圾邮件分类器或有害内容检测）时，这些输入通常被直接字符串格式化到提示模板中，导致系统容易受到操控。现有指令层次结构虽然区分了系统消息与工具结果的信任级别，但缺乏对不可信输入进行有效隔离的实证研究。
AI.method: 研究通过自动化红队搜索，在七种模型和三项LLM作为评判者任务（GSM8K评分、标量评估和成对比较）上，系统地测试了将不可信内容包装成模拟工具调用作为隔离策略对攻击成功率的静态攻击字符串搜索效果，并与基线进行对比。
AI.result: 工具包装策略在二元评估任务（GSM8K评分）中普遍增加了攻击成功率，表现出指令层次逆转现象；在标量和成对任务中效果较小且依赖具体模型，没有任何被测试模型得到可靠改善，多个模型也出现逆转现象。
AI.conclusion: 简单的工具调用格式包装无法有效防御提示注入攻击，建议在部署系统中评估这一局限，长期来看需要更强的指令层次训练或设计新的不可信输入原语。

title: Healthcare Mechanisms from Policy-as-Code Search under Strategic Provider Response
summary: Healthcare mechanisms are inseparable from the strategic provider response they induce: existing healthcare AI benchmarks hold this response fixed and so cannot evaluate mechanisms by the equilibrium they produce. We recast hospital mechanism design as program synthesis for language models: typed, inspectable rule programs are executed and scored by Medi-Sim, a multi-agent simulator with five strategic provider channels (coding, selection, delay, effort, triage). An incentive sweep recovers classical health-economics findings as adjacent regimes -- up-coding and low-complexity-patient selection under profit pressure, and Goodhart-style drift where measured performance becomes anti-correlated with true outcomes -- and a single audit lever exposes pressure migration: closing the coding channel more than doubles low-complexity selection. LLM-guided evolutionary code search over the same rule-program space then synthesizes an inspectable mixed-objective program that eliminates up-coding, halves rejection, and retains most of the profit-oriented baseline's funds.

AI.tldr: 该论文将医院机制设计重新定义为语言模型的程序合成问题，通过多智能体模拟器Medi-Sim和激励扫描复现经典卫生经济学发现，并利用LLM引导的进化搜索合成可检查的混合目标规则程序，在消除编码升级、减少一半拒绝的同时保留大部分利润基线资金。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗AI基准在评估医疗机制时固定了提供者的策略响应，无法在均衡状态下评估机制效果，忽略了医疗机制与策略性提供者行为之间的内在耦合关系。
AI.method: 将医院机制设计转化为面向语言模型的类型化、可检查规则程序合成问题，构建包含编码、选择、延迟、努力、分诊五个策略性提供者通道的多智能体模拟器Medi-Sim，采用激励扫描方法探索规则空间，并利用LLM引导的进化代码搜索合成最优混合目标规则程序。
AI.result: 激励扫描复现了经典卫生经济学发现：利润压力下的编码升级和低复杂度患者选择，以及测量绩效与真实结果反相关的古德哈特漂移；单个审计杠杆的关闭导致编码通道压力向低复杂度选择通道迁移（压力迁移量超过两倍）；LLM引导进化搜索合成的混合目标程序消除了编码升级、将拒绝率减半，并保留了利润导向基线的大部分资金。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，将机制设计视为可检查规则程序的搜索空间，结合多智能体模拟与LLM引导的进化搜索，能够有效发现平衡多方目标、消除不良策略行为的医疗规则程序，为可审计的医疗机制自动设计提供了新范式。

title: PInVerify: An Offline Embodied Benchmark for Active Instance Verification
comment: Accepted as a poster at the Foundation Models Meet Embodied Agents (FMEA) Workshop, CVPR 2026. 44 pages including appendix. Code: https://github.com/Avalon-S/PInVerify
summary: Embodied agents have made strong progress in navigating to target objects, but reaching the goal vicinity does not guarantee that the agent has found the correct instance: subtle attribute differences (e.g., "white floral" vs. "white striped") often require close-range, multi-view inspection. We address this gap with Active Instance Verification (AIV), a task in which an agent actively selects viewpoints around a candidate object to decide whether it matches a fine-grained natural-language description. We formalize AIV as a finite-horizon decision process and introduce PInVerify, an offline embodied benchmark for AIV: 3,000 evaluation episodes across 18 object categories, delivered as multi-view captures with a 6-sector navigation topology that exposes trap views (navigable but uninformative) and unreachable sectors. As reference baselines we build a training-free pipeline and a LoRA-fine-tuned end-to-end agent around open-source multimodal large language models (MLLMs) at on-device scale ($\leq$8B parameters), with attribute decomposition, a visibility-weighted multi-view tracker, and three next-best-view (NBV) strategies. In our evaluation across Qwen3-VL (4B/8B), SenseNova-SI-1.2-InternVL3-8B, CLIP, and SigLIP2, the best MLLM-based baseline exceeds the best embedding baseline by 4.9 pp; GT-box ablations show a +3.1 pp detection gap; and we do not observe reliable gains from active viewpoint selection within the tested NBV strategies. A LoRA-fine-tuned agent (SFT+GSPO) reaches 85.6%. PInVerify aims to support further work on active, fine-grained semantic verification in embodied AI. Code: https://github.com/Avalon-S/PInVerify.

AI.tldr: 本文提出主动实例验证（AIV）任务与PInVerify基准，针对具身智能体在目标附近仍需通过多视角细粒度判断物体是否匹配自然语言描述的问题，构建了包含3000个评估片段的多视角环境，并基于多模态大语言模型（≤8B参数）设计了无需训练与LoRA微调的基线方法，最佳MLLM基线达85.6%准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有具身导航方法虽能引导智能体到达目标物体附近，但到达目标区域并不保证找到正确实例，因为细微属性差异（如"白色花卉"与"白色条纹"）需要近距离多视角检查才能分辨，而现有工作缺乏对此类细粒度主动验证任务的系统研究。
AI.method: 本文将AIV形式化为有限时域决策过程，提出PInVerify离线基准，包含3000个评估片段、18个物体类别、6扇区导航拓扑（含陷阱视角和不可达扇区）的多视角捕获数据。基线方法包括：基于CLIP/SigLIP2的无需训练管线，以及基于Qwen3-VL（4B/8B）、SenseNova-SI-1.2-InternVL3-8B等开源MLLM的端到端智能体（≤8B参数），采用属性分解、可见性加权多视角跟踪器和三种下一最佳视角（NBV）策略，并支持LoRA微调（SFT+GSPO）。
AI.result: 最佳MLLM基线比最佳嵌入基线（CLIP/SigLIP2）高出4.9个百分点；GT框消融实验显示检测存在3.1个百分点的差距；在测试的NBV策略中未观察到主动视角选择带来可靠增益；LoRA微调智能体（SFT+GSPO）达到85.6%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: PInVerify基准及基线实验表明，AIV任务具有挑战性，MLLM在细粒度语义验证中优于纯视觉嵌入方法，但现有主动视角选择策略未带来显著提升，说明该方向仍需进一步研究，为具身AI中的主动细粒度语义验证提供了标准化评估平台。

title: Counterfactual Graph for Multi-Agent LLM Calibration
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems often treat agreement as evidence: when many agents in a panel give the same answer, that answer is assumed to be more reliable. We show that this assumption can fail after agents communicate. Communication can induce correlated failures and false consensus, so the same vote share may reflect reliable agreement in one topology but over-confidence in another. We propose CAGE-CAL, a counterfactual agent-graph calibration framework for multi-agent LLMs. For each query, CAGE-CAL compares an observed post-communication agent graph with a matched counterfactual no-communication graph, capturing both pairwise failure correlations and group-level dependencies. Rather than simply counting how many agents agree, CAGE-CAL estimates the counterfactual shift between observed and no-communication dependence, and calibrates confidence accordingly. Across five benchmarks, CAGE-CAL improves reliability discrimination with competitive ECE, and its calibrated confidence further improves topology selection over the best fixed-topology strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示多智能体LLM系统中通信会导致共识不可靠的问题，并提出CAGE-CAL框架，通过反事实图校准机制在无通信假设下比较观测图，从而校正过度自信并提升可靠性判别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体LLM系统普遍将多个智能体给出相同答案视为可靠证据，但论文指出，智能体间的通信会引入相关性失败和虚假共识，导致相同的投票份额在不同拓扑结构下可能反映可靠的共识或过度的过度自信，因此需要一种能够区分这两种情况的校准方法。
AI.method: 提出CAGE-CAL反事实智能体图校准框架，对每个查询，将观测到的通信后智能体图与一个匹配的反事实无通信图进行比较，同时捕捉成对失败相关性和组级依赖关系；不同于简单计数一致智能体数量，CAGE-CAL估计观测依赖与无通信依赖之间的反事实偏移，并据此对置信度进行校准。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试上，CAGE-CAL在保持有竞争力的期望校准误差（ECE）的同时，显著提升了可靠性判别能力，并且其校准后的置信度进一步改进了拓扑选择性能，超越了最佳固定拓扑策略。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次定量分析了通信对多智能体LLM系统中共识可靠性的负面影响，提出的反事实校准框架有效缓解了虚假共识问题，并为动态拓扑选择提供了更有信息量的置信度信号，推动了多智能体系统在可信赖性方面的发展。

title: Learning Agent-Compatible Context Management for Long-Horizon Tasks
summary: LLM agents increasingly face long-horizon tasks such as web search and deep research in real-world applications, where accumulated context can cause long-context degradation and reasoning failures. Prior work mitigates this through context management with agent-side context control or fixed strategies such as summarization, which require training the agent itself for adaptation - making it impractical for closed-source agents and ignoring that different agents may require different strategies. We introduce Adaptive Context Management (AdaCoM), which trains an external LLM to manage the context of a frozen agent through flexible modification actions and end-to-end reinforcement learning. Across diverse agents on web search and deep research benchmarks, AdaCoM substantially improves performance by preserving task constraints and progress while pruning stale content. The learned strategies reveal a Fidelity-Reliability Trade-off: agents with higher vanilla ReAct performance benefit from higher-fidelity context preservation, whereas lower-performing agents require more aggressive compression to stay within a reliable reasoning regime. Transfer experiments show that AdaCoM generalizes most effectively across agents with similar capability (measured by vanilla ReAct performance), suggesting a practical path toward reusable context managers for agent systems.

AI.tldr: AdaCoM 提出通过强化学习训练外部 LLM 为冻结的 LLM 智能体进行自适应上下文管理，在长程任务中通过灵活修改动作提升性能，并揭示了保真度-可靠性权衡及跨智能体迁移的规律。
AI.motivation: 现有上下文管理方法依赖智能体自身进行适配或使用固定策略（如摘要），这对闭源智能体不适用，且忽视了不同智能体需要不同管理策略的问题。
AI.method: AdaCoM 训练一个外部 LLM 作为上下文管理器，对冻结的智能体上下文执行灵活的修改动作（如修剪过时内容），并通过端到端强化学习优化管理策略。
AI.result: 在 Web 搜索和深度研究的多个智能体基准测试中，AdaCoM 通过保留任务约束与进展并剔除过时内容，显著提升了性能；实验揭示了保真度-可靠性权衡，且迁移实验表明上下文管理器在能力相似的智能体间泛化最佳。
AI.conclusion: AdaCoM 为闭源智能体提供了一种无需修改智能体本身的可泛化上下文管理方案，并指出了基于智能体基础性能选择压缩策略的实用路径。

title: Seeing Before Agreeing: Aligning Multi-Agent Consensus with Visual Evidence
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved strong performance on visual question answering (VQA). To mitigate individual hallucinations and blind spots, aggregating diverse perspectives via multi-agent collaboration has emerged as a promising paradigm. While this approach has shown great success in textual QA, its potential in the multimodal domain remains under-explored. Existing multi-agent VQA methods predominantly adapt text-centric protocols, focusing on textual discussions while ignoring the alignment of visual information. In this work, we reveal a key insight: answer-level agreement is insufficient for reliable multi-agent VQA; \textit{aligned visual evidence} -- shared support from the image regions agents rely on -- is essential for trustworthy consensus. To leverage this insight, we propose EAGLE (\textbf{E}vidence-\textbf{A}ligned \textbf{G}rounded mu\textbf{L}ti-agent r\textbf{E}asoning), a training-free evidence-centered framework for coordinating multiple VLM agents. EAGLE explicitly exposes each agent's grounding regions as visual evidence, enables mutual verification over the evidence, and uses evidence consistency to guide final decision-making. Experiments on six VQA benchmarks show that EAGLE achieves best average performance across domains while remaining lightweight, interpretable, and practical for deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出EAGLE框架，通过显式暴露并对齐各VLM智能体的视觉证据区域，实现无需训练的多智能体协同VQA，在六个基准上取得最佳平均性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉问答(VQA)中多智能体协作方法主要沿用文本中心协议，聚焦于文本讨论而忽略了对视觉信息的对齐；现有方法仅在答案层面达成一致，缺乏对智能体所依赖图像区域的视觉证据层面的互验，导致在多模态场景下难以形成可靠共识。
AI.method: 提出EAGLE（Evidence-Aligned Grounded Multi-agent Reasoning），一种无需训练的基于证据中心的多VLM智能体协同框架。该框架显式暴露每个智能体的视觉定位区域作为视觉证据，使智能体之间能够对这些证据进行相互验证，并利用证据一致性来指导最终决策。
AI.result: 在六个VQA基准数据集上的实验表明，EAGLE在跨领域任务中取得了最佳平均性能，同时保持了轻量级、可解释性和易于部署的特性。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了可靠多智能体VQA的关键在于对齐视觉证据而非仅对齐答案，为多模态多智能体协同提供了新的设计原则；EAGLE框架验证了训练自由的证据对齐范式在实际部署中的有效性和实用性。

title: CobSeg: Coherence Boundary Modeling for Dialogue Topic Segmentation
summary: Dialogue topic segmentation is critical in many human-AI collaborative applications which requires identifying heterogeneous boundary cues, including lexical transitions near utterance edges and semantic discontinuities across utterances. Existing utterance models often dilute these local lexical signals. We propose CobSeg, a novel multi-branch architecture that separates coherence-level semantic continuity from lexical boundary transitions and recovers both through directional boundary prediction. CobSeg further uses boundary informativeness weighting to emphasize high-utility utterance positions, and incorporates a corpus-derived topic coherence cue with learned combination weights. While CobSeg is evaluated as a compact trainable segmenter under supervised gold-boundary training and a pseudo-label setting with automatically induced boundaries, it performs enhanced boundary prediction without LLM calls during inference. Across five benchmarks, it improves $P_k$ and $W_d$ particularly when local lexical cues are prominent: under gold supervision, it reduces $P_k$ by 0.7 points and $W_d$ by 0.6 points on VHF, and reaches $P_k$ of 1.0 on DialSeg711; with induced boundaries, it reduces $P_k$ by 14.8 points on VHF, by 1.5 points on DialSeg711, and by 1.1 points on TIAGE, outperforming prior non-LLM approaches.

AI.tldr: CobSeg是一种多分支对话主题分割架构，通过分离语义连续性与词汇边界转换并引入边界信息加权和语料主题连贯性线索，在监督和伪标签设置下均显著提升了分割性能，且推理时不依赖大语言模型调用。
AI.motivation: 现有对话主题分割模型在处理异构边界线索（包括语句边缘的词汇转换和跨语句的语义不连续性）时，常因对语句级建模而稀释了局部词汇信号，导致对边界位置的识别不够精确。
AI.method: CobSeg采用多分支架构，将连贯性层面的语义连续性与词汇层面的边界转换分离，并通过定向边界预测进行恢复；引入边界信息加权机制以强调高信息量的语句位置，同时结合基于语料库的主题连贯性线索与可学习的组合权重；支持监督学习和伪标签训练，推理时无需大语言模型调用。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上，CobSeg在局部词汇线索显著时提升尤为明显：在监督设置下，VHF上P_k降低0.7、W_d降低0.6，DialSeg711上P_k达到1.0；在伪标签设置下，VHF上P_k降低14.8，DialSeg711上降低1.5，TIAGE上降低1.1，全面超越先前的非大语言模型方法。
AI.conclusion: CobSeg通过显式解耦并重建不同类型的边界线索，有效缓解了局部词汇信号被稀释的问题，在多个对话分割任务上取得了显著改进，且不依赖大语言模型推理，为高效、轻量的对话主题分割提供了新的技术路径。

title: Planner-Centric Reinforcement Learning for Deep Research with Structure-Aware Reward
summary: Deep research tasks require LLMs to plan what to investigate, retrieve evidence, and synthesize long-form answers across multiple branches of inquiry. Existing training paradigms either rely on short-form verifiable QA as a proxy or optimize monolithic long trajectories, which makes planning and execution difficult to disentangle and yields weak credit assignment for the planning process. We propose DecomposeR, a planner-centric deep research framework that represents research plans as typed directed acyclic graphs (DAGs), allowing planning to be made explicit, structured, and rewardable. We train a Qwen3-8B model in two stages: planner reinforcement learning (RL) first learns graph structure and query decomposition to improve research planning, and answerer reinforcement learning (RL) then learns branch-level execution and final synthesis conditioned on the learned plan. By assigning rewards to explicit planner tokens and structured components rather than to a flat trajectory, DecomposeR enables finer-grained optimization of planning while reducing the ambiguity of end-to-end training. Experiments show that DecomposeR-8B improves over strong comparable open baselines by 5.1-8.0 points on popular long-form benchmarks due to improved planning and answering capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出DecomposeR框架，将深度研究任务中的规划过程显式建模为类型化有向无环图（DAG），通过规划器强化学习和回答器强化学习两阶段训练，实现了对规划过程的细粒度奖励分配，在长文本基准上较开源基线提升5.1-8.0分。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在深度研究任务中，要么依赖短形式可验证问答作为代理任务，要么优化完整的长时间轨迹，导致规划与执行难以解耦，且对规划过程缺乏有效的信用分配机制，无法对规划进行细粒度优化。
AI.method: 提出DecomposeR框架，将研究规划表示为类型化有向无环图（DAG），使规划显式化、结构化且可奖励。在Qwen3-8B上分两阶段训练：首先通过规划器强化学习学习图结构和查询分解以优化研究规划，然后通过回答器强化学习学习分支级执行和最终综合，将奖励分配至显式的规划器token和结构化组件而非扁平轨迹。
AI.result: DecomposeR-8B在多个流行的长文本基准上较同类开源基线提升5.1-8.0分，充分验证了显式规划建模和两阶段强化学习训练策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将规划显式建模为DAG结构并分阶段进行规划器与回答器的强化学习训练，可以有效解决深度研究任务中规划优化困难的问题，为复杂长文本推理任务的训练范式提供了新思路。

title: Mathematical Morphology in Machine Learning
summary: This work introduces mathematical morphology-an established visual computing theory-into machine learning to exploit shape and density aspects often overlooked by standard techniques. We propose a fast clustering algorithm based on morphological reconstruction that accurately preserves cluster shapes and density. This scheme offers unique features: an intrinsic sense of maximal clusters, cost-free noise removal, and diverse growth patterns controlled by structuring elements.Additionally, we propose a novel distance metric combining Minkowski and Chebyshev distances, highly efficient for morphological dilations. In $Z^2$ discrete neighbourhood iterations, it is roughly 1.3 times faster than Manhattan and 329.5 times faster than Euclidean distances. When evaluated using a k-Nearest Neighbours (k-NN) classifier across 33 UCI datasets against 14 other distances, our metric achieved above-average accuracies most frequently (26 of 33 cases) and the best overall accuracy in 9 cases.Finally, we introduce novel morphological classifiers. Unlike current literature, this proposal uniquely models shape, density, and fractal information in datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文将数学形态学引入机器学习，提出了基于形态学重构的快速聚类算法、一种结合明可夫斯基与切比雪夫距离的高效距离度量以及新型形态学分类器，在保留形状与密度信息方面取得了优于传统方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 标准机器学习技术通常忽略数据的形状和密度信息，而数学形态学作为成熟的视觉计算理论，在捕捉这些结构特征方面具有潜力，但尚未被有效引入机器学习领域。
AI.method: 提出了基于形态学重构的快速聚类算法，可准确保持聚类形状与密度，具有内在的最大聚类感知、无代价噪声去除以及由结构元素控制的多样化生长模式等特点；同时提出了一种结合明可夫斯基距离与切比雪夫距离的新型距离度量，在Z²离散邻域迭代中效率极高；此外还引入了能够同时建模形状、密度和分形信息的新型形态学分类器。
AI.result: 所提距离度量在Z²离散邻域迭代中分别比曼哈顿距离快约1.3倍、比欧氏距离快约329.5倍；在33个UCI数据集上使用k-NN分类器与14种其他距离度量进行对比，所提度量在26个案例中达到高于平均的准确率，并在9个案例中取得最佳总体准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了数学形态学在机器学习中有效利用形状、密度和分形信息的可行性，提出的聚类算法、高效距离度量和形态学分类器为处理结构化数据提供了新的技术路径，尤其适用于对形状和密度特征敏感的任务。

title: ElasticMem: Latent Memory as a Learnable Resource for LLM Agents
summary: Long-term memory is essential for LLM agents to reason coherently across extended interactions, personalize responses, and reuse past experience. However, existing memory-augmented methods typically treat memory as a fixed resource: text-space approaches concatenate retrieved memories into the context window, causing substantial token overhead and sensitivity to noisy evidence, while latent-space approaches reduce textual cost but still rely on rigid retrieval or fixed-capacity memory interfaces. This creates a mismatch between query-dependent memory utility and fixed memory allocation. We propose ElasticMem, a memory-augmented LLM framework that learns to use memory as an elastic latent resource. ElasticMem builds an offline latent memory bank with retrieval keys and content caches, retrieves memories adaptively from the reasoner's hidden state, assigns each retrieved memory a variable latent budget through a learned policy, and injects selected latent states as soft memory tokens for generation. The full memory-use process is optimized with downstream task rewards through group-relative policy optimization. We evaluate ElasticMem on MemorySuite, covering memory-intensive QA and embodied agent control. Across Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct and Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct backbones, ElasticMem improves weighted average QA accuracy by 26.2% and 24.6%, and improves ALFWorld success rate by 66.3% and 27.2%, respectively, over the strongest baselines, while achieving the lowest ALFWorld token cost. Ablations and qualitative analyses further show that adaptive retrieval and elastic budget allocation help ElasticMem prioritize useful evidence and transferable plans beyond rigid cosine similarity. Our code for ElasticMem will be released at https://github.com/ulab-uiuc/ElasticMem.

AI.tldr: ElasticMem提出了一种基于弹性潜在记忆的LLM框架，通过自适应检索和可学习的可变潜在预算分配机制，替代固定记忆资源的传统方法，在记忆密集型QA和具身智能体任务中显著提升性能并降低token开销。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆增强方法将记忆视为固定资源：文本空间方法将检索到的记忆拼接到上下文窗口，导致大量token开销且易受噪声影响；潜在空间方法虽降低文本成本，但仍依赖刚性检索或固定容量的记忆接口。这造成了查询相关的记忆效用与固定记忆分配之间的不匹配。
AI.method: ElasticMem构建了一个离线潜在记忆库，包含检索键和内容缓存；从推理器的隐状态中自适应地检索记忆，通过可学习策略为每个检索到的记忆分配可变的潜在预算，并将选中的潜在状态作为软记忆token注入生成过程。整个记忆使用过程通过群组相对策略优化（GRPO）在下游任务奖励上端到端优化。
AI.result: 在MemorySuite基准上，基于Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct和Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct的ElasticMem在加权平均QA准确率上分别提升26.2%和24.6%，在ALFWorld成功率上分别提升66.3%和27.2%，同时实现了最低的ALFWorld token消耗。消融和定性分析表明，自适应检索和弹性预算分配有助于模型优先关注有用证据和可迁移计划，超越刚性的余弦相似度匹配。
AI.conclusion: ElasticMem验证了将记忆作为弹性潜在资源学习的有效性，通过可变预算分配和自适应检索解决了固定记忆分配与查询效用之间的不匹配问题，为长交互场景下的LLM智能体记忆管理提供了新范式。

title: COMPASS: Cognitive MCTS-Guided Process Alignment for Safe Search Agents
summary: LLM-powered search agents enable multi-step reasoning and tool use. However, these capabilities introduce retrieval-induced safety degradation, as harmful intents may decompose into seemingly innocuous sub-queries that lead to unsafe outcomes. Existing alignment methods struggle to capture sparse safety signals and fail to supervise diverse violations across multi-step interactions. We propose COMPASS, a Cognitive MCTS-Guided Process Alignment framework designed to achieve robust safety alignment throughout the agent workflow while preserving general utility. COMPASS integrates cognitive tree exploration (CTE) to efficiently synthesize stealthy attack trajectories, and introspective step-wise alignment (ISA) to isolate risky intermediate actions for fine-grained process supervision. Empirical results show that COMPASS achieves a favorable safety-utility trade-off while requiring substantially less training data.

AI.tldr: COMPASS提出了一种基于认知蒙特卡洛树搜索的流程对齐框架，通过认知树探索合成隐蔽攻击轨迹并结合内省步骤级对齐实现细粒度过程监督，在显著降低训练数据需求的同时实现了安全性与通用性之间的良好平衡。
AI.motivation: 基于大语言模型的搜索代理具备多步推理和工具调用能力，但这种能力引入了检索诱导的安全退化问题，即有害意图可能分解为看似无害的子查询，最终导致不安全结果。现有对齐方法难以捕获稀疏的安全信号，也无法有效监督多步交互中多样化的违规行为。
AI.method: COMPASS框架包含两大核心技术：认知树探索（CTE）高效合成隐蔽攻击轨迹，以及内省步骤级对齐（ISA）隔离风险中间动作以实现细粒度的过程监督，从而在保障智能体工作流安全对齐的同时维持通用效用。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，COMPASS在安全性与通用效用之间取得了良好的权衡，并且所需的训练数据量显著少于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: COMPASS通过引入基于MCTS的认知树探索与内省式步骤级对齐，有效解决了LLM搜索代理在多步交互中因检索诱导而产生的安全退化问题，为安全对齐提供了一种数据高效的细粒度过程监督范式。

title: Vision-Based Localization in Dense Urban Environments: A Case Study of an Urban Village in China
summary: Urban villages, the widespread informal settlements which have emerged as a result of rapid urbanization, are now major residential hubs for migrant workers in large cities in China. The dense arrangement of buildings in these areas often leads to unreliable GPS signals, while incomplete mapping data further impairs accurate route planning and navigation. These issues not only hinder everyday mobility but also pose significant challenges for emergency response, as confusing road layouts and GPS inaccuracies can complicate evacuation efforts. To address these challenges, we propose a practical vision-based geo-localization solution tailored for dense urban environments. Our approach features a low-cost data collection pipeline utilizing a dual-camera system, comprising a panoramic camera and a smartphone camera, to capture synchronized 360-degree panoramas and query images. Using Shipai Village, a well-known densely populated urban village in Guangzhou, as a case study, we develop a specialized image geo-localization dataset. We then assess and compare the performance of existing models across various scene types to identify their strengths and weaknesses. The findings demonstrate both the potential and limitations of visual-based localization in dense urban-village environments. Our framework aims to enhance pedestrian navigation, last-mile delivery, and emergency management in areas with poor GPS coverage, ultimately supporting the vulnerable populations living within these informal settlements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向中国城中村密集环境的低成本视觉地理定位方案，包含双摄像头数据采集流程和专用数据集，通过评估现有模型在不同场景下的表现，揭示了视觉定位在GPS信号差、地图不完善的区域中的潜力与局限性。
AI.motivation: 城中村作为快速城镇化的产物，是外来务工人员的主要居住地，但建筑密度高导致GPS信号不可靠，地图数据不完整又影响导航和路径规划精度，这些问题不仅妨碍日常出行，更在紧急疏散时因道路布局混乱和定位不准带来严重安全隐患，现有方案难以同时兼顾低成本与高精度的要求。
AI.method: 本文构建了一套低成本数据采集流程，采用包含全景相机和智能手机摄像头的双摄像头系统，同步捕获360度全景图像与查询图像；以广州石牌村为案例，开发了专门的城市村图像地理定位数据集，并在该数据集上评估和比较了多种现有模型在不同场景类型下的性能表现。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基于视觉的地理定位在密集城中村环境中兼具可行性与局限性：现有模型在不同场景类型下表现各异，揭示了视觉定位方法在应对复杂建筑布局、遮挡和光照变化时的优势与短板，为后续方法改进提供了定量基准。
AI.conclusion: 该框架旨在提升GPS信号差区域的步行导航、末端配送和应急管理能力，服务于城中村中的弱势群体；研究同时指出了当前视觉定位模型在密集非正规居住区中的潜在改进方向，为后续面向类似环境的定位技术研究奠定了基础。

title: ExpGraph: Model-Agnostic Experience Learning with Graph-Structured Memory for LLM Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have shown strong capabilities in reasoning, tool use, and multi-step interaction, but they often solve tasks from scratch and fail to reuse successful strategies or failure lessons from prior experience. Fine-tuning on collected experience can improve reuse, but it is inflexible when stronger or more suitable executors emerge. We propose ExpGraph, a model-agnostic experience learning framework that enables frozen and replaceable LLM executors to improve through external experience reuse without parameter updates. ExpGraph summarizes historical trajectories into reusable skills and failure lessons, organizes them as nodes in a self-evolving experience graph, and retrieves useful experiences through graph diffusion and utility-aware ranking. A lightweight retrieval copilot is trained with reinforcement learning using feedback that compares executor performance with and without retrieved experiences, while the graph is updated online from downstream task outcomes. We evaluate ExpGraph on ExpSuite, covering question answering, mathematical reasoning, code generation, and multi-step agentic environments including ALFWorld and AppWorld. ExpGraph improves over the strongest baseline by 12.2% and 4.7% on static tasks with smaller and larger executors, and by 21.4% and 12.7% in agentic environments, while reducing average interaction steps by 12.7% and 21.6%. Ablations show that graph-structured experience, utility-aware ranking, and adaptive retrieval jointly enable effective experience reuse across diverse tasks and executor models.

AI.tldr: 提出ExpGraph，一种模型无关的经验学习框架，通过外部经验图复用使冻结的LLM执行器在不更新参数的情况下提升性能；在多项任务上超越最强基线12.2%–21.4%，并减少交互步数12.7%–21.6%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体虽具备推理和工具使用能力，但通常从零开始解决任务，未能复用过往成功策略或失败经验；微调虽然能提升经验复用，但在出现更强或更合适的执行器时缺乏灵活性，亟需一种模型无关的经验复用方法。
AI.method: 提出ExpGraph框架，将历史轨迹总结为可复用技能和失败经验并组织为自演进经验图的节点；通过图扩散和效用感知排序检索有用经验；训练一个轻量级检索副驾驶，使用强化学习基于有无经验时执行器性能对比的反馈进行优化；图根据下游任务结果在线更新。
AI.result: 在ExpSuite（含问答、数学推理、代码生成及ALFWorld/AppWorld智能体环境）上，ExpGraph在静态任务中超越最强基线12.2%（小执行器）和4.7%（大执行器），在智能体环境中超越21.4%和12.7%，同时平均交互步数分别减少12.7%和21.6%。消融实验表明图结构经验、效用感知排序和自适应检索共同支撑了有效的经验复用。
AI.conclusion: ExpGraph证明通过外部经验图的构建与自适应检索，冻结的LLM执行器可以在不更新参数的情况下有效复用历史经验，显著提升各类任务的性能与效率，为模型无关的经验学习提供了可行范式。

title: HADT: A Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Differential Transformer for Autonomous Earth Observation Satellite Cluster
comment: Accepted in ECML-PKDD 2026. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2511.12792
summary: This work addresses the problem of autonomous resource management in heterogeneous satellite cluster conducting Earth Observation (EO) missions including optical and Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) satellites. In autonomous operation mode, satellites are equipped with intelligent capabilities enabling real-time decision-making based on the latest conditions, while requiring minimal interaction with ground operators. Traditional scheduling approaches typically rely on mathematical models to represent satellite mission and resource management. Then, this problem is solved by using optimization algorithms. However, such solutions become less effective when the underlying models are not available, over complex, and inaccurate due to dynamic changes and uncertainties inherent in the space mission environment. A promising alternative is to reformulate the problem as a sequential decision-making process and apply model-free reinforcement learning techniques to enable adaptive and real-time resource management. To this end, we propose a novel transformer-based architecture tailored for heterogeneous satellite cluster autonomous EO Mission with relational observations-actions tokenization and differential attention mechanism. Our experimental results demonstrate significant performance improvements compared to the available baselines. Moreover, the proposed architecture exhibits strong adaptability and transferability with respect to varying numbers of satellite clusters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的新型架构，通过关系型观测-动作令牌化和差分注意力机制，解决异构卫星集群在自主地球观测任务中的资源管理问题，实验表明该方法在性能和可迁移性上显著优于传统基线。
AI.motivation: 传统卫星任务调度方法依赖精确的数学模型和优化算法，但面对空间环境中模型不可用、过于复杂或动态不确定性时效果显著下降，亟需一种无需显式模型、能够自适应实时决策的自主资源管理方案。
AI.method: 将异构卫星集群的地球观测资源管理问题重新表述为序列决策过程，采用无模型强化学习技术，并设计了一种基于Transformer的新型架构，该架构包含关系型观测-动作令牌化和差分注意力机制，以支持光学与SAR卫星等异构节点的自主协同决策。
AI.result: 在异构卫星集群自主地球观测任务中，所提架构相比现有基线方法取得了显著的性能提升，并且在卫星集群数量变化的情况下展现出较强的适应性和可迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，基于Transformer的序列决策架构能够有效克服传统优化方法在动态不确定太空环境下的局限性，为异构卫星集群的自主化资源管理提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决方案，并具有良好的跨集群规模泛化潜力。

title: Simple Token-Efficient Vision-Language Model for Case-level Pathology Synoptic Report Generation
summary: Generating clinically useful pathology reports for pathology cases from whole-slide images (WSIs) is challenging due to gigapixel resolution, long visual-token sequences, and the complexity of case-level reasoning, where a single case may contain multiple WSIs with heterogeneous tissues and ambiguous findings. We present a simple token-efficient vision--language model for case-level synoptic report generation that remains practical under constrained GPU memory. Our architecture follows a minimal three-component design: a frozen pathology patch encoder, a lightweight two-layer MLP vision-language aligner, and a large language model decoder, with an explicit WSI marker token to separate slides within a case. Training proceeds in two supervised stages: (1) aligner-only WSI captioning using heterogeneous WSI-text pairs, and (2) case-level supervised fine-tuning on case-report pairs for structured report generation. To reduce sequence length, we represent each slide using $512 \times 512$ patches at $5\times$ magnification, which reduces the average sequence length by up to $64\times$ times compared to the commonly used $20\times$ patches. Combined with efficient training techniques, we enable practical training with only half a NVIDIA H100 GPU. Across both training stages, our approach achieves high ROUGE-L/METEOR/BLEU-4 scores while being substantially more efficient in memory and runtime. In AI-based evaluations, our model is consistently preferred over strong baselines. Extensive ablations characterize performance-efficiency trade-offs and identify simple choices that improve robustness in multi-WSI settings. Overall, this work provides a strong, reproducible baseline for efficient pathology report generation, lowering the barrier to multi-WSI VLM research under limited compute.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种简单、token高效的视觉-语言模型用于病例级别病理报告生成，通过使用5倍放大的512×512 patches将序列长度降低最多64倍，结合冻结的病理patch编码器、轻量级两层MLP对齐器和大语言模型解码器，仅需半张H100 GPU即可训练，在多项指标上达到高分数并优于强基线。
AI.motivation: 从全切片图像生成临床可用的病理报告面临千兆像素分辨率、长视觉token序列以及病例级推理的复杂性（单个病例可能包含多个WSI，组织异质且发现模糊）等挑战，现有方法在内存受限条件下难以实用。
AI.method: 采用极简的三组件架构：冻结的病理patch编码器、轻量级两层MLP视觉-语言对齐器以及大语言模型解码器，并引入显式的WSI标记token来区分病例内的多个切片；训练分两个监督阶段进行——(1) 仅对齐器的WSI标题生成（使用异质WSI-文本对）和 (2) 病例级监督微调（使用病例-报告对进行结构化报告生成）；通过使用5倍放大下的512×512 patches将平均序列长度降低至常用20倍放大的最多1/64，结合高效训练技术，仅需半张NVIDIA H100 GPU即可完成训练。
AI.result: 在两个训练阶段中均获得了高ROUGE-L、METEOR和BLEU-4分数，同时在内存和运行时间上显著更高效；在基于AI的评估中，模型持续优于强基线方法；大量消融实验刻画了性能-效率权衡，并识别出能提升多WSI场景鲁棒性的简单设计选择。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一个强健且可复现的基线，用于高效的病理报告生成，降低了对有限计算资源下多WSI视觉-语言模型研究的门槛。

title: Skill is Not One-Size-Fits-All: Model-Aware Skill Alignment for LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents increasingly retrieve externally curated skills-procedural instructions retrieved at decision time-to improve performance on long-horizon interactive tasks. Existing skill libraries are typically treated as model-agnostic, reusing the same skill formulations across backbones with substantially different capacities and behaviors. However, our controlled experiments across multiple model scales show that skill effectiveness is strongly model-dependent: a skill that benefits one backbone can harm another. Motivated by this observation, we propose MASA Model-Aware Skill Alignment, a framework that adapts skills to each target backbone without modifying agent weights. MASA operates in two stages: (1) a hierarchical skill evolution pipeline that iteratively rewrites general and task-specific skills using hill climbing and UCB-driven tree search, guided by environment feedback and model capability profiles; and (2) a lightweight model-conditioned skill rewriter trained on evolution trajectories to reproduce the adaptation in a single forward pass. Experiments across three interactive environments and four backbones show that MASA consistently achieves the best overall performance, with gains of up to 25.8 points over the strongest baseline. The learned rewriter further generalizes to unseen tasks and environments without additional search, consistently outperforming a much larger teacher LLM at a fraction of the inference cost.

AI.tldr: 提出MASA框架，通过模型感知的技能对齐方法将外部技能库自适应地适配到不同能力的LLM骨干网络，在不修改模型权重的情况下显著提升多环境任务性能，且训练后的轻量化重写器能以极低推理成本泛化到未见任务和环境。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体通常使用模型无关的固定技能库，但实验表明相同技能对不同能力和行为的骨干网络效果差异显著，甚至对某些模型产生负面影响，亟需一种能够根据目标模型特性自动适配技能的方法。
AI.method: 提出MASA框架，包含两阶段流程：(1)层次化技能演化流水线，利用爬山算法和UCB驱动的树搜索，结合环境反馈和模型能力画像，迭代重写通用技能和任务特定技能；(2)轻量级模型条件技能重写器，在演化轨迹上训练，能以单次前向传播复现技能适配过程。
AI.result: 在三个交互环境和四个骨干网络上，MASA在整体性能上持续最优，比最强基线高出最多25.8个点；训练后的重写器无需额外搜索即可泛化到未见任务和环境，推理成本远低于更大的教师LLM但性能更优。
AI.conclusion: 技能有效性高度依赖于模型本身，模型感知的技能对齐至关重要；通过演化与蒸馏结合的轻量级框架，可高效实现技能的自适应重写，为构建更通用的LLM智能体系统提供了可行路径。

title: COLLEAGUE.SKILL: Automated AI Skill Generation via Expert Knowledge Distillation
summary: LLM agents are increasingly expected not only to complete isolated tasks, but also to carry bounded representations of human expertise, judgment, and interaction style. Building such person-grounded agents remains difficult because actionable knowledge associated with a person or role is usually embedded in heterogeneous traces rather than written as clean instructions. Existing memory and persona systems capture fragments of this evidence, while skill frameworks provide portable packaging formats; however, there is no end-to-end workflow for distilling these traces into inspectable, correctable, and agent-usable skills. We present an automated trace-to-skill distillation system for generating person-grounded AI skills via expert knowledge distillation. Given materials from a target person or role, COLLEAGUE.SKILL produces a versioned skill package with two coordinated tracks: a capability track for practices, mental models, and decision heuristics, and a bounded behavior track for communication style, interaction rules, and correction history. The package can be inspected, invoked, updated through natural-language feedback, rolled back, installed across agent hosts, and optionally prepared for controlled distribution. We describe the artifact contract, generation workflow, correction lifecycle, deployment surface, and domain presets implemented in the open-source system. At the time of writing, the public repository has approximately 18.5k GitHub stars; the gallery lists 215 skills from 165 contributors and more than 100k cumulative stars across listed skill cards. The system illustrates how person-grounded skills can be represented as portable, correctable packages rather than opaque prompts or hidden memories.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个自动化痕迹到技能的蒸馏系统COLLEAGUE.SKILL，能从目标人物或角色的异构痕迹中生成可检查、可修正、可移植的人格化AI技能包，包含能力轨道和受限行为轨道两个协调模块，以可移植、可修正的包形式替代了不透明的提示或隐性记忆。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体不仅需要完成孤立任务，还需要承载人类专业知识、判断和交互风格的有界表示，但构建此类人格化智能体的难点在于与人物或角色相关的可操作知识通常嵌入在异构痕迹中而非清晰的指令形式，现有记忆和人格系统仅捕获了这些证据的片段，而技能框架提供了可移植的打包格式，但缺乏将痕迹蒸馏为可检查、可修正且智能体可用的技能的端到端工作流。
AI.method: 提出了COLLEAGUE.SKILL自动化痕迹到技能蒸馏系统，给定目标人物或角色的材料后生成带版本控制的技能包，包含两个协调轨道：能力轨道（实践、心智模型和决策启发法）和受限行为轨道（沟通风格、交互规则和修正历史），技能包支持检查、调用、通过自然语言反馈更新、回滚、跨智能体宿主安装，并可选地准备受控分发，系统实现了制品契约、生成工作流、修正生命周期、部署面和领域预设。
AI.result: 公开仓库在撰写时获得约18.5k GitHub星标，图库列出来自165位贡献者的215个技能，跨列出的技能卡累计超过10万星标。
AI.conclusion: 该开源系统展示了人格化技能如何被表示为可移植、可修正的包而非不透明的提示或隐性记忆，为人格化AI智能体的知识蒸馏和技能封装提供了实用的端到端工作流。

title: Immuno-VLM: Immunizing Large Vision-Language Models via Generative Semantic Antibodies for Open-World Trustworthiness
summary: Large Vision-Language Models have achieved unprecedented success in zero-shot recognition by aligning visual features with broad semantic concepts. However, this semantic abstraction creates a critical vulnerability in open-world deployment: the ``Hubris of Semantics'', where models force-fit unknown anomalies into known categories with high confidence due to the lack of explicit negative knowledge. To address this \textit{Open-World Trustworthiness Paradox}, we propose \textbf{Immuno-VLM}, a bio-inspired framework that adapts the biological principle of \textbf{Immunological Negative Selection} to high-dimensional latent spaces. Departing from traditional Open-Set Recognition methods that rely on passive density estimation or inefficient pixel-space outlier generation, Immuno-VLM leverages the generative reasoning of Large Language Models to actively hallucinate ``Semantic Antibodies'', textual descriptions of near-distribution outliers (e.g., look-alikes, contextual anomalies) that effectively bound the decision space of known classes.Extensive experiments on ImageNet-1K and four challenging OOD benchmarks reveal that Immuno-VLM establishes a new state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: Immuno-VLM 受生物免疫负选择机制启发，通过让大语言模型主动生成“语义抗体”（即近分布异常样本的文本描述）来界定已知类别的决策边界，有效解决了视觉-语言模型在零样本开放世界识别中因缺少负知识而导致的高置信度误判问题，在多个OOD基准上取得了新的最优结果。
AI.motivation: 大规模视觉-语言模型在零样本识别中通过将视觉特征与广泛语义概念对齐取得了巨大成功，但这种语义抽象本质上是将未知异常强制拟合到已知类别中并以高置信度输出，即在开放世界部署中因缺乏显式的负知识导致“语义傲慢”这一关键漏洞，论文将其定义为“开放世界可信悖论”，现有被动密度估计或像素级异常生成方法均难以有效解决。
AI.method: Immuno-VLM 是一个生物启发的框架，将免疫学中的负选择机制适配到高维潜在空间：它利用大语言模型的生成式推理能力主动“幻觉”出语义抗体，即针对已知类别的近分布异常样本（如相似外观、上下文异常等）的文本描述，从而有效地界定已知类别的决策空间，而非依赖被动密度估计或低效的像素级异常样本生成。
AI.result: 在 ImageNet-1K 和四个具有挑战性的开放集检测（OOD）基准上进行的大量实验表明，Immuno-VLM 建立了新的最优性能水平，显著优于现有的开放集识别方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，将生物免疫负选择机制与LLM的生成能力相结合，能够为视觉-语言模型在开放世界中的可信部署提供一种主动式、语义驱动的异常边界约束策略，为开放集识别和OOD检测领域开辟了新的技术路径。

title: PatchWorld: Gradient-Free Optimization of Executable World Models
summary: Text-agent environments are typically modeled as partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs), assuming that the simulator's latent state and transition dynamics are hidden from the agent. Yet little work has examined whether executable code can be induced to serve as a world model for prediction and planning under partial observability. We introduce PatchWorld, a gradient-free framework that turns offline trajectories into executable Python world models through counterexample-guided code repair. Instead of predicting the next observation with a black-box model, PatchWorld induces symbolic belief-state programs whose action updates can be inspected, replayed, and locally patched. Across seven AgentGym environments, PatchWorld-Simple achieves the highest code-based planning score among evaluated methods, reaching 76.4\% macro success in live one-step lookahead while invoking no LLM calls inside the world-model prediction module itself. We further find that a human-specified residual-memory bias improves surface observation fidelity but weakens decision utility. This exposes a tradeoff in executable world models, since improving observation fidelity can come at the expense of action-discriminative dynamics, and vice versa. Code is available at https://github.com/HKBU-KnowComp/PatchWorld.

AI.tldr: PatchWorld提出了一种无梯度框架，通过反例引导的代码修复将离线轨迹转化为可执行的Python世界模型，用于部分可观测文本智能体环境中的预测与规划，在AgentGym的七个环境中达到76.4%的宏平均单步规划成功率且无需在预测模块内调用LLM。
AI.motivation: 在文本智能体环境中，潜状态与转移动态对智能体隐藏，现有工作很少探索能否通过归纳可执行代码来构建用于部分可观测条件下预测与规划的世界模型。
AI.method: PatchWorld是一个无梯度框架，通过反例引导的代码修复将离线轨迹转化为可执行的Python世界模型，核心是归纳符号化的信念状态程序，其动作更新可被检查、重放和局部修补，而非使用黑箱模型预测下一观测。
AI.result: 在AgentGym的七个环境中，PatchWorld-Simple在基于代码的规划评分中达到最高，宏平均单步前瞻成功率为76.4%，且世界模型预测模块内部无需调用LLM；实验还发现，人为指定的残差记忆偏置虽能提升表面观测保真度，但会削弱决策效用。
AI.conclusion: 可执行世界模型中存在观测保真度与动作判别性动力学之间的权衡，改善观测保真度可能以牺牲动作判别性为代价，反之亦然，这为未来基于代码的世界模型设计提供了重要启示。

title: Learning to Adapt: Self-Improving Web Agent via Cognitive-Aware Exploration
summary: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have led to promising progress in web agents. However, existing web agents often rely on handcrafted execution pipelines or expensive expert trajectories, limiting their adaptability to complex, dynamic environments. To address these challenges, we propose SCALE (Self-Cognitive-Aware Learning and Exploration), which leverages three adversarial roles, Selector, Predictor, and Judger to autonomously discover the agent's limitations and expand its cognitive boundaries through environmental exploration. Moreover, we propose SCALE-Hop, a graph exploration strategy that facilitates global planning and helps agents avoid local exploration traps. To further support learning, we construct SCALE-20k, a large-scale dataset collected from 19 real-world websites, containing diverse task types and structured demonstrations generated from SCALE's exploration traces. Experimental results show that our approach significantly improves the performance and generalization of multiple MLLMs in various web environments. Our framework offers a scalable and generalizable solution for building truly autonomous and adaptive web agents.

AI.tldr: SCALE 提出一种基于三个对抗角色（Selector、Predictor、Judger）的自认知学习与探索框架，并结合 SCALE-Hop 图探索策略和 SCALE-20k 数据集，使多模态大语言模型能够自主发现局限、扩展认知边界，显著提升其在复杂网页环境中的表现与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型的网页代理通常依赖手工设计的执行流程或昂贵的专家轨迹数据，导致其在复杂、动态环境中的适应性和可扩展性不足，缺乏自主发现自身局限并主动探索以扩展认知边界的能力。
AI.method: SCALE 框架引入三个对抗角色：Selector（选择器）负责识别代理的薄弱环节，Predictor（预测器）预测执行结果，Judger（评判器）评估预测与实际的偏差，三者协同驱动代理自主探索环境并扩展认知边界。在此基础上，SCALE-Hop 是一种图探索策略，通过全局规划帮助代理避免陷入局部探索陷阱。此外，作者从 19 个真实网站收集多样任务类型构建了 SCALE-20k 大规模数据集，利用 SCALE 的探索轨迹自动生成结构化示范数据以支持后续学习。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SCALE 框架能够显著提升多种多模态大语言模型在多种网页环境中的任务完成性能和泛化能力，证明了该框架相较于依赖手工流程或专家轨迹的传统方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: SCALE 提供了一种可扩展且泛化性强的解决方案，使网页代理能够在无需人工干预或昂贵专家数据的前提下实现真正的自主学习和自适应，为构建自主智能体在复杂动态环境中的应用提供了新的范式。

title: SLAP: The Semantic Least Action Principle for Variational Video-Language Modeling
summary: In the era of Large Video-Language Models (LVLMs), the computational necessity of sparse frame sampling creates a fundamental ``temporal gap'', rendering models blind to critical causal transitions. Existing solutions relying on generative hallucination (e.g., latent diffusion) or autoregressive extrapolation often fail to maintain semantic consistency over long horizons, suffering from object vanishing and energetic instability. We propose a paradigm shift from probabilistic generation to variational mechanics with the \textbf{Semantic Least Action Principle (SLAP)}. Drawing a rigorous isomorphism between classical mechanics and semantic dynamics, we model the latent video trajectory as a path on a Riemannian manifold governed by a Semantic Lagrangian. By formulating the interpolation task as a Boundary Value Problem (BVP) solved via the discrete Euler-Lagrange equations, SLAP naturally enforces object persistence without pixel-level rendering. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our proposed SLAP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出语义最小作用量原理（SLAP），通过将视频潜在轨迹建模为黎曼流形上的力学路径，利用变分力学（离散欧拉-拉格朗日方程）求解边值问题，在不依赖像素级渲染或生成式幻觉的条件下，解决大型视频语言模型中稀疏帧采样导致的因果过渡语义不一致与物体消失问题。
AI.motivation: 大型视频语言模型依赖稀疏帧采样，导致根本性的“时间间隙”，使模型无法感知关键的因果过渡；现有的生成式幻觉（如潜在扩散）和自回归外推方法在长程时间跨度上难以维持语义一致性，存在物体消失和能量不稳定性问题。
AI.method: 论文提出语义最小作用量原理（SLAP），在经典力学与语义动力学之间建立严格的同构关系，将潜在视频轨迹建模为受语义拉格朗日量支配的黎曼流形上的路径；将帧间插值任务形式化为边值问题（BVP），通过离散欧拉-拉格朗日方程求解，从而实现物体持久性约束而无需像素级渲染。
AI.result: 实验结果表明SLAP在视频帧插值任务上有效保持了语义一致性，解决了物体消失和能量不稳定性问题，验证了从概率生成到变分力学这一范式转换的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SLAP通过将视频语义动力学类比为经典力学系统，提供了一种全新的非生成式帧间插值范式，有望为大型视频语言模型在长时序语义理解上带来更稳定和一致的表现，开辟了变分力学与语义建模交叉的研究方向。

title: EMBGuard: Constructing Hazard-Aware Guardrails for Safe Planning in Embodied Agents
summary: MLLM-powered embodied agents deployed in real-world environments encounter physical hazards. However, existing approaches lack explicit mechanisms for identifying hazards and reasoning about action-conditioned risks, leading agents to either miss risky interactions or over-identify risks. To address this, we propose EMBGuard, the first MLLM-based safety guardrail for embodied agents designed to decouple physical risk reasoning from agent policy. By evaluating a (visual observation, action) pair, EMBGuard identifies hazardous configurations and provides natural language explanations of potential risks. Alongside EMBGuard, we contribute EMBHazard, a training dataset of 15.1K action-conditioned pairs, and EMBGuardTest, a benchmark of 329 manually curated real-world scenarios spanning seven physical risk categories. Through compositional variation of hazards and actions, we generate diverse risky and benign scenarios that agents may encounter during planning. Despite its compact size (2B, 4B), EMBGuard achieves performance competitive with proprietary MLLMs (e.g., GPT-5.1, Gemini-2.5-Pro) while significantly reducing the false-positive rates that hinder real-time deployment. We make the code, data, and models publicly available at https://github.com/dongwxxkchoi/EMBGuard

AI.tldr: EMBGuard 是一种基于 MLLM 的具身智能体安全护栏，通过解耦物理风险推理与智能体策略，利用 (视觉观测, 动作) 对评估风险并提供自然语言解释，在 2B/4B 参数规模下达到与 GPT-5.1 等大型专有模型竞争的性能，同时大幅降低误报率。
AI.motivation: 现有 MLLM 驱动的具身智能体在真实环境中面临物理危险，但缺乏识别危险和推理动作条件风险（action-conditioned risks）的显式机制，导致智能体要么忽略危险交互，要么过度识别风险（高误报率），从而阻碍实时部署。
AI.method: 提出 EMBGuard，首个基于 MLLM 的具身智能体安全护栏，通过评估 (视觉观测, 动作) 对来识别危险配置并生成自然语言的风险解释，将物理风险推理与智能体策略解耦；同时构建 EMBHazard 训练数据集（15.1K 动作条件对）和 EMBGuardTest 基准（329 个手工 curated 的真实场景，覆盖 7 类物理风险），并通过组合变化危险与动作来生成多样化的风险/良性场景。
AI.result: EMBGuard（2B/4B 参数）在 EMBGuardTest 基准上取得了与 GPT-5.1、Gemini-2.5-Pro 等大型专有 MLLM 竞争的性能，同时显著降低了误报率（false-positive rates），有利于实时部署。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过显式的动作条件风险推理和与策略的解耦设计，小型 MLLM 安全护栏能够在物理风险识别中达到甚至超越大型专有模型的性能，为具身智能体的安全部署提供了一种高效实用的方案；代码、数据和模型已开源。

title: FAM-Bench: A Multimodal Benchmark for Condition-Aware Food-as-Medicine Reasoning
summary: Food-as-Medicine requires models to reason beyond what a dish is or what nutrition it contains: they must decide whether a concrete food choice is appropriate for a specific health condition. Existing food AI benchmarks primarily evaluate dish recognition, recipe understanding, nutrient estimation, or general nutrition question answering, leaving this health-aware decision layer largely untested. We introduce FAM-Bench, a multi-modal Food-as-Medicine benchmark with 2500 nutrition-expert-verified instances across 13 diet-related health conditions. The benchmark contains two complementary tasks: dish-level suitability assessment, where models judge whether a dish is suitable for a condition from its image and ingredient list, and comparative dish analysis, where models rank four candidate dishes by condition-specific suitability. Both tasks require integrating ingredient evidence, visual preparation cues, and clinical nutrition constraints, providing a standardized testbed for grounded health-aware reasoning in language and vision-language models.

AI.tldr: FAM-Bench 是一个包含2500个营养专家验证实例的多模态基准，用于评估AI模型在13种饮食相关健康状况下基于食材、视觉线索和临床营养约束进行菜肴适宜性判断和比较推理的能力，填补了现有食品AI基准缺乏健康感知决策评估的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有的食品AI基准主要集中在菜肴识别、食谱理解、营养估算或通用营养问答上，缺乏对模型在具体健康条件下评估食物选择是否合适的健康感知决策能力的测试，导致Food-as-Medicine领域缺乏标准化的评估手段。
AI.method: FAM-Bench 包含2500个由营养专家验证的实例，覆盖13种饮食相关健康状况，设计了两项互补任务：菜肴级适宜性评估（模型根据图像和食材列表判断菜肴是否适合特定健康状况）和比较性菜肴分析（模型对四个候选菜肴按条件适宜性进行排序），两项任务均要求整合食材证据、视觉制备线索和临床营养约束。
AI.result: 论文介绍了FAM-Bench的构建过程，但摘要中未提供具体的实验性能指标或定量结果；基准本身包含2500个专家验证实例和13种健康状况，构成了标准化的测试平台。
AI.conclusion: FAM-Bench 为语言模型和视觉-语言模型提供了首个标准化的健康感知推理测试平台，强调模型需要超越简单的菜肴识别或营养估算，实现基于临床营养约束的深层推理，推动了Food-as-Medicine领域AI评估的发展。

title: Text-guided Feature Disentanglement for Cross-modal Gait Recognition
summary: Gait recognition is a biometric technique that identifies individuals based on their walking patterns, offering advantages in long-range, non-intrusive scenarios. However, real-world scenarios often involve heterogeneous sensing modalities such as LiDAR and RGB cameras, making LiDAR-Camera Cross-modal Gait recognition (LCCGR) a critical yet challenging task due to the substantial modality gap between 2D videos and 3D point cloud sequences. To address this challenge, we propose TCFDNet, a Text-guided Cross-modal Feature Disentanglement Network, which leverages modality-aware textual priors as semantic anchors to guide the learning of disentangled modality-shared representations. Specifically, we construct a Gait Modality Text Dictionary (GMTD) using large language models to generate rich semantic descriptions of gait across modalities and viewpoints. A CLIP-based Multi-grained Feature Encoder then aligns visual and textual features within a unified vision-language space. Furthermore, the Text-guided Feature Disentanglement (TFD) module selects the topk matched textual descriptions to reconstruct modality-specific representations and derive modality-shared features via residual decomposition and orthogonality constraints. To mitigate the fragility of the disentangled shared features, we propose a Feature Stability Enhancement (FSE) module, which models spatial and channel-wise correlations to improve feature robustness. In addition, a cross-modal patch exchange strategy is introduced to further improve generalization. Extensive experiments on SUSTech1K and FreeGait datasets demonstrate that TCFDNet achieves new state-of-the-art results and validate the effectiveness of the proposed modules.

AI.tldr: 提出TCFDNet，一种利用文本先验作为语义锚点来引导跨模态特征解耦的网络，在LiDAR-相机跨模态步态识别任务上取得了新的最优结果。
AI.motivation: LiDAR与RGB相机之间存在巨大的模态差异（2D视频与3D点云序列），导致LiDAR-Camera跨模态步态识别（LCCGR）极具挑战性，现有方法难以有效提取跨模态共享的判别性特征。
AI.method: 提出TCFDNet，包含四个核心模块：首先构建Gait Modality Text Dictionary（GMTD），利用大语言模型生成跨模态多视角的语义描述；然后通过CLIP多粒度特征编码器将视觉与文本特征对齐到统一空间；接着利用Text-guided Feature Disentanglement（TFD）模块选择topk匹配文本重构模态特定特征并通过残差分解与正交约束提取模态共享特征；最后通过Feature Stability Enhancement（FSE）模块建模空间和通道相关性以增强解耦共享特征的鲁棒性，并引入跨模态patch交换策略以提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在SUSTech1K和FreeGait数据集上的大量实验表明，TCFDNet达到了新的最优性能，且消融实验验证了各提出模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 利用大语言模型生成模态相关的文本先验作为语义锚点，能够有效引导跨模态特征解耦，为异构感知数据下的步态识别提供了新的解决思路。

title: MineExplorer: Evaluating Open-World Exploration of MLLM Agents in Minecraft
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong capabilities in perception, reasoning, and action generation. However, their ability to sustain exploration in dynamic open worlds remains unclear. Existing embodied and game-based benchmarks often compress interaction into short-horizon tasks or entangle success with domain-specific game mechanics. In this paper, we introduce MineExplorer benchmark for evaluating open-world exploration capabilities of MLLM agents in Minecraft. We first filter atomic tasks whose solutions rely heavily on Minecraft-specific knowledge to better reflect general open-world reasoning. Then we organize the benchmark around a ReAct-style capability formulation and compose atomic tasks into implicit multi-hop tasks. To further construct reliable instances, MineExplorer uses a multi-agent synthesis workflow that jointly designs task graphs, sandbox scenes, and rule-based milestone evaluators. Human evaluation shows that the multi-agent synthesis workflow produces significantly more reliable instances than a single-agent baseline. Experiments with advanced MLLM agents show that open-world exploration remains challenging, as strong models can handle many single-hop tasks but degrade sharply when hidden prerequisites must be coordinated over longer trajectories. Further analysis finds that task difficulty tracks agent completion, and larger models or thinking modes do not consistently translate into better performance. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/Jometeorie/MineExplorer.

AI.tldr: MineExplorer是一个基于Minecraft的开放世界探索基准，通过多智能体合成流程构建可靠的多跳推理任务实例，实验表明现有MLLM在单跳任务上表现良好但在需要长程协调隐藏前提的多跳任务中性能急剧下降。
