AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在感知、推理和动作生成方面表现强劲，但其在动态开放世界中持续探索的能力尚不明确；已有的具身和游戏基准通常将交互压缩为短视任务，或将成功与特定领域游戏机制纠缠，无法有效评估开放世界探索能力。
AI.method: 论文提出MineExplorer基准，首先过滤掉依赖Minecraft特定知识的原子任务以更好反映通用开放世界推理；然后围绕ReAct风格的能力公式组织基准并将原子任务组合为隐式多跳任务；采用多智能体合成工作流联合设计任务图、沙盒场景和基于规则的里程碑评估器以构建可靠实例。
AI.result: 人工评估表明多智能体合成工作流比单智能体基线产生显著更可靠的实例；实验显示开放世界探索仍具有挑战性，强模型能处理许多单跳任务但在需要长程协调隐藏前提时性能急剧下降；任务难度与智能体完成率相关，更大模型或推理模式并不一致地带来更好性能。
AI.conclusion: MineExplorer为评估MLLM的开放世界探索能力提供了可靠基准，揭示了当前模型在长程多跳推理和前提协调方面的根本局限，为未来研究指明了方向。

title: Answer-Set-Programming-based Abstractions for Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted for publication at the 42nd International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP 2026). To appear in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) enables autonomous agents to learn policies from experience, but realistic problems often involve enormous state spaces, making learning and generalisation challenging. Abstraction and approximation are therefore essential. Relational Reinforcement Learning (RRL) offers a way to reason about objects and their relations, and the CARCASS framework by Martijn van Otterlo demonstrates how logical representations can model Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) in first-order domains. Originally implemented in Prolog, CARCASS leverages domain knowledge to create powerful abstractions. We explore Answer-Set Programming (ASP), which is a rich and, contrary to Prolog, fully declarative modelling language, to realise CARCASS abstractions. We evaluate our ASP-based implementation in case studies of two domains, viz. Blocks World and Minigrid. Our results indicate that CARCASS with ASP provides a promising approach to constructing abstractions for RL, especially when domain knowledge is available.

AI.tldr: 该论文探索使用回答集编程（ASP）替代Prolog来实现CARCASS框架中的关系强化学习抽象，实验表明该方法在具备领域知识时能有效构建用于强化学习的状态抽象。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在处理巨大状态空间时面临学习与泛化困难，关系强化学习（RRL）通过对象及其关系推理来构建抽象，但原始的CARCASS框架基于Prolog实现，而Prolog并非完全声明式语言，限制了抽象的表达和推理能力。
AI.method: 论文采用回答集编程（ASP）——一种完全声明式的建模语言——来重新实现CARCASS框架中的逻辑抽象机制，利用ASP丰富的知识表示能力对马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）进行一阶逻辑建模，并在Blocks World和Minigrid两个领域上进行案例评估。
AI.result: 在Blocks World和Minigrid两个领域的案例研究中，基于ASP的CARCASS实现成功构建了有效的状态抽象，验证了ASP替代Prolog用于关系强化学习抽象的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，ASP作为一种完全声明式的建模语言，在实现CARCASS框架的抽象机制方面比Prolog更具优势，为具备领域知识的强化学习场景提供了一种有前景的抽象构建方法，尤其适用于需要复杂逻辑推理的关系强化学习任务。

title: Function2Scene: 3D Indoor Scene Layout from Functional Specifications
summary: Most text-driven 3D indoor scene synthesis methods generate rooms from object-centric prompts, asking what furniture should be placed rather than how the space is used. Yet in real interior design, a layout is judged by how well it supports its occupants, e.g., their activities and physical needs. We introduce Function2Scene, a framework for generating 3D indoor layouts from functional specifications, i.e., natural-language design briefs describing who will use a room and what they need to do there. Given such a specification, our system parses occupant personas and activities, derives a customized set of functional design constraints from a taxonomy of 17 criteria spanning spatial, ergonomic, activity, and environmental considerations, and uses these constraints to guide layout generation. Rather than relying on an LLM to directly produce a final scene, Function2Scene performs iterative evaluation and refinement through a tool-augmented check-and-repair loop, combining geometric measurements, LLM-based contextual reasoning, and VLM-based visual assessment. Experiments on 30 professionally written interior-design cases show that Function2Scene produces layouts that better satisfy functional requirements than recent LLM-based scene synthesis baselines, with our results preferred in 94.3% of pairwise comparisons. Our work reframes text-driven indoor scene synthesis from placing plausible objects to designing spaces that support human use.

AI.tldr: Function2Scene提出了一种从功能规范（自然语言设计简报）生成3D室内布局的框架，通过解析用户角色与活动、从17条设计准则中推导功能约束，并利用工具增强的检查-修复循环迭代优化布局，在30个专业室内设计案例中以94.3%的偏好率优于现有LLM基线方法，将文本驱动的室内场景合成从放置合理物体转向设计支持人类使用的空间。
AI.motivation: 现有文本驱动的3D室内场景合成方法大多基于以物体为中心的提示，关注“应放置什么家具”而非“空间如何被使用”，但在真实室内设计中布局优劣取决于其对居住者活动与物理需求的支持程度，现有方法缺乏从功能需求出发生成合理布局的能力。
AI.method: Function2Scene框架首先解析自然语言设计简报中的居住者角色与活动信息，从涵盖空间、人体工效学、活动与环境方面的17条设计准则中推导出一组定制化的功能设计约束；随后通过工具增强的检查-修复循环进行迭代评估与优化，该循环结合了几何测量、LLM的上下文推理和VLM的视觉评估，而非直接依赖LLM一次性生成最终场景。
AI.result: 在30个专业编写的室内设计案例上的实验表明，Function2Scene生成的布局在满足功能需求方面优于最近的基于LLM的场景合成基线方法，在成对比较中94.3%的情况下被偏好选择。
AI.conclusion: 该研究重新定义了文本驱动的室内场景合成任务——从放置合理的物体转向设计支持人类使用的空间，证明了将功能约束显式建模并与迭代评估-修复机制相结合可以有效提升布局的功能合理性，为面向需求驱动的智能室内设计提供了新范式。

title: Extending AI for Research to the Humanities: A Multi-Agent Framework for Evidence-Grounded Scholarship
comment: 28 pages, 3 figures. Code, data catalogues, and reproduction scripts: https://github.com/YatingPan/SPIRE. Lead corresponding author: Jun Wang; corresponding author: Qi Su
summary: LLM-based research agents have advanced rapidly in science and engineering, where research is organized around executable experiments, code, and quantitative signals. Humanities scholarship, however, requires a different mode of reasoning: interpretive, evidence-grounded argument over primary sources, where scholarly value depends on faithful quotation, verifiable provenance, and close reading. Existing research agents remain largely optimized for execution and retrieval, not evidence-grounded interpretive reasoning. To address this gap, we introduce SPIRE (Scholarly-Primitives-Inspired Research Engine), a multi-agent framework for evidence-grounded humanities scholarship. Drawing on Scholarly Primitives theory, SPIRE casts recurring humanities operations as cooperating agent roles (source discovery, evidence annotation, comparison, provenance checking, sampling, citation binding, and argumentative synthesis) over a multi-scale close-reading substrate of passages, intra-context graph communities, and cross-context semantic clusters. On a peer-reviewed-paper benchmark over classical Chinese and Greco-Roman Latin scholarship, SPIRE recovers cited primary-source evidence more reliably than Naive LLM, Text RAG, and GraphRAG, and receives higher blind-judge scores on answer accuracy, depth, coverage, and evidence quality. Ablations show that both the scholarly-operation agents and close-reading retrieval contribute to evidence-grounded essays. Code, data catalogues, and reproduction scripts are released at https://github.com/YatingPan/SPIRE.

AI.tldr: SPIRE是一个基于学术原语理论的多智能体框架，通过将人文学科研究中的核心操作（源发现、证据标注、比较、溯源检查、采样、引文绑定和论证综合）建模为协作智能体角色，并在多尺度细读基底上运行，显著提升了基于LLM的研究智能体在古典中文和希腊-罗马拉丁文学术研究中引证主要来源证据的可靠性与论证质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的研究智能体主要针对科学和工程领域优化，擅长执行可重复实验、代码和定量信号驱动的推理，但人文学科研究依赖于另一种推理模式——对原始资料进行基于证据的阐释性论证，要求忠实引用、可验证的来源出处和细读。现有智能体在证据扎根的阐释性推理方面存在明显不足，缺乏针对人文学术研究范式设计的框架。
AI.method: SPIRE框架以学术原语理论为基础，将人文学科研究的重复性操作分解为七个协作智能体角色：源发现、证据标注、比较、溯源检查、采样、引文绑定和论证综合。该框架构建了一个多尺度细读基底，包含段落级、上下文内图社区和跨上下文语义聚类三个层次，使智能体能够在不同粒度上理解和关联原始文本。系统通过智能体间的协作完成从证据检索到论证合成的完整流程。
AI.result: 在古典中文和希腊-罗马拉丁文学术研究的同行评审论文基准上，SPIRE在恢复引用的主要来源证据方面优于Naive LLM、Text RAG和GraphRAG基线方法。在盲评中，SPIRE在答案准确性、深度、覆盖范围和证据质量四个维度上均获得更高的评分。消融实验表明，学术操作智能体和细读检索组件对生成基于证据的论证均有独立且显著的贡献。
AI.conclusion: SPIRE验证了将学术原语理论引入LLM智能体设计可以有效桥接计算化研究智能体与人文学科证据扎根推理需求之间的鸿沟。该工作表明，针对特定学科认知模式设计的多智能体协作框架能够显著提升生成内容的学术严谨性，为人文学科计算化研究提供了可行的范式，其代码和数据已开源以促进后续研究。

title: AutoSci: A Memory-Centric Agentic System for the Full Scientific Research Lifecycle
summary: Scientific research has traditionally been human-intensive, requiring researchers to coordinate literature, ideas, experiments, manuscripts, and review responses across long project cycles. The rise of LLM-based scientific agents creates an opportunity to automate this process. Such a system must support the full research lifecycle, maintain structured persistent memory across projects, and improve its own research procedures over time. However, existing systems either partially satisfy or fail to satisfy these requirements, leaving a gap for a unified automated scientific research system. As a result, we present AutoSci, a memory-centric agentic system for the full scientific research lifecycle. AutoSci is organized around four modules. SciMem provides schema-governed research memory, separating Long-Term Knowledge Memory for reusable scientific knowledge from Active Research Memory for project-level artifacts such as ideas, experiments, manuscripts, and reviews. SciFlow executes a five-stage lifecycle from literature understanding to rebuttal through a harness that controls state, context, verification, feedback, and orchestration. SciDAG augments difficult skills with DAG-shaped multi-agent operators and reusable stage-specific templates. SciEvolve converts feedback signals from users, experiments, reviews, and external environments into versioned updates to SciMem organization, SciFlow skills, and SciDAG templates. Together, these modules make AutoSci a persistent research environment that can execute, remember, and evolve across research projects. The code repository is available at https://github.com/skyllwt/AutoSci.

AI.tldr: AutoSci 是一个面向完整科研生命周期的、以记忆为中心的智能体系统，通过四个核心模块（SciMem、SciFlow、SciDAG、SciEvolve）实现从文献理解到 rebuttal 的自动化，并具备跨项目的持久记忆与自我进化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的科学智能体系统未能同时满足对完整科研生命周期支持、结构化持久记忆维护以及自身研究流程持续改进这三个关键需求，存在功能覆盖不完整或缺乏统一架构的空白。
AI.method: AutoSci 围绕四个模块组织：SciMem 提供受模式约束的研究记忆，将可复用的科学知识（长期知识记忆）与项目级制品（活跃研究记忆）分离；SciFlow 通过控制状态、上下文、验证、反馈与编排的五阶段生命周期引擎（从文献理解到 rebuttal）执行科研流程；SciDAG 以有向无环图形状的多智能体算子与可复用的阶段特定模板增强复杂技能；SciEvolve 将来自用户、实验、审稿及外部环境的反馈信号转化为对 SciMem 组织、SciFlow 技能与 SciDAG 模板的版本化更新。
AI.result: 论文未在摘要中报告具体的定量实验结果或基准性能指标，但指出 AutoSci 作为一个持久化研究环境，能够跨研究项目执行、记忆并进化，其代码已开源于 GitHub 仓库。
AI.conclusion: AutoSci 提出了一种统一的、记忆中心的智能体系统架构，首次将完整科研生命周期的自动化、结构化持久记忆与自进化机制整合在同一框架中，为构建全自动科学发现系统提供了系统性的设计范式与可行的实现路径。

title: Count Anything
summary: Object counting remains fragmented across domain-specific datasets and task formulations, despite rapid progress in generalist vision models. Existing counting models are often tailored to scenarios such as crowds, vehicles, cells, crops, or remote-sensing objects, and thus struggle to generalize across categories, visual domains, object scales, and density distributions. In this paper, we study text-guided object counting across domains, where a model takes an image and a natural-language query as input and returns an instance-grounded set of target points whose cardinality gives the count. This formulation unifies category-conditioned counting with interpretable spatial localization. To support this setting, we construct CLOC, a Cross-domain Large-scale Object Counting dataset that reorganizes diverse public data sources into a unified benchmark. CLOC covers six visual domains: General Scene, Remote Sensing, Histopathology, Cellular Microscopy, Agriculture, and Microbiology, with about 220K images, 619 categories, and 15M object instances. Based on CLOC, we propose Count Anything, a generalist model for text-guided object counting. Unlike density-map-based methods, which dominate counting models, Count Anything adopts discrete instance points and performs dual-granularity instance enumeration. A Region-level Sparse Counter provides object-level anchors for large and sparse targets, while a Pixel-level Dense Counter handles small, crowded, and weakly bounded targets via dense point prediction. A point-centric supervision strategy enables learning from heterogeneous annotations, and Complementary Count Fusion combines both counters in a parameter-free manner. Extensive experiments show that Count Anything achieves strong accuracy and multi-domain generalization, outperforming existing open-world counting methods. Code is available at: https://github.com/Mengqi-Lei/count-anything.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLOC跨域大规模物体计数数据集和Count Anything通用模型，通过文本引导的实例点计数统一了多领域、多类别的物体计数任务，在多种视觉域上取得了优于现有开放世界计数方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有物体计数模型高度碎片化，通常针对特定领域（如人群、车辆、细胞、农作物、遥感目标）和特定任务范式设计，难以跨类别、视觉域、目标尺度和密度分布泛化，缺乏统一的文本引导计数基准和通用解决方案。
AI.method: 本文构建了CLOC数据集，涵盖通用场景、遥感、组织病理、细胞显微、农业和微生物六大视觉域，包含约22万张图像、619个类别、1500万个实例。提出Count Anything模型，采用离散实例点而非密度图表示，通过区域级稀疏计数器（Region-level Sparse Counter）提供大尺度稀疏目标的对象级锚点，以及像素级稠密计数器（Pixel-level Dense Counter）通过密集点预测处理小尺度、拥挤和弱边界目标，并设计点中心监督策略和参数无关的互补计数融合（Complementary Count Fusion）机制。
AI.result: 在CLOC基准上的大量实验表明，Count Anything在准确性和多域泛化能力上表现优异，全面超越现有开放世界计数方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过统一的数据基准和双粒度实例枚举架构，证明了文本引导的跨域物体计数是可行且有效的，为构建通用物体计数模型提供了新范式，并为未来研究提供了标准化评估平台。

title: EvoGens: A Population-Based Heuristic Search Framework for Scientific Idea Generation
summary: Generating novel research ideas is fundamental to scientific progress. While Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise in assisting this process, existing approaches often exhibit semantic convergence, resulting in limited diversity and novelty. To address this, we introduce EvoGens, an evolution-inspired framework that recasts scientific idea generation as an evolutionary search over a population of ideas. EvoGens iteratively applies rank-based mutation with differentiated retrieval planning to incorporate external knowledge, and semantic-aware crossover to fuse complementary concepts for conceptual reorganization. A lightweight evaluation signal guides the selection process, encouraging sustained exploration while mitigating premature convergence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EvoGens substantially enhances exploration capabilities compared to state-of-the-art baselines. Specifically, it improves the Novelty from 0.1 to 0.4 and the Diversity from 0.24 to 0.55, while maintaining comparable idea quality under the current automatic evaluation protocol. These findings suggest that evolutionary mechanisms can serve as a useful framework for exploration-oriented research ideation, especially for broadening the novelty and diversity of candidate ideas under a shared automatic evaluation setting.

AI.tldr: EvoGens提出了基于进化搜索的科学想法生成框架，通过排名变异、差异化检索规划和语义感知交叉等进化机制，显著提升了想法的新颖性和多样性，在自动评估协议下将Novelty从0.1提升至0.4、Diversity从0.24提升至0.55，同时保持了可比的想法质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大型语言模型（LLM）的科学想法生成方法存在语义趋同问题，导致生成的想法在多样性和新颖性方面受限，难以有效支持探索性的研究构思过程。
AI.method: EvoGens将科学想法生成重新建模为对想法种群的进化搜索过程，迭代执行三个核心操作：基于排名的变异结合差异化检索规划以融入外部知识、语义感知交叉以融合互补概念实现概念重组、以及利用轻量级评估信号引导选择以鼓励持续探索并缓解过早收敛。
AI.result: 在自动评估协议下，相比当前最先进基线方法，EvoGens将Novelty从0.1提升至0.4、Diversity从0.24提升至0.55，同时在想法质量方面维持了可比的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 进化机制可作为面向探索的研究构思的有效框架，尤其在共享自动评估设定下能够显著拓宽候选想法的新颖性和多样性，为提升LLM辅助科学创新的探索能力提供了新途径。

title: Choosing the Lens: Strategic Perspective Activation in Context-Dependent Argumentation
comment: Accepted to LAMAS&SR workshop at FLoC 2026
summary: The same arguments often need to be evaluated under different external regimes. An agent with influence over the regime has a strategic lever that standard formalisms do not directly capture. We introduce context-dependent argumentation frameworks (CDAFs), an extension of Dung's theory in which a defeat function determines, per context, which attacks succeed. A perspective-labeled specialisation derives the defeat function from a relevance set $ρ$ and a priority $π$. The relevance set is the agent's action space. In a small worked example, the agent's target argument is rejected under every full-relevance injective priority, yet accepted under partial activations, one of which no VAF audience can mirror. We define the corresponding decision problem, ACTIVATION-MANIPULATION, and record baseline complexity bounds. Tight bounds and multi-agent variants are left open.

AI.tldr: 本文提出上下文依赖论证框架（CDAFs），将Dung经典理论扩展为攻击关系随上下文动态变化的形式化系统，并通过视角标记特化方法从相关性集和优先级导出击败函数，揭示了在部分激活下可通过操纵上下文使原本被拒绝的目标论证被接受。
AI.motivation: 经典Dung论证框架及其扩展（如VAF）无法建模外部环境（上下文）对攻击关系的影响，也未考虑智能体通过主动改变外部条件来影响论证接受状态的策略性行为，存在表达力和操控性分析的双重不足。
AI.method: 提出上下文依赖论证框架（CDAFs），通过一个击败函数（defeat function）为每个上下文指定哪些攻击关系有效；进一步提出视角标记特化方法，从相关性集ρ（智能体的行动空间）和优先级π导出该击败函数，构建层次化结构以刻画智能体对局部论证激活的操控能力。
AI.result: 在小型示例中，目标论证在所有全相关性单射优先级下均被拒绝，但在部分激活设置下被接受，且其中一种部分激活模式是任何VAF观众（audience）都无法模拟的；定义了ACTIVATION-MANIPULATION决策问题并记录了其基准复杂性下界，严格上下界及多智能体变体留待后续研究。
AI.conclusion: CDAFs比VAF具有更强的表达力，能够捕获VAF无法模拟的论证操控模式；将ACTIVATION-MANIPULATION问题的复杂性分析作为开放问题提出，并指出多智能体场景是未来重要研究方向。

title: Foundation VAEs for 3D CT Reconstruction, Augmentation, and Generation
summary: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) compress high resolution CT volumes into compact latents while preserving clinically relevant structure. However, training CT-specific VAEs from scratch or heavily fine-tuning them incurs substantial computational and engineering cost, and often degrades under heterogeneous scanners, protocols, and diseases. This paper makes a progressive stride toward training-free medical VAEs by leveraging a critical observation: a single Foundation VAE, pretrained at scale on natural images and videos, can serve as a unified interface for CT Reconstruction, Augmentation, and Generation. With both encoder and decoder frozen, the Foundation VAE reconstructs CT volumes with preserved anatomy while suppressing acquisition noise; training segmentation models on these reconstructions improves surface accuracy by 3.9% NSD on average for pancreatic tumor and lung tumor. Within the same Foundation VAE latent space, a conditional latent diffusion model achieves 3.9% lower average FVD with 36.2% higher CT CLIP score, and improves multi-disease generation faithfulness across 18 types by 2.76% AUC. These results demonstrate Foundation VAEs as a practical interface for scalable CT representation reuse and faithful CT generation. Our code and demo are available at https://github.com/qic999/Foundation-VAE.

AI.tldr: 本文发现一个关键现象：预训练于自然图像和视频的Foundation VAE，其编码器和解码器均可冻结，直接作为CT重建、增强和生成的统一接口，无需训练或微调即可在医学影像任务中取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的CT专用VAE需要从零训练或大量微调，计算和工程成本高昂，且在不同扫描仪、协议和疾病条件下性能容易退化。如何在不进行额外训练的前提下，实现CT体积的高效表征复用和生成，是一个重要的研究空白。
AI.method: 本文直接使用预训练于自然图像和视频的Foundation VAE，保持编码器和解码器均冻结，将其作为CT重建、增强和生成的统一接口。在生成方面，基于该VAE的潜在空间训练条件潜在扩散模型（conditional latent diffusion model），实现CT体积的忠实生成。
AI.result: 在CT重建任务中，皮肤表面准确度平均提升3.9% NSD（胰脏肿瘤和肺肿瘤分割）。在生成任务中，条件潜在扩散模型在平均FVD上降低3.9%，CT CLIP得分提升36.2%，跨18种疾病的多疾病生成忠实度提升2.76% AUC。
AI.conclusion: Foundation VAE可以作为实用的统一接口，实现可扩展的CT表征复用和忠实生成，大幅降低了医学影像中VAE使用的工程和计算门槛，为训练免费的医学VAE迈出了重要一步。

title: TRACE: Discovering Task-Specific Parameter via Adaptation-Aware Probing for Continual Fine-Tuning
summary: In real-world deployment, LLMs are often adapted continually across tasks to keep LLMs up-to-date in production, where new fine-tuning should preserve previously learned skills. However, indiscriminately mixing tasks can dilute task specialization, while sequential fine-tuning (full-parameter or low rank adaptation) often causes catastrophic forgetting due to destructive overwriting. Replay-based continual tuning and maintaining separate task-specific adapters can mitigate forgetting, but introduce additional compute, storage, and management overhead. Recognizing the redundancy of LLM parameters for any single task, we reframe continual task adaptation as task-specific parameter discovery via adaptation-aware probing: a short warm-start probe exposes a task's adaptation trace, enabling us to identify and isolate the small subset of parameters essential for each task to mitigate catastrophic forgetting. Building on this view, we introduce TRACE, a novel approach for discovering Task-specific paRameters via Adaptation-aware probing for Continual finE-tuning. We perform a short warm-start fine-tune to derive task-specific core parameters by comparing the warm-started and pre-trained models. Core parameters are identified via two strategies: importance scoring (L$_2$ norm and Fisher Information) and specificity analysis (cosine similarity of parameter updates). In continual fine-tuning settings, only the active task's core parameters are updated while others remain frozen, preserving prior knowledge. We conduct extensive experiments across multiple standard benchmarks to demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed method. Additionally, we validate the generalization of our method through a cross-model and scale transferability study, demonstrating a "small-to-large" paradigm that guides the fine-tuning of large-scale models under resource constraints.

AI.tldr: TRACE 提出一种基于适应感知探测的任务特定参数发现方法，通过短时预热微调识别核心参数并在连续微调中仅更新活跃任务的核心参数，从而在无需额外存储或计算开销的情况下有效缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: LLM在实际部署中常需跨任务连续微调以保持时效性，但混合任务会稀释任务专化，而顺序微调（全参数或LoRA）因破坏性覆盖导致灾难性遗忘；基于回放的连续调优和维护独立任务适配器虽可缓解遗忘，却引入了额外的计算、存储和管理开销。
AI.method: TRACE 通过对比预热微调模型与预训练模型来发现任务特定核心参数，核心参数识别采用两种策略：基于 L2 范数和 Fisher Information 的重要性评分，以及基于参数更新余弦相似度的特异性分析；在连续微调中仅更新当前活跃任务的核心参数，其余参数保持冻结以保留先前知识。
AI.result: 在多个标准基准上的大量实验表明 TRACE 性能优越；跨模型与跨规模的迁移性研究验证了该方法在资源受限条件下指导大规模模型微调的“小到大”范式。
AI.conclusion: TRACE 利用 LLM 参数在单任务下的冗余性，通过适应感知探测实现无额外开销的连续微调，有效缓解灾难性遗忘，并展示了从较小模型到较大模型的知识迁移可行性。

title: What Makes LVLMs Hallucinate Less? Unveiling the Architectural Factors Behind Hallucination Robustness
summary: Hallucination remains one of the key challenges undermining the reliability of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). But what makes an LVLM hallucinate less? Many existing efforts focus on improving internal components of the model. We argue that hallucination fundamentally stems from how the model architecture is designed. To investigate this, we factor the architecture design into three dimensions: Linguistic Foundation (LF), Visual Representation (VR), and Semantic Alignment (SA), and categorize hallucinations into Co-occurrence, Similarity, and previously overlooked Uncertainty types. Building on this formulation, we propose CoSimUE, a benchmark that creates fine-grained hallucination scenarios through controlled textual perturbations and random perturbations, enabling mapping between design choices and hallucination behaviors. Experiments across 7 design aspects show that: 1) the widely emphasized scaling of model parameters has only limited impact on reducing all three types of hallucinations; 2) larger and better-trained language foundations can reduce co-occurrence hallucinations; 3) stronger visual encoders and higher resolutions mitigate similarity errors; 4) effective alignment strategies alleviate uncertainty hallucinations. 5) Furthermore, cross-dimensional analysis reveals that jointly enhancing visual fidelity and alignment quality yields the most comprehensive improvements. This study provides the first systematic exploration linking architecture-level design to hallucination robustness, offering practical guidance for developing reliable and efficient LVLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统地将LVLM架构设计分解为语言基础、视觉表示和语义对齐三个维度，并提出CoSimUE基准，通过细粒度幻觉场景映射设计选择与幻觉行为，发现模型参数规模对减少幻觉作用有限，而联合增强视觉质量和对齐质量能带来最全面的改进。
AI.motivation: 现有减轻大视觉语言模型（LVLM）幻觉的工作多聚焦于改进模型内部组件，但缺乏从架构设计层面系统理解幻觉成因的研究。本文旨在探究架构设计如何从根本上影响LVLM的幻觉行为，并厘清不同设计维度与特定幻觉类型之间的关联。
AI.method: 本文将LVLM架构设计分解为三个维度：语言基础（LF）、视觉表示（VR）和语义对齐（SA），并将幻觉分为共现型、相似型和不确定性型三类。提出CoSimUE基准，通过受控文本扰动和随机扰动构建细粒度幻觉场景，从而建立设计选择与幻觉行为之间的映射关系。
AI.result: 在7个设计维度上的实验表明：1）模型参数规模扩大对减少三类幻觉的影响有限；2）更大且预训练更好的语言基础可减少共现型幻觉；3）更强的视觉编码器和更高分辨率可减少相似型幻觉；4）有效的对齐策略可减少不确定性型幻觉；5）跨维度分析显示，联合增强视觉质量和语义对齐质量能带来最全面的改进。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次系统探索了架构级设计与LVLM幻觉鲁棒性之间的关系，指出参数扩大并非缓解幻觉的万能手段，而视觉表示质量和语义对齐质量的协同提升才是关键。为开发可靠高效的LVLM提供了实用指导，也启发了未来在架构层面设计抗幻觉模型的研究方向。

title: AdaptR1: Reinforcement Learning Based Adaptive Interleaved Thinking in Multi-hop Question Answering
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable performance in complex reasoning tasks through Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting. However, this approach often leads to ``over-thinking,'' where models generate unnecessarily long reasoning traces for simple queries and incur avoidable inference cost. While recent work has explored adaptive reasoning, existing methods typically make a single query-level decision about whether to reason. This overlooks the dynamic nature of multi-step tasks, where the need for explicit reasoning varies across intermediate stages. To address this limitation, we introduce AdaptR1, a Reinforcement Learning (RL) based framework for adaptive interleaved thinking in multi-hop Question Answering (QA). Unlike previous approaches that require Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for cold-start initialization, AdaptR1 uses a fully RL-based strategy with a quality-gated efficiency reward to dynamically allocate reasoning budgets at each step. Under the Graph-R1 setting, AdaptR1 reduces average think tokens by 69.71\%, with a 90.35\% reduction on HotpotQA, while maintaining performance comparable to or better than standard baselines. Furthermore, our analysis reveals that overthinking in multi-hop reasoning is not uniformly distributed but occurs predominantly during the initial planning stages, highlighting the effectiveness of step-wise adaptive budget allocation.

AI.tldr: AdaptR1 提出了一种基于强化学习的自适应交错推理框架，在多跳问答中通过质量门控效率奖励逐步骤动态分配推理预算，在保持性能的同时将平均思考令牌数减少 69.71%。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型推理方法（如 CoT）存在"过度思考"问题，即对简单查询产生不必要长的推理轨迹；而现有的自适应推理方法仅做查询级别的单一决策，忽略了多步骤任务中不同中间阶段对显式推理需求的动态变化。
AI.method: AdaptR1 是一个基于强化学习的自适应交错推理框架，采用完全 RL 策略（无需 SFT 冷启动），通过质量门控效率奖励（quality-gated efficiency reward）在每步中间阶段动态分配推理预算，在 Graph-R1 设置下实现步骤级别的自适应推理控制。
AI.result: 在 Graph-R1 设置下，AdaptR1 将平均思考令牌减少 69.71%，其中在 HotpotQA 上减少 90.35%，同时性能与标准基线相当或更优；分析还发现多跳推理中的过度思考并非均匀分布，主要发生在初始规划阶段。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了多跳推理中过度思考的非均匀分布特性，验证了步骤级别自适应预算分配的有效性，为构建更高效的大语言模型推理系统提供了新思路。

title: Attend to Evidence: Evidence-Anchored Spatial Attention Supervision for Multimodal RLVR
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) improves vision-language models (VLMs) by optimizing outcome rewards derived from final answers. However, such outcome-only rewards do not tell the model which image regions justify an answer. For questions that require visual grounding, these rewards cannot distinguish responses supported by relevant visual evidence from those produced by language-prior shortcuts or lucky guesses. We introduce EASE (Evidence-Anchored Spatial Attention), which augments multimodal RLVR with visual-evidence process supervision. EASE converts annotated evidence regions into a smoothed visual-token target and uses it to guide response-to-image attention during RL training, but only on high-reward trajectories. The annotations are used solely as privileged training labels, while inference requires only the original image and question. Across Qwen2.5-VL-7B, Qwen3-VL-4B, and Qwen3-VL-8B, EASE raises average scores over DAPO by 2.5 to 3.1 points on perception, hallucination, visual math, and multimodal reasoning benchmarks. Diagnostics and ablations show that EASE better aligns visual attention with annotated evidence regions.

AI.tldr: EASE通过将标注的视觉证据区域转化为平滑的视觉令牌注意力目标，在强化学习训练中引导模型关注关键图像区域，从而在无需推理阶段额外标注的情况下显著提升多模态强化学习在视觉定位、幻觉抑制和推理任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）仅依赖最终答案的奖励信号，无法区分模型是基于视觉证据作答还是依赖语言先验或运气猜测，尤其对于需要视觉定位的问题，缺乏对"哪些图像区域支持答案"的过程监督信号。
AI.method: EASE（Evidence-Anchored Spatial Attention）在RLVR框架中引入视觉证据过程监督：将标注的证据区域转化为平滑的视觉令牌注意力目标分布，仅在奖励较高的轨迹上利用该目标引导模型响应到图像的注意力分布，训练后推理阶段无需额外标注，仅需原始图像和问题。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B、Qwen3-VL-4B和Qwen3-VL-8B上，EASE相比DAPO在感知、幻觉、视觉数学和多模态推理等多个基准上平均提升2.5至3.1分，诊断和消融实验表明其注意力分布与标注证据区域的对齐程度显著优于基线。
AI.conclusion: EASE证明了通过将视觉证据的过程监督信号注入RL训练可以在不增加推理开销的前提下显著提升VLM的视觉定位能力和答案可靠性，为多模态RLVR提供了一种轻量且有效的注意力引导范式。

title: Not All Synthetic Data Is Yours to Learn From
summary: Can a language model improve from plain text sampled from itself, with no prompts, no teacher, no verifier, and no reward model? Yes, but only when the synthetic corpus is compatible with the student, a relational property of the source-student pair rather than an intrinsic property of the data. We call this the latent capability resurfacing hypothesis: weak self-training can amplify capabilities already present in the pretrained model, but only under this compatibility condition. We study this in the minimal setting of prompt-free unconditional self-training, where base language models are fine-tuned on text generated from the BOS token alone, with no task specification or external supervision. We report three findings. First, synthetic utility is relational rather than intrinsic: self-generated data is the most effective source, same-lineage transfer outperforms stronger but differently trained sources, and cross-family transfer is substantially weaker. Second, common intrinsic proxies fail: neither benchmark-level semantic similarity nor average per-token likelihood under the student predicts which corpora help. Third, this regime produces a surprising byproduct. In controlled Pythia experiments, capability and verbatim memorization decouple: benchmark utility is preserved or improved while held-out exact-match extraction drops by over 95 percent, with no forget set, privacy objective, or targeted unlearning. Together, these results suggest that prompt-free self-training works by amplifying what the student already knows, not by importing structure from the data. They also reveal a regime in which capability and verbatim memorization can be separated without any explicit unlearning objective.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了"潜在能力重现假说"：在无提示、无教师、无验证器的极简无条件自训练设定下，语言模型可以通过自我生成的文本进行微调来放大自身已有的能力，但只有当合成数据与学生模型之间存在"兼容性"这一关系属性时才有效；此外，该机制能够实现能力保留与逐字记忆大幅下降的解耦。
AI.motivation: 现有自训练方法通常依赖提示、教师模型、奖励模型或验证器等外部信号，而本文探索一个更极端的设定：语言模型能否仅从自身无条件采样的文本中学习并获得提升，无需任何形式的外部监督或任务规范，旨在揭示自我训练有效性的根本条件与机制。
AI.method: 本研究采用极简的无提示无条件自训练范式：仅从基础语言模型的BOS（开始符）令牌开始无条件采样生成文本，然后直接使用这些自生成文本对模型进行微调，不使用任何提示、任务规范、教师模型、验证器或奖励模型；通过对比不同来源（自生成、同家族、跨家族）的合成数据对学生模型的影响，以及分析语义相似度和平均逐令牌似然等内在代理指标，来检验数据效用与学生模型的兼容性关系。
AI.result: 三个主要发现：(1) 合成数据的效用是关系性的而非内在的——自生成数据最有效，同源迁移优于来自更强但不同训练方式的数据，跨家族迁移显著更弱；(2) 常见的内在代理指标（如基准语义相似度、平均逐令牌似然）无法预测哪些语料对学生模型有帮助；(3) 在受控Pythia实验中，能力与逐字记忆发生解耦：基准能力得到保持或提升，而保留集上的精确提取率下降超过95%，且无需遗忘集、隐私目标或针对性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明，无提示自训练通过放大学生模型已有的知识来运作，而非从数据中导入新的结构；该机制揭示了一个无需任何显式遗忘目标即可将能力与逐字记忆分离的新范式，为理解自训练的本质机制以及模型隐私与能力之间的权衡提供了重要理论见解。

title: DiTTo: Scalable Order-aware All-in-One Image Restoration Agent
comment: Please visit our project page at https://cmlab-korea.github.io/DiTTo/
summary: Real-world images rarely suffer from a single degradation, and the order in which degradations are removed substantially affects the final restoration quality, motivating agent-based image restoration (IR), where a vision-language model schedules a pool of pre-built restoration-experts. However, existing training-based agents require $\mathcal{O}((N^{\mathbf{D}})^{2})$ restoration-expert calls per image to construct the Optimal Restoration-action Trajectory Dataset (ORTD), where $N^{\mathbf{D}}$ denotes the number of degradation types in the universe $\mathbf{D}$, and couple agent training to a fixed restoration-expert pool, preventing extension to newly introduced restoration-experts without full retraining. To overcome these efficiency and extensibility bottlenecks, we propose \textbf{DiTTo}, a novel order-aware image restoration agent framework consisting of the DiTTo Simulator and the DiTTo Agent. The DiTTo Simulator combines $\cup$S-IR for single-step restoration-action simulation and AiO-IQA for per-action quality prediction, reducing ORTD construction to $\mathcal{O}(N^{\mathbf{D}})$ simulator calls per image; the DiTTo Agent is trained by SFT on the simulator-generated ORTD, followed by \textbf{Order-aware Restoration Alignment (ORA)} that aligns degradation identification, restoration-action-ordering, and output format along independent axes. This enables \textbf{plug-and-play scalable extensibility}: adding a new restoration-expert requires updating only the lightweight ORA stage. On the MiO-100 evaluation set with up to five concurrent degradations, our DiTTo Agent achieves state-of-the-art multi-degradation restoration quality among previous agent-based IR methods.

AI.tldr: DiTTo 提出了一种基于模拟器的顺序感知图像恢复智能体框架，通过单步模拟和质量预测将最优恢复动作轨迹数据集的构建复杂度从 O((N^D)^2) 降至 O(N^D)，并支持新恢复专家的即插即用扩展，在 MiO-100 上实现了多退化场景下的最优恢复质量。
AI.motivation: 现实图像常受多种退化叠加影响，退化去除顺序显著影响恢复质量，现有基于智能体的图像恢复方法面临两大瓶颈：一是构建最优恢复动作轨迹数据集需要 O((N^D)^2) 次恢复专家调用，效率极低；二是智能体训练与固定的恢复专家池耦合，无法低成本扩展新专家。
AI.method: DiTTo 框架包含 DiTTo 模拟器和 DiTTo 智能体两部分。模拟器采用 ∪S-IR 实现单步恢复动作模拟，结合 AiO-IQA 进行每动作质量预测，将 ORTD 构建复杂度降至 O(N^D)；智能体通过 SFT 在模拟生成的 ORTD 上训练，并引入顺序感知恢复对齐（ORA）对退化识别、恢复动作排序和输出格式三个独立维度进行对齐，从而支持新增恢复专家时仅需轻量更新 ORA 阶段。
AI.result: 在包含最多五种并发退化的 MiO-100 评估集上，DiTTo 智能体在多重退化恢复质量上超越了所有先前的基于智能体的图像恢复方法，达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: DiTTo 通过模拟器驱动的 ORTD 构建和智能体训练解耦设计，显著提升了多退化图像恢复的效率与可扩展性，验证了顺序感知智能体框架在复杂退化场景中的有效性，并为未来动态扩展恢复专家提供了可行路径。

title: Towards Efficient LLMs Annealing with Principled Sample Selection
summary: The annealing phase is a pivotal convergence stage in LLM pre-training that ultimately determines final model quality. However, effectively selecting training data during this phase remains a key challenge. Current strategies rely on empirical heuristics, such as domain filtering or context extension, which lack a principled grounding in optimization theory. In this work, we characterize the annealing phase through the lens of the loss landscape's spectral geometry. We argue that optimal convergence requires gradient updates to satisfy heterogeneous constraints across different eigen-directions. Building on this insight, we formulate data selection as a problem of satisfying these directional constraints. To this end, we propose DiReCT (Directionally-Restrained Constrained Training), a novel framework that reformulates sample selection in the annealing stage as a constrained optimization problem. By imposing explicit directional constraints on per-sample gradients based on the spectral properties of the Hessian, DiReCT identifies samples that align with the optimal curvature-aware descent path. Extensive experiments across various model scales demonstrate that DiReCT consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance. For future research, code is available at https://github.com/xuyj233/Direct.

AI.tldr: 提出DiReCT框架，将大语言模型预训练退火阶段的数据选择建模为受约束优化问题，利用Hessian谱几何约束梯度方向，实现状态最优性能。
AI.motivation: 退火阶段是LLM预训练中决定最终模型质量的关键收敛阶段，但现有数据选择策略依赖领域过滤或上下文扩展等经验启发式方法，缺乏优化理论层面的原则性指导。
AI.method: 基于损失景观的谱几何分析，将退火阶段的最优收敛诉求表述为梯度更新需满足不同特征方向上的异质性约束；据此将数据选择转化为满足方向性约束的优化问题，提出DiReCT框架，通过对每个样本梯度施加基于Hessian谱特性的显式方向性约束，筛选出对齐最优曲率感知下降路径的样本。
AI.result: 在多种模型规模上开展大量实验，DiReCT一致达到最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 从优化理论出发为退火阶段数据选择提供了可解释的几何原理，实验验证了方向性约束的有效性，公开代码便于后续研究复现与扩展。

title: Variational Adapter for Cross-modal Similarity Representation
comment: Accepted by the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: The core of vision-language models lies in measuring cross-modal similarity within a unified representation space. However, most image-text matching or multi-class image classification datasets lack fine-grained cross-modal matching annotations, forcing the continuous similarity space into binary classification boundaries. This compression induces false negative samples and significantly impairs the generalization performance of cross-modal tasks. While prior research has attempted to mitigate this by modeling intra-modal ambiguity, it often overlooks inherent annotation flaws, leading to suboptimal uncertainty allocation. To address these challenges, we propose a Variational Adapter for Cross-modal Similarity Representation (VACSR). This approach reformulates image-text matching with fine-grained semantic scarcity as a variational inference problem. It constructs a latent space for cross-modal similarity and uses regularization techniques to mitigate overfitting to binary annotations. Experiments on image-text retrieval, domain generalization, and base-to-novel generalization demonstrate the proposed method's effectiveness and robust generalization ability.

AI.tldr: 提出变分适配器（VACSR），将稀缺细粒度语义下的图文匹配重新构想为变分推断问题，通过构建跨模态相似性潜空间并引入正则化技术，缓解二值标注导致的过拟合与假负样本问题，在检索、域泛化和基础到新类泛化任务上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像-文本匹配或多类图像分类数据集缺乏细粒度跨模态匹配标注，迫使连续的相似性空间被压缩到二值分类边界中，导致假负样本问题并严重损害跨模态任务的泛化性能；先前工作虽尝试建模模态内模糊性，但忽略了标注本身固有的缺陷，导致不确定性分配不优。
AI.method: 提出变分适配器（VACSR），将细粒度语义稀缺下的图像-文本匹配形式化为变分推断问题，构建跨模态相似性的潜空间，并利用正则化技术缓解对二值标注的过拟合。
AI.result: 在图像-文本检索、域泛化和基础到新类泛化任务上的实验表明，所提方法具有有效性和鲁棒的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过将跨模态相似性建模为变分推断问题并引入潜空间正则化，可以有效缓解二值标注带来的假负样本和过拟合问题，显著提升跨模态任务在下游场景中的泛化性能。

title: Steering LLMs? Actually, Sparse Autoencoders can outperform simple baselines
summary: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have been seen as a promising avenue for exploring the internals of Large Language Models (LLMs) and for steering model output generation. When AxBench - a model steering benchmark - was introduced in Wu et al. (2025), SAEs did not seem to live up to their original hype due to poor steering performance relative to a set of simple baselines. This work serves as a partial rebuttal for Sparse Autoencoders and suggests that the results of Wu et al. (2025) did not do them full justice. We find that Sparse Autoencoders can, in fact, perform close to on par with the reference LoRA performance on the AxBench benchmark, when features are selected and labelled with our supervised pipeline. We also find that our pipeline selects features that are surprisingly causal of their identified labels when using only its interpretability-based components. Lastly, we present evidence that high sparsity (low l0) may not be crucial for successful steering based on interpretability, which is in contrast to the earlier findings in Wang et al. (2025).

AI.tldr: 本文对Wu等人(2025)的AxBench基准中稀疏自编码器表现不佳的结论提出部分反驳，证明通过监督式特征选择与标注流程，SAE在模型控制任务上可接近LoRA的性能，并发现高稀疏性对基于可解释性的控制并非必要。
AI.motivation: 稀疏自编码器被广泛视为探索大语言模型内部机制和引导模型输出的重要工具，但Wu等人(2025)在AxBench基准测试中发现SAE的引导性能远逊于简单基线方法，这一结果削弱了SAE在模型控制领域的可信度。本文旨在重新评估SAE的实际潜力，解释此前负面结论的局限性，并纠正关于稀疏性与引导效果之间关系的既有认知。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种监督式特征选择与标注流程（supervised pipeline），用于从SAE中筛选出与目标标签高度因果相关的特征，并基于这些特征进行模型输出引导。该流程包含基于可解释性的组件，仅通过可解释性即可选出对识别标签具有意外强因果作用的特征。实验基于AxBench基准，以LoRA作为参考方法进行对比评估。
AI.result: 在AxBench基准上，采用监督式特征选择与标注流程后，SAE的模型引导性能接近LoRA的参考水平。仅使用流程中的可解释性组件选出的特征，已表现出对对应标签出人意料的强因果性。此外，与Wang等人(2025)的结论相反，本文发现高稀疏性（低l0）对于基于可解释性的成功引导并非关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 本文的工作部分恢复了稀疏自编码器在模型控制领域的地位，表明SAE在合适的特征选择方法下能够取得与LoRA相当的引导性能；同时推翻了高稀疏性对引导效果至关重要的既有观点，为未来设计更灵活、更有效的SAE引导方案提供了新的方向。

title: Generating Reports or Repeating Templates? Measuring and Mitigating Template Collapse in 3D CT Report Generation
summary: Modern 3D medical vision-language models (VLMs) can generate fluent radiology-style text while exhibit critically low pathology detection and output diversity, collapsing to generic templates that under-report rare yet critical findings. We identify this failure mode as Template Collapse. This failure stems from the unique constraints of 3D medical imaging, e.g., limited data, severe label imbalance, and weak signals from volumetric encoders. Under these constraints, text-generation objectives encourage shortcut learning and fluent but weakly grounded reports. We systematically diagnose the Template Collapse through clinical fidelity, output diversity, normal-template bias, and rare-finding survival. To mitigate it, we propose CLarGen, a decoupled framework that separates what to say (clinical detection) from how to say it (language synthesis). CLarGen uses (i) a Latent Query Transformer for multi-label pathology detection, (ii) pathology-guided retrieval for clinically matched exemplars, and (iii) a medical language model to synthesize the final report from detected findings and retrieved context. Across state-of-the-art 3D CT report generation baselines, CLarGen mitigates Template Collapse and substantially improves clinical accuracy (macro-F1 0.487 vs. 0.189; CRG 0.472 vs. 0.368) while maintaining fluent reporting. Our results suggest that explicit, measurable clinical grounding is essential for template-collapse-resistant 3D CT report generation. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLarGen框架，通过解耦临床检测与语言生成来缓解3D医学视觉语言模型中的模板坍缩问题，在CT报告生成任务上将宏F1从0.189提升至0.487，CRG从0.368提升至0.472。
AI.motivation: 现有3D医学视觉语言模型在生成流畅放射学报告时，存在严重的病理检测能力低下和输出多样性问题，倾向于坍缩为只报告常见发现的通用模板，导致罕见但关键的病理发现被遗漏。作者将这一失效模式定义为模板坍缩，其根源在于3D医学成像的独特约束——有限数据、严重标签不平衡以及体积编码器的弱信号，使得文本生成目标鼓励捷径学习和流畅但弱化临床依据的报告生成。
AI.method: CLarGen是一种解耦框架，将"说什么"（临床检测）与"怎么说"（语言合成）分离。它包含三个核心组件：(i) 用于多标签病理检测的潜在查询Transformer，(ii) 用于检索临床匹配样本的病理引导检索模块，(iii) 基于检测结果和检索上下文合成最终报告的医学语言模型。
AI.result: 在多种最先进的3D CT报告生成基线方法上，CLarGen有效缓解了模板坍缩问题，显著提升了临床准确性（宏F1从0.189提升至0.487；CRG从0.368提升至0.472），同时保持了报告的流畅性。论文还通过临床保真度、输出多样性、正常模板偏差和罕见发现存活率四个维度系统诊断了模板坍缩现象。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，显式、可测量的临床基础对于抵抗模板坍缩的3D CT报告生成至关重要。这揭示了在医学视觉语言模型中，为确保对罕见但关键病理发现的准确报告，必须将临床检测与语言生成进行明确解耦，为未来可靠医学报告生成系统的设计提供了重要指导。

title: Mellum2 Technical Report
summary: We present Mellum 2, an open-weight 12B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model with 2.5B active parameters per token. Mellum 2 is a general-purpose language model specialized in software engineering, spanning code generation and editing, debugging, multi-step reasoning, tool use and function calling, agentic coding, and conversational programming assistance, and it is the successor to the completion-focused 4B dense Mellum model. The architecture builds on the Mixture-of-Experts (64 experts, 8 active) and combines Grouped-Query Attention with 4 KV heads, Sliding Window Attention on three of every four layers, and a single Multi-Token Prediction head that doubles as both an auxiliary pre-training objective and a built-in draft model for speculative decoding; each choice was validated by ablation with inference efficiency on commodity GPUs as a design constraint. Pre-training spans approximately 10.6 trillion tokens through a three-phase curriculum that progressively shifts the mixture from diverse web data toward curated code and mathematical content, optimized with Muon under FP8 hybrid precision and a Warmup-Hold-Decay schedule with linear decay to zero. The pre-trained base is extended to a 128K context window via a layer-selective YaRN and then post-trained in two stages (supervised fine-tuning followed by RLVR), yielding two released variants: an Instruct model that answers directly and a Thinking model that emits an explicit reasoning trace before its final answer. Across code generation, math and reasoning, tool use, knowledge, and safety benchmarks, Mellum 2 is competitive with open-weight baselines in the 4B-14B range while running at the per-token compute of a 2.5B dense model. We release the base, instruct, and thinking checkpoints, together with this report on the architecture decisions, data pipeline, and training recipe behind them, under the Apache 2.0 license.

AI.tldr: Mellum 2 是一个 12B 参数的 MoE 语言模型 (2.5B 活跃参数/令牌)，专注于软件工程任务，通过三阶段预训练课程、层选择性 YaRN 扩展至 128K 上下文、以及 SFT+RLVR 两阶段后训练，在代码生成、数学推理、工具使用等基准上达到与 4B-14B 开源模型竞争的性能，并以 Apache 2.0 协议开源。
AI.motivation: 现有开源语言模型在软件工程专用任务（如代码生成、编辑、调试、多步推理、工具调用、代理编程）上的性能与效率平衡仍不理想，且多数模型在推理时计算成本较高，难以在消费级 GPU 上高效部署。
AI.method: 采用 Mixture-of-Experts (64 专家, 8 活跃) 架构，结合分组查询注意力 (4 KV 头)、滑动窗口注意力 (每四层中三层)、以及多令牌预测头 (同时作为辅助预训练目标和推测解码的草稿模型)；预训练分三阶段课程 (约 10.6T 令牌)，从多样网页数据逐步转向代码和数学内容，使用 Muon 优化器、FP8 混合精度和 Warmup-Hold-Decay 学习率调度；通过层选择性 YaRN 扩展至 128K 上下文，后训练分 SFT 和 RLVR 两阶段，产出 Instruct 和 Thinking 两个变体。
AI.result: 在代码生成、数学与推理、工具使用、知识、安全等多个基准上，Mellum 2 与 4B-14B 参数范围的开源基线模型竞争，而每个令牌的计算量仅相当于 2.5B 稠密模型；所有架构选择均通过消融实验验证，推理效率在消费级 GPU 上得到保障。
AI.conclusion: Mellum 2 证明了通过精心设计的 MoE 架构、渐进式预训练课程和两阶段对齐训练，可以在极低推理计算成本下实现与更大稠密模型竞争的性能，为在消费级 GPU 上部署高性能代码与推理助手提供了可行方案，其架构决策、数据管道和训练方案的开源为社区提供了有价值的参考。

title: PEEK: Picking Essential frames via Efficient Knowledge distillation
summary: Video-language models can process only a limited number of frames, making frame selection a key bottleneck for efficient video captioning. Most captioning pipelines still rely on uniform sampling, which is computationally cheap but agnostic to visual content. Adaptive frame sampling has recently emerged as a promising approach for selecting the most informative frames from a video; however, existing methods remain computationally expensive. We introduce PEEK, an efficient dynamic frame sampling method that distills caption-conditioned frame relevance rankings from a stronger teacher model into a lightweight temporal model that operates only on visual content. We find that, overall, on ActivityNet Captions and MSR-VTT, our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods across all evaluated downstream vision language models, especially when only one or two frames are selected for captioning, obtaining the best CIDEr for most frame budgets. On ActivityNet Captions, PEEK is particularly strong, winning 14 out of 16 configurations. Zero-shot evaluation on MSR-VTT shows that our model transfers best at low frame budgets, while results at four and eight frames are more mixed as temporal coverage and visual diversity become increasingly competitive. Compared with recent adaptive baselines, PEEK is both more accurate in the low-budget regime and more efficient: it adds only $5.2\%$ to the captioning time, compared with $65.4\%$ for CSTA and $211.9\%$ for MaxInfo. We release our code and pre-trained checkpoint at https://github.com/momentslab/peek.

AI.tldr: PEEK是一种高效的动态帧采样方法，通过将教师模型中的字幕条件帧相关性排名蒸馏到轻量级时序模型中，在低帧预算下显著提升了视频字幕生成的性能，同时仅增加5.2%的计算开销。
AI.motivation: 视频语言模型只能处理有限数量的帧，帧选择成为高效视频字幕生成的关键瓶颈，而传统均匀采样忽略视觉内容，现有自适应采样方法计算成本高昂，亟需一种既准确又高效的帧选择方案。
AI.method: PEEK提出了一种高效的动态帧采样方法，通过将更强的教师模型生成的字幕条件帧相关性排名蒸馏到一个仅处理视觉内容的轻量级时序模型中，从而实现快速的帧重要性预测与自适应选择。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet Captions和MSR-VTT数据集上，PEEK在大多数下游视觉语言模型上超越现有最优方法，尤其在仅选择1-2帧时表现最佳；在ActivityNet Captions上，PEEK在16种配置中胜出14种；零样本评估显示低帧预算下迁移性能最优，而4帧和8帧时结果较均衡；PEEK仅增加5.2%的字幕生成时间，远低于CSTA的65.4%和MaxInfo的211.9%。
AI.conclusion: PEEK在低帧预算场景下兼具高准确率和高效率，验证了通过知识蒸馏将复杂帧选择策略压缩为轻量模型的有效性，为视频字幕生成中的自适应帧采样提供了实用且高效的解决方案。

title: FBHM: Functional Benchmarking and Steering of VLMs for Hateful Meme Detection
summary: Hateful meme detection remains a formidable challenge for vision-language models, as existing benchmarks are structurally observational - confounding rhetorical hate mechanisms with target community features and preventing causal evaluation of model vulnerabilities. To address this, we introduce FBHM, a systematically curated benchmark of Functionality Based Hateful Memes constructed along two orthogonal axes: 25 distinct rhetorical functionalities and 10 target communities (5,000 memes total). Benchmarking state-of-the-art VLMs reveals a severe generalization gap: models highly accurate on standard datasets catastrophically drop to near-random performance on FBHM, proving they exploit dataset-specific heuristics rather than robust multimodal reasoning. To efficiently close this gap, we propose LSV (learnable steering vectors), an ultra-low data regime strategy that applies a causal intervention objective on as few as 500 steering samples (50 unique base memes), boosting FBHM performance by ~30 Macro-F1 points while outperforming in-context learning and PEFT without degrading source-domain performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 FBHM——一个沿修辞功能与目标社区双轴构建的仇恨模因基准，揭示了现有 VLM 严重依赖数据集特定启发式而非鲁棒多模态推理，并提出 LSV（可学习引导向量），一种超低数据因果干预策略，仅需 500 个样本即可将 FBHM 性能提升约 30 个 Macro-F1 分。
AI.motivation: 现有仇恨模因检测基准在结构上是观察性的，将修辞仇恨机制与目标社区特征混淆在一起，无法对视觉语言模型（VLM）的脆弱性进行因果评估。
AI.method: 本文构建了 FBHM（Functionality Based Hateful Memes）基准，沿 25 种修辞功能和 10 个目标社区两个正交轴系统组织 5,000 个模因；并提出了 LSV（可学习引导向量），一种超低数据因果干预策略，在仅 500 个引导样本（50 个唯一基础模因）上应用因果干预目标。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上精度很高的模型在 FBHM 上性能灾难性下降至接近随机水平；LSV 将 FBHM 性能提升约 30 个 Macro-F1 分，优于上下文学习和参数高效微调（PEFT），且不损害源域性能。
AI.conclusion: FBHM 揭示了 VLM 依赖启发式而非鲁棒多模态推理的严重泛化缺陷，LSV 提供了一种高效、不降源域性能的因果干预修复方案，为仇恨模因检测的因果评估与提升方向提供了新基准和方法。

title: GGT-100K: Generative Ground Truth for Generalizable Real-World Image Restoration
summary: Real-world image restoration (IR) is bottlenecked by the scarcity of high-quality paired training data. Synthetic datasets are abundant but often fail to model real-world degradations, while real-world paired datasets are expensive and difficult to capture. As a result, IR models trained on these datasets show limited generalization in real-world scenarios. In this work, we propose Generative Ground Truth (GGT) by using generative multimodal foundation models (MFMs) to produce high-quality (HQ) targets from real-world low-quality (LQ) images. We first conduct a systematic evaluation of nine state-of-the-art MFMs, including Nano-Banana-2 and GPT-Image-2, on images of various scenes and degradation types. The results demonstrate that Nano-Banana-2 with VLM-based adaptive prompting shows the highest capability to synthesize perceptually realistic and content-faithful HQ targets, which can serve as the GGT for the LQ input. We then employ Nano-Banana-2 to build a GGT synthesis pipeline, which involves multi-stage quality control to ensure data reliability, and construct GGT-100K, an LQ-HQ paired dataset comprising 103,707 training pairs and covering diverse scenes and complex real-world degradations. A test set of 500 image pairs is also established. Extensive experiments show that GGT-100K consistently improves the real-world generalization of a wide range of IR models, with particularly strong benefits for finetuning generative models for IR tasks. Our results suggest that MFMs can serve as practical tools for restoration-oriented data generation, and GGT-100K is a useful resource to expand the generalization boundaries of real-world IR models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出生成式真实标签（GGT）方法，利用生成式多模态基础模型（如Nano-Banana-2）将真实世界低质量图像合成为高质量配对数据，构建了包含103,707个训练对的GGT-100K数据集，显著提升了多种图像复原模型在真实场景中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 真实图像复原面临高质量配对训练数据稀缺的瓶颈：合成数据集无法模拟真实退化，而真实配对数据采集成本高昂，导致现有复原模型在实际场景中泛化能力有限。
AI.method: 系统评估了九种多模态基础模型（MFMs）在多样化场景和退化类型上的表现，发现Nano-Banana-2结合VLM自适应提示在生成感知真实且内容忠实的高质量目标方面最优；基于此设计了GGT合成管道，包含多阶段质量控制，构建了涵盖多样场景和复杂真实退化的LQ-HQ配对数据集GGT-100K（103,707训练对及500测试对）。
AI.result: GGT-100K一致性地提升了多种图像复原模型在真实场景中的泛化性能，尤其对生成式模型进行微调效果最为显著。
AI.conclusion: 多模态基础模型可作为面向复原的数据生成实用工具，GGT-100K数据集是扩展真实图像复原模型泛化边界的重要资源。

title: A Visually Impaired Assistance Benchmark for VLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation
summary: AI-based Visually Impaired Assistance (VIA) remains challenging, largely due to the high cost of human evaluation. The VLM-as-a-Judge paradigm may offer a promising alternative, although it has mostly been studied in general domains. We therefore ask whether such judges can be trusted for VIA tasks. To investigate this question, we introduce VIABLE (Visually Impaired Assistance Benchmark for VLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation), the first benchmark for VLM-as-a-Judge evaluation in VIA. VIABLE contains over 300K judgment samples across three scenarios and introduces an Effectiveness--Impartiality--Stability framework with a 12-mode failure taxonomy. Based on VIABLE, our systematic study of seven judges across different model scales shows that existing models are largely unreliable across all evaluation axes. The strongest judge, GPT-5.4, achieves only 52.6% single-failure diagnostic accuracy, yet exhibits the highest self-preference rate at 94.2%; while open-source judges are strongly biased and adversarially fragile. To address these issues, we propose VIA-Judge-Agent, a model-agnostic inference-time harness that augments judges with visual evidence extraction and a taxonomy-guided workflow. It enables positive improvements in diagnostic accuracy and downstream VIA responses more preferred by BLV users. Data and code are available at: https://github.com/YiyiyiZhao/VIABLE

AI.tldr: 提出VIABLE基准测试和VIA-Judge-Agent框架，系统评估并改进了VLM作为裁判在视障辅助任务中的可靠性，发现现有模型在各评估维度上均不可靠，所提方法能有效提升诊断准确率和下游响应质量。
AI.motivation: 基于AI的视障辅助（VIA）因人工评估成本高昂而进展受限，VLM-as-a-Judge范式虽在通用领域有所探索，但其在VIA任务中的可信度尚未得到系统评估，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 引入VIABLE基准，包含超过30万条判断样本、三种场景、一个有效性-公正性-稳定性评估框架及12模式失败分类法；并提出VIA-Judge-Agent，一种模型无关的推理时增强框架，通过视觉证据提取和分类法引导的工作流提升裁判性能。
AI.result: 对七个不同规模裁判模型的系统研究表明，现有模型在各评估轴上均不可靠；最强裁判GPT-5.4单失败诊断准确率仅52.6%，但自偏好率高达94.2%；开源模型存在严重偏见和对抗脆弱性；VIA-Judge-Agent在诊断准确率和下游VIA响应偏好上均取得正向提升。
AI.conclusion: 现有VLM裁判在VIA任务中整体不可靠且存在严重自偏好与偏见问题，VIA-Judge-Agent通过推理时增强策略可有效缓解这些问题，为可信赖的VIA评估提供了可行路径。

title: Does Visual Information Play a Decisive Role in Vision-Language-Action Model Driving Behavior?
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated promising capability in autonomous driving, highlighting the potential of unified multimodal architectures for jointly modeling perception and planning. However, how current VLA-based driving behavior is grounded in visual information remains poorly understood. Existing evaluation protocols mainly focus on aggregate performance metrics, lacking structured and practical diagnostics to quantify visual-behavior dependency. In this work, we introduce a structured multi-level visual perturbation framework to analyze visual-behavior dependency in VLA-based driving models systematically. The framework organizes controlled visual perturbations along three complementary dimensions: channellevel degradation, information-level disruption, and structurelevel modification. We apply it to VLA-based driving systems and evaluate behavioral responses under both open-loop trajectory prediction and interactive closed-loop safety evaluation. Experimental results reveal evaluation-dependent dependency patterns and uneven visual grounding across abstraction levels. These findings call for more structured analyses and principled design of VLA driving models to better understand how visual information shapes behavior and develop safer, more robust systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构化多级视觉扰动框架，用于系统分析VLA模型在自动驾驶中的视觉-行为依赖关系，揭示了评估方式相关的依赖模式及视觉信息在不同抽象层次上的不均匀接地，呼吁对VLA驾驶模型进行更结构化的分析与设计。
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型在自动驾驶中展现出潜力，但其驾驶行为如何基于视觉信息进行接地尚不清楚；现有评估协议主要关注聚合性能指标，缺乏结构化、可量化的诊断方法来衡量视觉与行为之间的依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计了一个结构化多级视觉扰动框架，沿三个互补维度组织受控视觉扰动：通道级退化、信息级破坏和结构级修改；将该框架应用于VLA驾驶系统，并在开环轨迹预测和交互式闭环安全评估两种模式下评估行为响应。
AI.result: 实验揭示了评估方式依赖的依赖模式，即视觉-行为依赖关系在开环与闭环评估下表现不同；同时发现视觉信息在不同抽象层次上的接地呈现不均匀分布。
AI.conclusion: 研究呼吁对VLA驾驶模型进行更结构化的分析和更原则性的设计，以便更好地理解视觉信息如何塑造驾驶行为，并开发更安全、更鲁棒的系统。

title: Multi-Turn Multi-Agent Dialogue for Collaborative Reconstruction Improves VLM Performance on Spatial Reasoning, But Only Barely
summary: Robots operating in diverse environments rely on visual input to interpret objects and spatial layouts. In human-collaborative tasks, they are expected to communicate this understanding through language. Vision-language models (VLMs) support robotic tasks involving visual interpretation, question answering, and instruction following, but their capabilities in collaborative dialogue tasks requiring spatial reasoning remain underexplored. We study this gap through a collaborative structure-building task that combines visual interpretation, grounding, language-guided interaction, and action generation. We develop a framework in which VLMs use dialogue to reconstruct a target structure from visual and textual inputs. We evaluate open-weight and closed VLMs across interaction settings, input modalities, and image representations. Results show that spatial reasoning over visual representations remains difficult for the evaluated VLMs. Detailed text representations of the target yield higher reconstruction success across modality conditions, while decomposed image representations improve performance. These findings reveal limits in visual spatial grounding and grounded instruction generation for collaborative VLM agents.

AI.tldr: 通过协作结构构建任务系统评估了视觉语言模型在空间推理和对话交互中的能力，发现VLM在处理视觉空间表征方面存在显著局限，详细文本描述和分解图像表示能提升重建性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要评估视觉语言模型在视觉解读、问答和指令跟随等独立任务上的表现，但对于需要空间推理的人机协作对话场景，VLMs的能力尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 设计了一个协作结构构建任务框架，要求VLM通过对话从视觉和文本输入中重建目标结构；在不同交互设置、输入模态和图像表示条件下，对开源和闭源VLM进行了系统评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所评估的VLM在视觉表示的空间推理方面存在显著困难；在多种模态条件下，目标结构的详细文本表示能够获得更高的重建成功率，而分解的图像表示也能提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了当前VLM在视觉空间定位和基于指令生成方面的根本性局限，指出视觉语言模型作为协作代理在空间推理驱动的交互任务中仍存在重要能力缺口。

title: Towards Effective Long-Video Event Prediction via Multi-Level Event Semantics Mining
summary: Accurately predicting future events is fundamental to content understanding and decision-making across various domains. While prior research has primarily focused on text or short-video scenarios, long-video event prediction, characterized by vast multimodal context and more complex narratives, remains underexplored. Meanwhile, although recent Long-Video Language Models (LVLMs), built on Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs), have shown promise in long-video question answering and summarization, they struggle to generalize to event prediction, as they can neither precisely extract event-related details nor perform fine-grained analysis of event development. To address this gap, we propose VISTA, a multi-level event semantics mining framework for long-video event prediction. Initially, VISTA applies a character-centric visual prompt to precisely extract event-related visual details, enhancing detail-level semantics; subsequently, it employs a knowledge-enhanced iterative retrieval strategy, guiding the LLM to progressively construct logically coherent event chains, thereby improving event-level narratives; ultimately, VISTA adopts a human-like propose-then-retrieve strategy to generate diverse future-oriented proposals and integrate multi-level clues, producing robust and accurate predictions. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets validate the effectiveness of VISTA for long-video event prediction.

AI.tldr: VISTA是一个面向长视频事件预测的多层级事件语义挖掘框架，通过字符级视觉提示、知识增强迭代检索和类人提议-检索策略，从细节语义、事件叙事和未来预测三个层面实现精准的长视频未来事件预测。
AI.motivation: 现有事件预测研究主要集中于文本或短视频场景，长视频事件预测因涉及大规模多模态上下文和复杂叙事结构而未被充分探索；同时，基于LLM和VLM的长视频语言模型在问答和摘要任务上表现良好，但难以泛化到事件预测任务，既无法精确提取事件相关细节，也无法进行细粒度的事件发展分析。
AI.method: VISTA提出三阶段多层级框架：首先采用字符级视觉提示（character-centric visual prompt）精确提取与事件相关的视觉细节以增强细节层语义；其次采用知识增强的迭代检索策略（knowledge-enhanced iterative retrieval），引导LLM逐步构建逻辑一致的事件链以提升事件层叙事；最后采用类人提议-检索策略（propose-then-retrieve）生成多样化的未来事件提议并整合多层级线索，产生鲁棒且准确的预测结果。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集上的大量实验验证了VISTA在长视频事件预测任务上的有效性，证明了该框架能够显著提升对未来事件的预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: VISTA通过多层级事件语义挖掘系统性地解决了长视频事件预测中细节提取不足和事件发展分析不细的问题，为长视频内容理解和决策提供了有效框架，未来可进一步探索更细粒度的事件语义表示和跨域泛化能力。

title: "Intelegi Româneşte?'' A Recipe for Romanian Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) largely follow the text-only LLM trajectory, excelling on English benchmarks but sharply degrading on low-resource languages, where neither large-scale image-text corpora nor culturally grounded evaluations exist. We present a systematic study of building a language-specific VLM for Romanian, covering the full pipeline from data construction to architectural choices. We translate established English VLM training and evaluation corpora into Romanian, applying machine translation to textual annotations and to in-image text, preserving visual grounding while adapting the textual content. Using this data, we train and ablate a series of VLMs to isolate the contribution of (i) vision backbones of varying scale and pretraining, (ii) language backbones from multilingual to Romanian-adapted LLMs, and (iii) OCR-style image-text data. We further curate HoraVQA, a culturally native evaluation set grounded in Romanian everyday scenes. Romanian-adapted VLMs consistently outperform their same-sized counterparts and, across all evaluated benchmarks, even surpass models from the next larger size category.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了为罗马尼亚语构建语言特定视觉-语言模型（VLM）的完整流程，通过机器翻译构建训练与评估语料，并消融分析视觉骨干网络、语言骨干网络和OCR数据等组件的影响，证明了罗马尼亚语适配VLM在性能上优于同尺寸模型甚至跨尺寸超越更大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）主要沿袭文本-only LLM的发展路径，在英语基准上表现优异，但在低资源语言上性能严重下降，且缺乏大规模图文语料库和文化适应性评估数据集，本文旨在填补这一空白，系统研究如何在低资源语言（罗马尼亚语）下构建语言特定的VLM。
AI.method: 本文覆盖从数据构建到架构选择的完整流程：对英文VLM训练和评估语料中的文本标注及图像内文本应用机器翻译翻译为罗马尼亚语，保持视觉对齐的同时转换文本内容；在此基础上训练并消融一系列VLM，独立分析视觉骨干网络（不同规模和预训练方式）、语言骨干网络（多语言LLM vs 罗马尼亚语适配LLM）以及OCR风格图文数据的影响；同时构建了HoraVQA，一个基于罗马尼亚日常场景的本土文化评估集。
AI.result: 罗马尼亚语适配的VLM在各项评估基准上一致优于同尺寸的对照模型，并且甚至超越下一个更大尺寸类别的模型，表明语言特定适配策略能显著提升低资源语言VLM的性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了在低资源语言场景下，通过对训练数据和语言骨干网络进行语言特定适配能够有效弥合VLM的性能差距，并为其他低资源语言构建类似系统提供了可复现的范式；同时强调本土文化评估集对于准确衡量模型在实际应用场景中能力的重要性。

title: Task-Focused Memorization for Multimodal Agents
summary: Long-term memory is essential for multimodal agents to build coherent experience, accumulate world knowledge, and achieve continual learning. However, constructing effective memory goes beyond memory module design and basic requirements such as accuracy and fidelity; the key challenge lies in determining what to memorize. Multimodal agents, such as embodied agents, continuously perceive, reason, and act in real or virtual environments, receiving an unbounded stream of multimodal observations. From this combinatorial explosion of information, an agent must selectively retain content that is relevant to its role in the environment and valuable for future tasks. To bridge this gap, we frame memory generation as a learnable memorization policy and introduce TaskMem (Task-focused Memorization Policy Learning), a reinforcement-learning-based framework that enables the policy to dynamically adjust its focus to the demands of real tasks encountered in the environment. TaskMem adopts a two-phase training paradigm: Phase One learns how to memorize by optimizing memory quality under fundamental fidelity requirements; Phase Two occurs after deployment, where the agent learns what to memorize by tuning an adapter on its base MLLM, using recent environment tasks to define a reward model that guides the memorization policy toward task-relevant content. To evaluate our approach, we reformulate VideoMME, EgoLife, and EgoTempo into streaming benchmarks that simulate a realistic setting in which an agent processes streaming observations and handles tasks arriving online. To isolate memory assessment, the questions must be answered using only the agent's memory, without access to raw video. Built on Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B, TaskMem improves VQA accuracy by 6.3%, 7.0%, and 5.3% on these benchmarks, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出TaskMem，一种基于强化学习的任务聚焦记忆化策略学习框架，使多模态具身智能体能够从无限流式观测中动态选择与任务相关的内容进行记忆，在三个流式基准上分别提升6.3%、7.0%和5.3%的VQA准确率。
AI.motivation: 多模态智能体（如具身智能体）持续接收无限的流式多模态观测，面临信息组合爆炸问题，构建长期记忆的关键挑战不在于记忆模块设计或基本的准确性与保真度要求，而在于决定应该记忆什么内容；现有方法缺乏让智能体动态聚焦于任务相关且对未来任务有价值信息的可学习记忆策略。
AI.method: 将记忆生成建模为可学习的记忆化策略，提出TaskMem框架，采用两阶段训练范式：第一阶段通过优化基本保真度要求下的记忆质量学习如何记忆；第二阶段在部署后，通过微调基础MLLM上的适配器，利用近期环境任务定义奖励模型，引导记忆化策略聚焦于任务相关内容。
AI.result: 将VideoMME、EgoLife和EgoTempo重构为流式基准测试，模拟智能体处理流式观测和在线任务的真实场景，且仅依赖记忆回答问题而不访问原始视频；基于Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B的TaskMem在三个基准上分别提升了6.3%、7.0%和5.3%的VQA准确率。
AI.conclusion: 任务驱动的可学习记忆化策略比固定或启发式记忆选择更有效，智能体可通过强化学习自适应地调整记忆焦点以匹配实际环境任务需求，为多模态智能体的持续学习和经验积累提供了可行范式。

title: The Sword, Shield, and Achilles' Heel: Characterizing the Linguistic Inductive Bias of Large Language Models for Spatial Reasoning in Navigation Planning
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based navigation systems commonly construct explicit spatial representations (e.g., topological graphs, semantic raster maps) and translate them into textual descriptions as LLMs' inputs. However, the linguistic structures of such text-based spatial representations and the choices of contextual features (e.g., topology, geometry) they contain are often treated as neutral engineering decisions rather than key factors that shape LLMs' behavior. To fill the gap, we propose a dual-interventional framework that disentangles linguistic structures from different contextual cues to evaluate the linguistic inductive bias of LLMs for navigation planning. In the framework, representation intervention varies the linguistic format and the degree of linguistic compression, clarifying when linguistic representations support or inhibit navigation planning. Context intervention, combined with contextual feature combination and conflict probing, explicitly clarifies the preferences and weaknesses of LLMs when processing different contextual cues. Experiments across diverse spatial reasoning tasks and multiple model scales reveal a consistent pattern: topological information is a sturdy shield and the backbone of robust planning; linguistic format is a double-edged sword whose effect depends on model size, task demands, and the compression level; and semantic information is a fatal Achilles' heel -- incorrect semantic cues can systematically derail the planning process. Overall, our study shows that effective text-based spatial representations in LLM-based navigation should preserve topological integrity, calibrate representational compression to model capacity, and ensure semantic correctness, rather than simply adopting a single representation. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/jonesdong150/LLM-Navigation-Inductive-Bias.

AI.tldr: 本文提出双干预框架（表示干预+上下文干预）系统评估LLM在导航规划中的语言归纳偏差，发现拓扑信息是鲁棒规划的支柱，语义信息是致命弱点，语言格式的效果取决于模型规模和压缩程度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的导航系统通常将文本化空间表示作为工程默认选择，而忽略了语言结构（如语言格式、压缩程度）和上下文特征（如拓扑、几何、语义）的选择对LLM行为的关键影响，缺乏对这些因素如何塑造导航规划能力的系统性研究。
AI.method: 本文提出双干预框架：表示干预通过改变语言格式和语言压缩程度，探究语言表示何时促进或抑制导航规划；上下文干预结合上下文特征组合与冲突探测，显式揭示LLM在处理不同空间上下文线索时的偏好与弱点。
AI.result: 跨多种空间推理任务和模型规模的一致结果表明：拓扑信息是鲁棒规划的支柱；语言格式是一把双刃剑，其效果取决于模型大小、任务需求和压缩程度；语义信息是致命弱点——错误的语义线索会系统性破坏规划过程。
AI.conclusion: 有效基于LLM的导航文本空间表示应保持拓扑完整性、根据模型容量校准表示压缩程度、并确保语义正确性，而非简单采用单一表示形式。

title: On Revisiting Entropy for Identifying Mislabeled Images
summary: Mislabeled samples in training datasets severely degrade the performance of deep networks, as overparameterized models tend to memorize erroneous labels. We address this challenge by proposing a novel approach for mislabeled data detection that leverages training dynamics. Our method is grounded in the key observation that correctly labeled samples exhibit consistent entropy decrease during training, while mislabeled samples maintain relatively high entropy throughout the training process. Building on this insight, we introduce a signed entropy integral (SEI) statistic that captures both the magnitude and temporal trend of prediction entropy across training epochs. SEI is broadly applicable to classification networks and demonstrates particular effectiveness when integrated with contrastive language-image pretraining (CLIP) architectures. Through extensive experiments on four medical imaging datasets -- a domain particularly susceptible to labeling errors due to diagnostic complexity -- spanning diverse modalities and pathologies, we demonstrate that SEI achieves state-of-the-art performance in mislabeled data identification, outperforming existing methods while maintaining computational efficiency and implementation simplicity. Our code is available at https://github.com/MedAITech/SEI.

AI.tldr: 提出基于符号熵积分（SEI）统计量的误标注样本检测方法，利用训练过程中正确与错误标注样本的熵变化差异，在医学影像数据集上实现了最优的误标注识别性能。
AI.motivation: 训练数据中的误标注样本会严重损害深度网络的性能，因为过参数化模型倾向于记忆错误标签，而现有方法在检测误标注样本方面仍有不足，特别是在医学影像领域——该领域因诊断复杂性而尤其容易受到标注错误的影响。
AI.method: 提出一种基于训练动力学的误标注样本检测方法，核心观察是正确标注样本的预测熵在训练过程中持续下降，而误标注样本则始终保持较高熵值。基于此，引入符号熵积分（SEI）统计量，该统计量同时捕获训练过程中预测熵的大小和时间变化趋势，可广泛适用于分类网络，在与CLIP架构结合时效果尤为显著。
AI.result: 在涵盖多种模态和病理类型的四个医学影像数据集上进行大量实验，SEI在误标注样本识别任务上取得了最先进的性能，优于现有方法，同时保持了计算效率和实现简洁性。
AI.conclusion: SEI通过捕捉正确与错误标注样本在训练过程中熵变化的差异性，提供了一种高效、简洁且可广泛应用的误标注检测方案，在标注错误高发的医学影像领域具有重要实用价值。

title: Translation Analytics for Freelancers II: Benchmarking Local LLMs for Confidential Translation Workflows
comment: 20 pages. Accepted at EAMT-2026 (Tilburg, Netherlands, June 2026)
summary: Building on our previous work, this paper develops practical, low-barrier methods for freelance translators and smaller language service providers to evaluate translation technologies using rigorous yet accessible analytic methods. Here we address a high-stakes, specialized need: offline translation for confidentiality-sensitive domains in which privacy constraints preclude the use of cloud-based engines and commercial LLMs. We expand the Reeve Foundation Trilingual Corpus (RFTC) used in our previous work into a multilingual corpus (RFMC) by adding sentence-aligned German and Simplified Chinese reference translations. We then benchmark several locally runnable language models (via Ollama) across four language directions on 1000+ sentences selected from this corpus. We use consistent single-prompt calls without fine-tuning or domain adaptation, comparing local LLM outputs against commercial NMTs (DeepL, Baidu), a frontier LLM (GPT-5.2), and professional-grade local NMT systems (OPUS-CAT, NeuralDesktop, Promt). Automatic evaluation is conducted with MATEO. Results reveal substantial variation in local LLM performance across language directions and model sizes. The best local LLMs match or surpass local NMT systems and a frontier LLM, though they remain behind top commercial NMTs. These findings underscore the viability of carefully selected local LLM translation for privacy-constrained professionals and inform future research on model scaling and multilingual capability.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了Reeve基金会三语语料库为多语语料库(RFMC)，并系统评估了多种本地可运行的大语言模型在隐私敏感场景下的离线翻译性能，发现精心选择的本地LLM在部分语言方向上可匹敌甚至超越本地NMT系统和前沿LLM，但仍落后于顶级商业NMT系统。
AI.motivation: 针对保密敏感领域（如法律、医疗等）中云端翻译引擎和商业LLM因隐私约束无法使用的现实问题，本文旨在为自由译者和小型语言服务商提供一种低门槛、可操作的离线翻译技术评估方法，填补在本地可运行LLM用于专业级翻译任务方面的系统性基准测试空白。
AI.method: 将原有的Reeve Foundation Trilingual Corpus(RFTC)扩展为多语语料库(RFMC)，新增德语和简体中文的句子对齐参考译文；在1000+句子上，通过Ollama部署多个本地可运行的语言模型，使用一致的单一提示调用（无微调或领域适配），在四个语言方向上对比本地LLM输出与商业NMT（DeepL、Baidu）、前沿LLM（GPT-5.2）及专业级本地NMT系统（OPUS-CAT、NeuralDesktop、Promt）的表现，并使用MATEO进行自动评估。
AI.result: 本地LLM在不同语言方向和模型规模上表现差异显著；最佳本地LLM在翻译质量上可匹敌甚至超越本地NMT系统和GPT-5.2等前沿LLM，但整体仍落后于顶级商业NMT系统（如DeepL）。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，经过精心选择的本地LLM能够在隐私约束下为专业人士提供可行的翻译方案，验证了离线LLM翻译在保密敏感场景中的实际应用价值，并为未来关于模型规模扩展和多语言能力的进一步研究提供了实证基础。

title: Remembering by Reconstructing: Domain Incremental Learning With Test-Time Training on Video Streams
summary: In this work we introduce a novel approach to domain incremental learning, adapting models over time to evolving, non-stationary data. In contrast to other works, we do not attempt to avoid catastrophic forgetting, but rather allow it and exploit it. Our model combines a main task head with a self-supervised masked autoencoder (MAE) head. We then learn domain-specific LoRA adapters during incremental training. Each adapter specializes to its domain, naturally inducing forgetting on other domains in both heads. At inference, we perform online test-time training on the self-supervised MAE head to identify which LoRAs best matches the current input, so the model can `remember' the domain again. Our scheme is especially well-suited to real-world streaming data, such as video, where consecutive samples are highly correlated and domain shifts are gradual. We demonstrate our method on domain-incremental action recognition and semantic segmentation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新颖的域增量学习方法，不试图避免灾难性遗忘，而是主动利用遗忘现象：通过结合主任务头和自监督MAE头并学习域特定LoRA适配器，在推理时利用在线测试时训练识别最佳匹配域，从而在流式数据场景下实现高效域自适应。
AI.motivation: 现有的域增量学习方法大多致力于避免灾难性遗忘，但在面对流式数据（如视频中连续样本高度相关、域转移逐渐发生）时，这些方法往往过于复杂或效率低下。本文旨在探索一种相反的策略——允许遗忘发生并利用遗忘信号，以更适配流式数据特性的方式实现域增量学习。
AI.method: 模型由主任务头（用于动作识别或语义分割）和自监督掩码自编码器（MAE）头组成。在增量训练阶段，为每个新域学习一组域特定的LoRA适配器，这些适配器使模型在当前域上专精，同时自然导致其他域在主任务头和MAE头上发生遗忘。在推理阶段，通过在线测试时训练在自监督MAE头上进行优化，利用MAE的重构损失来识别当前输入最匹配的LoRA适配器，从而让模型重新“记住”对应的域。
AI.result: 该方法在域增量动作识别和语义分割任务上进行了验证，实验结果表明，通过允许遗忘并利用在线测试时训练重新激活域特定知识，模型能够有效应对流式数据中的渐进域转移，在连续相关样本场景下表现出良好的域自适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了在域增量学习中“不抵抗遗忘而是利用遗忘”这一反直觉策略的有效性，特别适用于流式数据场景。该方法通过自监督信号驱动在线适配，避免了存储大量历史数据或复杂回放机制，为处理非平稳流式数据提供了高效且可扩展的新思路。

title: Reliable Multilingual Orthopedic Decision Support from Clinical Narratives: Language-Aware Adaptation and Verification-Guided Deferral
summary: Multilingual orthopedic decision support remains challenging in low-resource healthcare settings, where clinical narratives contain specialized terminology, mixed scripts, incomplete evidence, label imbalance and language-dependent documentation patterns. This article presents a reliability-oriented framework for classifying free-text orthopedic notes in English, Hindi and Punjabi. We compare task-aligned multilingual transformer encoders, a task-fine-tuned DistilBERT baseline, zero-shot instruction-tuned large language models (LLMs) and a domain-adaptive encoder, IndicBERT-HPA. IndicBERT-HPA augments IndicBERT with language-aware orthopedic adapter heads to support clinically relevant multilingual representation learning. Evaluation extends beyond aggregate accuracy to per-class performance, ROC-AUC, AUPRC, expected calibration error, cross-language stability and robustness under controlled balanced and natural-prevalence distributions. The evaluated zero-shot LLMs remain substantially less effective than task-adapted encoders for closed-set classification, with language-dependent instability. Under natural clinical prevalence, IndicBERT-HPA achieves the strongest overall performance, reaching an averaged Macro-F1 of 0.8792, Macro-AUROC of 0.894 and AUPRC of 0.902. We further implement a deterministic selective-verification layer combining confidence gating, evidence-consistency checking and language-risk screening. On a randomly selected held-out 5,000-record subset, it achieves 84.4% selective accuracy and 0.76 selective Macro-F1 at 72.3% coverage, compared with 71.5% accuracy and 0.65 Macro-F1 for accept-all prediction. These results support reliability-oriented multilingual clinical decision support with explicit deferral.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向低资源医疗场景的多语言骨科决策支持框架，通过任务对齐的多语言Transformer编码器、领域自适应编码器IndicBERT-HPA以及确定性选择性验证层，在英语、印地语和旁遮普语的骨科自由文本分类中实现了可靠性导向的预测与显式拒答机制。
AI.motivation: 多语言骨科临床决策支持在低资源医疗场景中面临专业术语混用、混合文字、证据不完整、标签不平衡以及语言依赖的文档模式等挑战，现有模型在跨语言稳定性和可靠性方面存在明显不足，缺乏针对临床高风险场景的显式不确定性管理机制。
AI.method: 本文比较了任务对齐的多语言Transformer编码器、微调DistilBERT基线、零样本指令调优大语言模型以及领域自适应编码器IndicBERT-HPA。IndicBERT-HPA在IndicBERT基础上引入语言感知的骨科适配器头以支持临床相关的多语言表征学习；此外，本文提出一个确定性选择性验证层，结合置信度门控、证据一致性检查和语言风险筛选，实现对不可靠预测的显式拒答。
AI.result: 在自然临床分布下，IndicBERT-HPA取得最优整体性能，平均Macro-F1为0.8792，Macro-AUROC为0.894，AUPRC为0.902。在随机抽取的5,000条留出子集上，选择性验证层在72.3%覆盖度下达到84.4%的选择性准确率和0.76的选择性Macro-F1，而全接受基线仅为71.5%准确率和0.65 Macro-F1。零样本LLM在闭集分类任务中显著弱于任务适应编码器，且存在语言依赖的不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明任务适应的编码器在多语言临床分类中远优于零样本大语言模型，IndicBERT-HPA结合确定性选择性验证层为多语言临床决策支持提供了兼顾准确性与可靠性的有效方案，显式拒答机制对高风险医疗场景具有重要应用价值。

title: Polyphony: Diffusion-based Dual-Hand Action Segmentation with Alternating Vision Transformer and Semantic Conditioning
summary: Dual-hand action segmentation, densely predicting actions for both hands from untrimmed videos, is essential for understanding complex bimanual activities. However, it poses several unique challenges: complex inter-hand dependencies, visual asymmetry between hands, representation conflicts where the dominant hand monopolizes gradients, and semantic ambiguity in fine-grained actions. We propose Polyphony, a three-stage method to address these challenges through: (1) an Alternating Dual-Hand Vision Transformer that alternates training between left- and right-hand mini-batches to ensure balanced gradient contributions from both hands while sharing a spatio-temporal encoder; (2) Semantic Feature Conditioning that aligns visual features with structured, compositional action descriptions to enhance discrimination of semantically similar actions; and (3) Diffusion-Based Segmentation with cross-hand feature fusion for inter-hand coordination and adaptive loss weighting for balancing performance. Polyphony achieves state-of-the-art on both dual-hand datasets (HA-ViD, ATTACH) with improvements up to 16.8 points, and on the single-stream Breakfast dataset (82.5%), outperforming the prior best method that uses a 12x larger backbone. Notably, our unified model with a single shared backbone surpasses baselines requiring separate per-hand models. Code is at https://github.com/x-labs-xyz/Polyphony-Dual-hand-Action-Segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出Polyphony，一种三阶段方法用于双手动作分割，通过交替训练视觉Transformer、语义特征条件化和扩散分割，在多个数据集上达到最先进性能，且单共享骨干模型超越依赖独立手模型的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 双手动作分割面临复杂的手间依赖、手部视觉不对称、主导手梯度垄断表示冲突以及细粒度动作的语义歧义等独特挑战，现有方法难以有效解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出Polyphony三阶段方法：(1)交替双手机视觉Transformer，在左右手小批次间交替训练以平衡梯度贡献，同时共享时空编码器；(2)语义特征条件化，将视觉特征与结构化组合动作描述对齐以增强语义相似动作的判别力；(3)基于扩散的分割，结合跨手特征融合实现手间协调，并采用自适应损失加权平衡性能。
AI.result: 在双手机数据集HA-ViD和ATTACH上达到最先进水平，提升高达16.8个百分点；在单流Breakfast数据集上达到82.5%，超越使用12倍大骨干网络的先前最佳方法；统一单共享骨干模型超越了需要独立手模型的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Polyphony通过平衡双手梯度贡献、增强语义判别和手间协调，有效解决了双手动作分割的核心挑战，并证明了单共享骨干模型足以超越分离式多模型方法，为双手机精细动作理解提供了高效且高性能的解决方案。

title: NTR: Neural Token Reconstruction for Scene Token Bottleneck in End-to-End Driving
summary: Recent perception-free end-to-end (E2E) autonomous driving methods bypass explicit perception outputs by compressing dense image patch tokens into compact scene tokens for downstream trajectory generation and scoring. While these scene tokens form a compact visual bottleneck for the planner, they receive supervision solely from the planning objective, providing limited constraints on the encoded visual information. To address this limitation, we introduce Neural Token Reconstruction (NTR), a representation learning framework to directly constrain the compact scene-token bottleneck in perception-free driving. NTR introduces a self-distillation masked latent reconstruction objective that reconstructs masked patch-level latent features using only compact scene tokens as reconstruction memory. This forces reconstruction gradients to pass exclusively through the scene-token bottleneck, encouraging scene tokens to preserve richer and less redundant visual representations for planning. We further introduce semantic priors derived from foundation-model annotations as a weak semantic interface biasing reconstruction targets toward driving-related structures without introducing explicit perception heads. All auxiliary reconstruction components are removed at inference time, leaving the deployed planner unchanged. NTR achieves state-of-the-art performance on three public autonomous driving benchmarks, including 8.0461 RFS on Waymo E2E and 94.1 PDMS / 90.9 EPDMS on NavSim1&2. The learned scene tokens exhibit lower pairwise redundancy and higher effective rank, indicating that effective bottleneck supervision improves both compact visual representation learning and planning performance.

AI.tldr: 针对感知无关端到端自动驾驶中紧凑场景令牌仅受规划目标监督导致视觉信息约束不足的问题，提出神经令牌重构（NTR）框架，通过自蒸馏掩码潜变量重构目标直接约束场景令牌瓶颈，在不改变推理架构的前提下实现了SOTA性能，并证明了有效瓶颈监督可提升紧致视觉表征学习与规划能力。
AI.motivation: 现有感知无关端到端自动驾驶方法通过将稠密图像块令牌压缩为紧凑场景令牌进行轨迹生成与评分，但这些场景令牌仅受规划目标监督，对编码的视觉信息约束有限，导致瓶颈表征中视觉信息冗余且不够丰富，限制了规划性能。
AI.method: 提出神经令牌重构（NTR）框架，引入自蒸馏掩码潜变量重构目标：利用紧凑场景令牌作为重构记忆，重建被掩码的块级潜变量特征，迫使重构梯度仅通过场景令牌瓶颈回传，从而鼓励场景令牌保留更丰富且不冗余的视觉表征；进一步引入基于基础模型标注的语义先验作为弱语义接口，使重构目标偏向驾驶相关结构而不引入显式感知头；所有辅助重构模块在推理时移除，部署的规划器保持不变。
AI.result: 在三个公开自动驾驶基准上取得SOTA结果：Waymo E2E上RFS达8.0461，NavSim1&2上PDMS达94.1、EPDMS达90.9；学习到的场景令牌对间冗余度降低、有效秩提高，表明有效瓶颈监督同时提升了紧致视觉表征学习与规划性能。
AI.conclusion: NTR通过直接约束场景令牌瓶颈的自蒸馏重构目标，在不引入推理开销的前提下显著提升了感知无关端到端自动驾驶的规划性能；场景令牌的低冗余与高有效秩验证了瓶颈监督对紧致视觉表征学习的促进作用，为无显式感知的端到端驾驶表示学习提供了有效范式。

title: QVGGT: Post-Training Quantized Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. Project page: https://ddsacu.github.io/QVGGT/
summary: Estimating 3D attributes directly from images has advanced rapidly with the Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT), which predicts camera parameters, depth maps, and point clouds in a single forward pass. However, its 1.2B-parameter scale severely limits deployment on resource-constrained platforms such as UAVs and mobile AR devices. To address this limitation, we introduce QVGGT, a tailored quantization framework designed to compress VGGT. Our approach starts from the observation that transformer blocks within VGGT exhibit heterogeneous sensitivity to quantization. We thus analyze per-block quantization sensitivity and propose a selective mixed-precision strategy that allocates higher precision to the most fragile transformer blocks. To address the amplification of quantization error caused by high-variance camera and register tokens, we further introduce token filtering with camera information compensation, which removes these outliers from activation calibration and restores their geometric cues using a PCA-derived global compensation token. Finally, we develop a task-aware scale search mechanism that evaluates candidate quantization scales not only through layer reconstruction but also through multi-head supervision and cross-head geometric consistency among camera poses, depth maps, and point maps. Extensive experiments on multiple geometry perception benchmarks demonstrate that QVGGT achieves near-lossless W4A16 quantization, preserving the accuracy of all 3D prediction heads while delivering 3$\sim$4.9$\times$ memory reduction and up to 2.8$\times$ real hardware speedup over FP32. Our approach makes high-fidelity 3D perception feasible on edge devices, enabling practical deployment of feed-forward 3D reconstruction models in real-world constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QVGGT，一个针对VGGT视觉几何基础模型的量化压缩框架，通过选择性的混合精度量化、token滤波与相机信息补偿、以及任务感知的尺度搜索，在W4A16量化下实现接近无损的3D几何预测性能，同时带来3~4.9倍内存压缩和最高2.8倍实际推理加速，使大规模前馈3D重建模型可在边缘设备上部署。
