AI.motivation: VGGT模型参数规模高达12亿，虽然能够从前馈单次前向传播中高效预测相机参数、深度图和点云，但如此庞大的参数量严重限制了其在无人机、移动AR设备等资源受限平台上的实际部署与应用。
AI.method: 提出QVGGT量化框架，核心包含三个部分：(1) 基于对VGGT中各transformer模块量化敏感度的逐块分析，设计选择性混合精度策略，为最脆弱的模块分配更高精度；(2) 针对高方差的相机token和register token导致的量化误差放大问题，引入token滤波与相机信息补偿机制，从激活校准中剔除这些异常token并通过PCA提取全局补偿token恢复其几何信息；(3) 开发任务感知的尺度搜索机制，在评估候选量化尺度时不仅考虑层重建误差，还引入多头监督和多头（相机、深度、点图）几何一致性约束。
AI.result: 在多个几何感知基准测试上的大量实验表明，QVGGT在W4A16量化下实现了接近无损的性能，所有3D预测头的精度均得到保持，同时相比FP32实现了3~4.9倍的内存压缩和最高2.8倍的实际硬件加速。
AI.conclusion: QVGGT使得高保真度的3D感知在边缘设备上变得可行，为前馈式3D重建模型在真实世界资源受限环境中的实用化部署铺平了道路，展示了大规模视觉几何模型通过高效量化压缩后仍能保持优异性能的潜力。

title: FOCUS: Forcing In-Context Object Localization through Visual Support Constraints and Policy Optimization
summary: In-context localization (ICL) seeks to localize a target object specified by a small set of support examples in a query image, operating on the fly without training or parameter updates. Despite rapid advances in vision-language models (VLMs), achieving category-agnostic and visually grounded ICL remains an open problem, even though it is essential for applications such as image editing, personalized visual search, and retrieval. Existing methods are fragile and rely on explicit category supervision, which not only limits applicability in realistic settings with unnamed or instance-specific objects but also introduces category bias that steers predictions toward semantic priors rather than visual evidence. We introduce a two-stage training framework that explicitly optimizes in-context attention between support bounding boxes and query images without category supervision. We further refine localization via reinforcement learning using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to directly minimize localization error. This formulation enforces visual correspondence over semantic priors, yielding robust instance-level localization. Empirically, a 7B-parameter model trained with our objectives outperforms models up to 72B parameters, demonstrating that context-aware localization objectives can surpass scaling alone. Comprehensive ablations validate the contribution of each component.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需类别监督的两阶段训练框架，通过优化上下文注意力并结合GRPO强化学习进行定位误差最小化，实现了类别无关、视觉驱动的上下文定位，7B模型在性能上超越了72B参数规模的模型。
AI.motivation: 现有上下文定位方法依赖显式类别监督，这限制了其在无命名或实例级对象场景中的适用性，并引入了类别偏差，使预测偏向语义先验而非视觉证据；实现类别无关且视觉驱动的上下文定位仍是开放问题。
AI.method: 提出两阶段训练框架：第一阶段显式优化支持集边界框与查询图像之间的上下文注意力，无需类别监督；第二阶段利用GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization）强化学习直接最小化定位误差，强制模型依赖视觉对应关系而非语义先验。
AI.result: 7B参数模型在该目标下性能超越了72B参数规模的模型，表明上下文感知的定位目标可以超越单纯扩大模型规模带来的收益；全面的消融实验验证了每个组件的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 上下文感知的定位目标可以超越单纯扩大模型规模带来的收益；通过显式优化视觉对应关系而非语义先验，能够实现鲁棒的实例级定位，为图像编辑、个性化搜索等应用提供了有效方案。

title: SpatialAct: Probing Spatial Reasoning-to-Action Capabilities of VLM Agents in 3D Scenes
summary: Humans can effortlessly perceive spatial layouts, form cognitive representations, reason about spatial relations, and translate such reasoning into actions in everyday 3D environments. Although recent vision-language models (VLMs) have shown promising performance on observation-conditioned spatial perception and reasoning tasks, it remains unclear whether they can build coherent spatial understanding, act upon it, and refine their actions through multi-turn feedback. To study this problem, we introduce \textbf{SpatialAct}, a simulator-grounded benchmark for probing \textit{action-conditioned spatial reasoning} in 3D scenes. Starting from the most challenging setting, Multi-turn Interactive Refinement, we further design its decomposed counterpart, Single-step Error Detection and Fix, together with five fundamental spatial ability tasks to diagnose the underlying causes of model failures. Experiments reveal a clear reasoning-to-action gap: current VLMs can perform well on isolated spatial reasoning tasks, but struggle to maintain coherent spatial beliefs and produce reliable actions during multi-turn feedback, substantially underperforming humans. These results suggest that current VLM agents still lack robust spatial state tracking under action-induced environment changes, even when low-level control is abstracted away.

AI.tldr: 提出SpatialAct基准，用于探测视觉语言模型在3D场景中的动作条件空间推理能力，发现当前VLM存在推理到动作的鸿沟，在多轮交互中无法保持连贯的空间信念并产生可靠动作。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有VLM在基于观测的空间感知与推理任务上表现良好，但能否在3D环境中构建连贯的空间理解、据此执行动作并通过多轮反馈修正动作尚不清楚，该研究旨在填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 引入SpatialAct基准，包含最具挑战性的多轮交互细化（Multi-turn Interactive Refinement）任务及其分解版本单步错误检测与修复（Single-step Error Detection and Fix），并设计五项基础空间能力任务用于诊断模型失败的深层原因。
AI.result: 实验揭示了清晰的推理到动作鸿沟：当前VLM在孤立的空间推理任务上表现良好，但在多轮反馈中难以维持连贯的空间信念并产生可靠动作，其表现显著低于人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM智能体在动作引发的环境变化下缺乏鲁棒的空间状态追踪能力，即使抽象掉了底层控制，这一缺陷仍然存在。

title: Probing Collision Grounding in Vision-Language Models for Safe Human-Robot Collaboration
summary: Safe human--robot collaboration requires more than visual description: a monitor must determine whether the robot body is safely separated, already colliding with the scene or a person, or about to collide. We call this capability collision grounding: binding visual observations to robot body geometry, camera viewpoint, scene layout, human proximity, and temporal motion in order to infer present and imminent contact. We introduce TouchSafeBench, a physics-grounded benchmark for evaluating collision grounding in vision-language models (VLMs). Built in Habitat~3.0, TouchSafeBench contains 2,940 simulated indoor co-presence episodes across social navigation and social rearrangement, with synchronized multi-view RGB-D observations, top-down trajectory maps, calibrated camera metadata, and simulator-derived contact labels. We study two deployment-facing tasks: classifying the current safety state and warning about imminent collision before contact. Across three frontier or robotics-oriented VLMs and nine visual representations, current models remain far from reliable: the best average Macro-F1 stays below 50\%, explicit depth is not automatically transformed into robot-body collision evidence, and robot--scene contact is consistently harder than human-contact risk. TouchSafeBench reveals a central limitation of embodied VLMs: visual fluency does not imply physical accountability. Reliable robot safety monitors will need representations that explicitly bind viewpoint, robot morphology, metric geometry, and future collision. We will release the benchmark upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出碰撞定位（Collision Grounding）概念，并构建 TouchSafeBench 基准，用于评估 VLM 在物理仿真中判断机器人当前及即将发生的碰撞能力；实验表明现有 VLM 在此任务上表现不佳，视觉流畅性不等于物理可问责性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）虽能进行丰富的视觉描述，但缺乏判断机器人是否已发生碰撞或即将碰撞的物理推理能力；安全的机器人协作需要一个能够将视觉观测与机器人几何、视角、场景布局、人体接近度和时空运动进行绑定以推断接触状态的能力——即碰撞定位（Collision Grounding），而目前缺乏针对这一能力的标准评估基准。
AI.method: 作者在 Habitat 3.0 中构建 TouchSafeBench 基准，包含 2,940 个模拟室内共现场景（社交导航和社交重排两类任务），提供多视角 RGB-D 观测、俯视角轨迹图、标定相机元数据和仿真器导出的接触标签；在此基础上定义两个部署任务：当前安全状态分类和即将碰撞预警，并评估前沿及机器人领域 VLM 在九种视觉表征下的表现。
AI.result: 在多个前沿及机器人领域 VLM 上，最优平均 Macro-F1 仍低于 50%；显式深度信息并未被自动转化为机器人身体碰撞证据；机器人与场景物体的碰撞比人机碰撞更难识别；视觉流畅性不等于物理可问责性。
AI.conclusion: 当前 VLM 在物理推理层面上远未达到可靠，可靠的机器人安全监控需要显式绑定视角、机器人形态、度量几何和未来碰撞的表征方式；该基准揭示了具身 VLM 的核心局限，并为构建可信任的人机协作系统提供了关键评估工具。

title: TALON: Token-Aligned Lightweight Adapters for 6-DoF Spacecraft Pose Estimation
comment: 13 pages paper with 3 figures in total
summary: Monocular 6-DoF spacecraft pose estimation methods predominantly process individual frames, discarding the temporal information present in an image sequence acquired during spacecraft manoeuvres. Few temporal approaches require full backbone fine-tuning or auxiliary optical flow networks, risking catastrophic forgetting or increasing computational cost, respectively. We propose TALON (Token-Aligned Lightweight adapters for Orbital Navigation): spatiotemporal 3D adapters injected before the self-attention layers of a frozen ViT vision transformer, combined with a patch-token alignment loss that geometrically grounds the adapted features to keypoint structure through a prototype-conditioned KL-divergence objective. Pre-attention placement allows the frozen attention to reason over temporally enriched tokens, achieving stronger performance with a single adapter per block than post-attention alternatives. The alignment loss shapes the intermediate representations so that each keypoint induces a spatially precise activation in the token field, while the framework adds less than 5% parameters to the frozen backbone. On SPADES dataset, TALON reduces the pose error by 50% over the prior state-of-the-art, and on SwissCube dataset it surpasses the prior best by 21.8% in ADD-0.1d accuracy. Zero-shot cross-domain evaluation from sim-to-real on SPARK real data reduces pose error by 4.7x, and ablations characterise the role of adapter depth across in-domain and cross-domain settings.

AI.tldr: TALON通过在冻结的ViT自注意力层前注入轻量级时空适配器，并结合基于原型条件KL散度的令牌对齐损失，对单目6-DoF航天器姿态估计中的时序信息进行建模；在多个数据集上超越现有最优方法，参数增量不足5%。
AI.motivation: 现有单目6-DoF航天器姿态估计方法大多处理单帧图像，忽略了航天器机动过程中图像序列蕴含的时序信息；少数时序方法需要全骨干网络微调或额外光流网络，前者存在灾难性遗忘风险，后者增加了计算成本。
AI.method: TALON在冻结ViT的每个自注意力层前注入3D时空适配器，使冻结的注意力机制能够对经时序增强的令牌进行推理，同时提出基于原型条件KL散度的补丁-令牌对齐损失，将适配后的特征几何地锚定到关键点结构上，使每个关键点在令牌场中诱导出空间精确的激活；整个框架参数量增量不足5%。
AI.result: 在SPADES数据集上，TALON将姿态误差较先前最优方法降低50%；在SwissCube数据集上，ADD-0.1d准确率超越先前最优方法21.8%；在SPARK真实数据上的模拟到真实零样本跨域评估中，姿态误差降低4.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 预先注意力放置的单适配器策略相比后注意力替代方案性能更强，证明冻结注意力能够有效利用时序增强令牌；对齐损失塑造的中间表示具有空间精确性；消融实验刻画了适配器深度在域内和跨域设置中的作用，表明该框架在低参数代价下实现了显著性能提升和强泛化能力。

title: Latent Geometric Chords for Query-Efficient Decision-Based Adversarial Attacks
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures, 7 tables. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security. The source code is available at https://github.com/eihmuekhine/Latent-Geometric-Chords
summary: While decision-based black-box adversarial attacks present a severe security threat, current methodologies suffer from fundamental limitations. Pixel-wise attacks frequently introduce unnatural, high-frequency visual artifacts, while latent-space frameworks are confined by the limited search space of low-dimensional manifolds and inherent reconstruction flaws. To resolve these limitations, we propose Latent Geometric Chords (LGC) for Query-Efficient Decision-Based Adversarial Attacks alongside a variant, LGC-H. At its core, LGC navigates decision boundaries by executing a curvature-aware geometric search within a compressed semantic manifold. To guarantee high visual fidelity and circumvent dimensionality bottlenecks, we introduce a Residual-based Adversarial Generation (RAG) mechanism. RAG isolates semantic perturbations as geometric chords and superimposes them directly onto the original source image. RAG substantially resolves baseline reconstruction flaws and effectively doubles the permissible search space dimensions. Experimental results demonstrate that LGC achieves robust cross-dataset transferability and substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Notably, our method, LGC, minimizes perturbation magnitudes while achieving state-of-the-art visual fidelity--with a Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) exceeding 0.99 and a Learned Perceptual Image Patch Similarity (LPIPS) below 0.01 at 5000 queries--and sustaining high attack success rates under stringent perceptual constraints, successfully compromising adversarially trained robust models. The source code is available at: https://github.com/eihmuekhine/Latent-Geometric-Chords.

AI.tldr: 提出Latent Geometric Chords (LGC)及其变体LGC-H，通过在压缩语义流形上执行曲率感知的几何搜索并结合残差对抗生成机制，实现了决策式黑盒对抗攻击中高视觉保真度（SSIM>0.99, LPIPS<0.01）与高查询效率的统一。
AI.motivation: 现有决策式黑盒对抗攻击方法存在根本性局限：像素级攻击常引入不自然的、高频视觉伪影，而潜在空间框架则受限于低维流形的狭窄搜索空间和固有的重建缺陷，导致攻击生成的对抗样本视觉质量与搜索效率难以兼顾。
AI.method: 提出Latent Geometric Chords (LGC)方法，核心思想是在压缩语义流形上进行曲率感知的几何搜索以导航决策边界；同时引入Residual-based Adversarial Generation (RAG)机制，将语义扰动提取为几何弦并直接叠加到原始源图像上，从而消除基线重建缺陷并将可搜索空间维度有效加倍。
AI.result: LGC在5000次查询下达到SSIM超过0.99和LPIPS低于0.01的视觉保真度，显著优于现有基线方法；在严格的感知约束下仍保持高攻击成功率，能够成功攻破经过对抗训练的鲁棒模型，并展现出稳健的跨数据集迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过几何弦与残差生成机制的结合，有效解决了决策式攻击中高视觉质量与高搜索效率之间的根本矛盾，为决策式黑盒攻击提供了新的范式，并展示了其在鲁棒模型上的实用威胁性。

title: Beyond Classification: Dynamic Adapter Routing for Continual Multimodal Retrieval
summary: While retrieval is a core function of vision-language models, continually updating these models for retrieval tasks remains critically underexplored. Existing work often approaches continual retrieval through the lens of class-incremental learning (CIL), evaluating both standard CIL methods and retrieval-oriented adaptations in settings that may not fully capture the retrieval-specific dynamics. To address this, we introduce a new, principled evaluation framework for continual multimodal retrieval (CMR) spanning diverse visual domains, and systematically evaluate common approaches within this setting. Our empirical analysis shows that standard CIL methods fail to yield meaningful gains in our more challenging scenario. Therefore, we propose Dynamic Adapter Routing (DAR), a novel approach based on adapters selected through prototype-based routing and combined via model merging.DAR achieves superior performance over the previous baselines and demonstrates strong generalization under out-of-distribution evaluation. Our results highlights the unique challenges of CMR and encourages further research in this direction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态适配器路由（DAR）方法，基于原型路由和模型合并技术，解决了现有连续多模态检索（CMR）评估框架不足以反映检索特有动态的问题，实验表明标准类增量学习方法在该场景下效果有限，而DAR取得了更优性能并展现出较强的分布外泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型的检索功能更新问题尚未得到充分探索，以往工作通常将连续检索视为类增量学习（CIL）问题，但所用的评估设置未能完全捕捉检索特有的人任务动态，缺乏一个能真实反映连续多模态检索（CMR）场景的评估框架。
AI.method: 本文首先提出了一个覆盖多种视觉域的新颖且原则性的连续多模态检索评估框架，并系统评估了常见方法；在此基础上提出动态适配器路由（DAR），该方法基于原型路由（prototype-based routing）选择适配器，并通过模型合并（model merging）组合多个适配器输出，从而实现高效的增量检索。
AI.result: 实验表明标准类增量学习方法在本文提出的更具挑战性的CMR场景中未能带来有意义的增益；而DAR方法在性能上显著优于现有基线，并在分布外（out-of-distribution）评估中展现出强大的泛化能力，凸显了连续多模态检索特有的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本研究的发现揭示了连续多模态检索与类增量学习之间的本质差异，强调需要针对检索特有问题设计专门方法；DAR作为一种轻量级适配器路由与合并策略，为未来CMR方向的研究提供了新的基线和方法参考。

title: Learning from Fine-Grained Visual Discrepancies: Mitigating Multimodal Hallucinations via In-Context Visual Contrastive Optimization
summary: Multimodal hallucination remains a persistent challenge for Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Standard textual Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) often fails to mitigate it due to a lack of explicit visual supervision. While existing works introduce visual preference DPO by contrasting original images against negative ones, they suffer from a theoretically inconsistent objective caused by partition function mismatches and rely on coarse-grained negatives that could enable shortcut learning. In this work, we propose In-Context Visual Contrastive Optimization (IC-VCO). By placing contrastive images within a shared multi-image context, IC-VCO ensures a mathematically rigorous objective. We further introduce Visual Contrast Distillation (VCDist), an auxiliary reliability-gated regularizer that encourages consistency between multi-image contrastive training and single-image inference. Finally, we propose a contrastive sample editing strategy that generates hard negatives via precise semantic perturbations. Experiments on five benchmarks demonstrate IC-VCO's best overall performance and the effectiveness of our sample editing strategy. Code and data are available at https://github.com/OPPO-Mente-Lab/IC-VCO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IC-VCO框架，通过多图像上下文对比优化和视觉对比蒸馏，解决了现有视觉偏好DPO方法中目标函数不一致和负样本粗糙的问题，在五个基准上取得最佳综合性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态幻觉在视觉语言模型中仍然是一个挑战，标准文本DPO因缺乏显式视觉监督而效果不佳；现有视觉偏好DPO方法虽引入对比图像，但存在配分函数不匹配导致的目标不一致性，且依赖粗粒度负样本易引发捷径学习。
AI.method: 提出In-Context Visual Contrastive Optimization (IC-VCO)，通过将对比图像置于共享多图像上下文中实现数学上严格的目标函数；引入Visual Contrast Distillation (VCDist)作为辅助可靠性门控正则化器，促进多图像对比训练与单图像推理之间的一致性；提出对比样本编辑策略，通过精确语义扰动生成硬负样本。
AI.result: 在五个多模态幻觉基准上，IC-VCO取得最佳综合性能，对比样本编辑策略的有效性也得到实验验证。代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: IC-VCO通过理论上一致的多图像对比优化和硬负样本生成策略，有效缓解了VLM的多模态幻觉问题，为视觉偏好优化提供了更可靠的技术路径。

title: DriveMA: Driving Vision-Language-Action Models with verifiable Meta-Actions
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2605.21273
summary: Driving Vision-Language-Action Models (Driving VLAs) aim to use language to improve end-to-end planning, but the language-action gap limits this promise. We propose DriveMA, a Driving VLA framework built on verifiable meta-actions, which summarize future ego motion into compact language-domain intentions and can be constructed from expert trajectories with a trajectory-grounded annotation pipeline and can be verified against generated trajectories through rule-based projection. DriveMA exploits this verifiability with action-centric supervised training and a data-efficient turn-level credit assignment reinforcement learning framework, explicitly aligning high-level decisions with low-level trajectory planning through dense rewards and precise credit assignment. DriveMA sets a new state of the art on the Waymo Open Dataset Vision-based E2E Driving, achieving a Rater Feedback Score of 8.060 with a 2B model and further improving it to 8.079 with a 4B model; it also obtains competitive closed-loop planning performance on NAVSIM. These results show that even a simple meta-action interface can achieve state-of-the-art planning when made verifiable and optimized for language-action alignment. Code, data, and models will be released to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: DriveMA提出基于可验证元动作的驾驶视觉-语言-动作模型框架，通过轨迹锚定标注流程构建可验证的语言级意图，并利用动作中心监督训练和回合级信用分配强化学习显式对齐高层决策与低层轨迹规划，在Waymo基准上以2B和4B模型分别取得8.060和8.079的Rater Feedback Score，达到新最优水平。
AI.motivation: 现有Driving VLA模型因语言与动作之间存在语义鸿沟，语言指令难以直接转化为精确的低层轨迹规划，导致语言模态对端到端规划的提升效果受限。
AI.method: DriveMA框架通过轨迹锚定标注管道从专家轨迹中提取可验证的元动作（verifiable meta-actions），将未来自车运动总结为紧凑的语言域意图；采用动作中心监督训练和基于规则投影的验证机制，并设计基于回合级信用分配的强化学习框架，通过密集奖励实现高层决策与低层轨迹规划的显式对齐。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Dataset基于视觉的端到端驾驶任务上，2B模型取得8.060的Rater Feedback Score，4B模型进一步提升至8.079，均达到新最优；同时在NAVSIM闭环规划基准上取得有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 即使使用简单的元动作接口，只要保证其可验证性并针对语言-动作对齐进行优化，就能实现最先进的驾驶规划性能，表明语言与动作间的有效对齐是Driving VLA成功的关键。

title: Vision-Language Models Suppress Female Representations Under Ambiguous Input
summary: Alignment teaches vision-language models (VLMs) to avoid expressing demographic biases, and when gender is clearly visible they largely succeed. Far less is known about ambiguous inputs (a worker in full gear, a figure seen from behind) cases common in practice yet rarely studied. We find that minimal prompting pressure exposes occupation-gender defaults when prompting ambiguous input images, with models collapsing to male even for strongly female-stereotyped occupations. But do these outputs reflect what models actually encode internally? We introduce LALS (Latent Association Leaning Score), a zero-shot metric that projects visual-token activations into the model's text-embedding space to measure concept associations per token and layer. Across 15 occupations, over 800 gender-ambiguous images, and four VLMs, internal representations and outputs are systematically decoupled: models often encode a female association internally yet output male. Layer-wise analysis reveals an asymmetric filter -- male signal amplifies end-to-end while female signal peaks mid-network and is suppressed before generation -- and a color ablation shows that culturally loaded visual cues such as clothing color further modulate these internal associations.

AI.tldr: 本文发现视觉语言模型在性别模糊图像中会系统性输出男性默认结果，即使内部表征已编码女性关联；为此提出LALS零样本度量方法，揭示了内部表征与输出之间的解耦现象及不对称性别滤波机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注视觉语言模型在性别清晰可见时的对齐偏差，但对实践中常见的性别模糊输入（如全副武装的工人、背对镜头的人物）却研究不足，模型在这些模糊场景下是否存在隐性的职业-性别默认偏差尚不清楚，且模型内部表征是否与其输出一致也缺乏有效度量方法。
AI.method: 本文提出LALS（Latent Association Leaning Score），一种零样本度量方法，通过将视觉token激活投影到模型的文本嵌入空间中，逐token逐层地度量概念关联；实验涵盖15种职业、800余张性别模糊图像和四种视觉语言模型，并引入颜色消融实验分析文化视觉线索（如服装颜色）的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现模型内部表征与输出存在系统性解耦：即使内部编码了女性关联，模型仍倾向于输出男性结果；层分析揭示了一种非对称滤波，男性信号从底层到顶层持续增强，而女性信号在中间层达到峰值后在生成前被抑制；颜色消融实验表明服装颜色等文化负载视觉线索会进一步调节内部关联。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明仅依赖输出层面衡量模型偏差是不够的，内部表征与输出之间的解耦揭示了偏差产生的新机制；LALS为零样本探测模型内部概念关联提供了有效工具，为理解和缓解视觉语言模型中的隐含社会偏见提供了新的视角和度量手段。

title: Authentication of Copy Detection Patterns via Cross-Camera Dual-Synthetic Referencing
comment: To appear in Proc. ICIP2026, September 13-17, 2026, Tampere, Finland
summary: Copy Detection Patterns (CDPs) are structures printed on physical objects to enable cost-effective authentication. Verification is achieved by comparing a captured image with the digital template from which the CDP was printed. In practice, printer stochasticity and camera distortions hinder this comparison, limiting robustness against counterfeiting. Prior work addressed camera effects by synthesising reference images in the verification camera domain, but it ignored printing variability. We introduce an enrolment-based cross-camera dual-synthetic referencing framework. Each printed CDP is first captured by a controlled enrolment camera, and a deep-learning-based translator jointly exploits the digital template and the enrolled capture to generate a high-quality reference for the verification image. We provide an information-theoretic justification showing that the dual reference is more informative than template-based references. Experiments on heterogeneous mobile cameras demonstrate improved authentication performance, robustness to machine-learning-based copy attacks, and reliable verification from small CDP regions and on low-end devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注册的跨相机双合成参考框架，用于提升复印检测图案（CDP）的验证鲁棒性。该框架通过深度翻译器联合利用数字模板和注册相机捕获的图像，生成高质量参考图像，有效抑制了打印随机性和相机畸变带来的干扰，在异构移动相机上取得了更优的防伪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CDP验证方法通过合成参考图像将数字模板映射到验证相机域以抑制相机畸变，但忽略了打印过程引入的随机性，导致验证鲁棒性受限，难以有效抵御伪造攻击。
AI.method: 提出一种基于注册的跨相机双合成参考框架：首先使用可控注册相机捕获每个打印CDP的参考图像，随后利用深度学习的图像翻译器，同时利用数字模板和注册捕获图像联合生成高质量的参考图像，用于与验证图像进行比对。
AI.result: 在异构移动相机上的实验表明，所提方法在提升防伪验证性能、增强对基于机器学习的复制攻击的鲁棒性方面显著优于现有方法，并能在仅使用小区域CDP以及低端设备上实现可靠的验证。
AI.conclusion: 从信息论角度证明了双参考比仅基于模板的参考含有更多信息，为引入注册步骤提供了理论依据；该框架有效弥合了打印噪声与相机畸变之间的差距，为低成本高安全性的物理物体防伪提供了可行方案。

title: YARD: Y-Architecture Register Decoding for Efficient Hallucination Mitigation in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Contrastive decoding (CD) seeks to mitigate hallucinations in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) by contrasting the output distributions of a standard model and a visually degraded model. However, existing training-free CD methods suffer from sub-optimal degraded branches: completely dropping visual tokens is too extreme and induces language hallucinations, while corrupting input images offers coarse control over visual evidence and suffers from high inference latency due to requiring two full forward passes. To address these dilemmas, we propose YARD, a training-free Y-Architecture Register Decoding framework. Motivated by the observation that reliable text-to-vision grounding predominantly emerges in the middle decoder layers, YARD constructs the degraded branch internally by sharing shallow-layer computations and branching exactly at this critical stage. For the degraded branch, YARD replaces patch-level visual tokens with register tokens, which preserve global image semantics but lack fine-grained local evidence. This image-aware yet locally under-grounded design provides a faithful contrastive signal without extreme modality mismatch, while the Y-architecture strictly avoids a costly second forward pass. Extensive experiments on generative and discriminative hallucination benchmarks demonstrate that YARD consistently achieves state-of-the-art hallucination mitigation across multiple LVLMs, alongside a significant reduction in inference latency.

AI.tldr: YARD提出了一种基于Y型架构的寄存器解码框架，通过在中层共享浅层计算后分支，并用寄存器令牌替代局部视觉令牌来构建退化分支，在不需两次前向传播的情况下实现了高效的对比解码，显著缓解了LVLM的幻觉问题并降低了推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有训练自由的对比解码方法在构建退化分支时存在两难：完全丢弃视觉令牌过于极端，易引发语言幻觉；而破坏输入图像虽可控制视觉证据但粗粒度且需两次完整前向传播，推理延迟高。YARD旨在设计一种既提供可靠对比信号又避免高计算开销的训练自由解码框架。
AI.method: YARD基于一个关键观察——可靠的文本到视觉定位主要出现在中间解码器层，因此提出Y型架构：共享浅层计算，在关键阶段进行分支。退化分支使用寄存器令牌替换局部视觉令牌，保留全局图像语义但缺乏细粒度局部证据，从而提供图像感知但局部欠扎根的对比信号，同时Y型架构避免第二次完整前向传播。
AI.result: 在生成式与判别式幻觉基准上的大量实验表明，YARD在多个LVLM上一致实现了最先进的幻觉缓解效果，同时显著降低了推理延迟。
AI.conclusion: YARD通过巧妙的架构设计，在对比解码中兼顾了对比信号的质量与计算效率，为训练自由的幻觉缓解提供了一种高效且有效的解决方案，揭示了在解码过程中利用中层表示特性进行分支的潜力。

title: How can embedding models bind concepts?
summary: Humans easily determine which color belongs to which shape in multi-object scenes, an ability known as concept binding. Vision-language embedding models such as CLIP struggle with binding: they recognize individual concepts but fail to represent which concepts form which objects. Although CLIP behaves like a bag-of-concepts model in cross-modal retrieval, object information is recoverable from its image and text embeddings separately. We study this tension through the binding function, which maps concepts to scene embeddings. We find that scene embeddings decompose additively into object representations, explaining why uni-modal probes can recover object information. However, CLIP's binding function is high-complexity, which likely prevents the image and text encoders from learning a shared binding mechanism that generalizes to unseen concept combinations. We then ask whether this limitation is fundamental. We show that it is not. In controlled transformer models trained from scratch, binding generalization emerges with sufficient data coverage. These models learn low-complexity binding functions characterized by multiplicative interactions between concepts, enabling systematic generalization. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/oshapio/binding-concepts-complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了CLIP在多对象场景中概念绑定的局限性源于其高复杂度的绑定函数，并证明通过足够的数据覆盖，基于Transformer的模型可以学习具有乘法交互的低复杂度绑定函数，从而实现绑定泛化。
AI.motivation: 人类能够自然地将颜色与形状等概念绑定到具体对象上，而CLIP等视觉-语言嵌入模型虽然在单概念识别上表现良好，但无法正确表示哪些概念组合构成哪些对象，即存在概念绑定失败的问题。本文旨在探究CLIP在绑定任务中失败的深层原因，并验证这种局限性是否本质不可克服。
AI.method: 本文通过绑定函数（binding function）的形式化框架来研究场景嵌入如何从概念组合中生成。作者分析了CLIP中图像和文本嵌入的可加性分解特性，并进一步在受控的Transformer模型上从零开始训练，通过调整数据覆盖范围来研究低复杂度绑定函数（以乘法交互为特征）的学习条件。
AI.result: 实验发现，CLIP的场景嵌入可以加性分解为对象表示，这解释了为何单模态探针能够恢复对象信息；但CLIP的绑定函数复杂度高，导致图像与文本编码器无法学习共享的绑定机制，从而无法泛化到未见过的概念组合。而在受控Transformer中，当训练数据具有足够的覆盖范围时，模型能够学会低复杂度的绑定函数，其特征是概念之间的乘法交互，从而实现了系统性的绑定泛化。
AI.conclusion: CLIP在概念绑定上的局限性并非固有缺陷，而是由其高复杂度绑定函数所致。通过充足的数据覆盖，Transformer模型可以学习具有乘法交互的低复杂度绑定函数，实现绑定泛化。这表明改进视觉-语言模型的绑定能力是可行的，关键在于设计能够学习低复杂度、可组合表示的训练机制。

title: Personalize Your Large Vision-language Models With In-context Prompt Tuning
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have demonstrated strong general multimodal capability and are increasingly deployed in downstream systems. This trend has driven growing interest in LVLM personalization, which aims to enable models to quickly and effectively learn out-of-distribution multimodal concepts to meet user-specific needs. However, many existing methods rely on inference-time training, which reduces efficiency. They also struggle to maintain accuracy in complex multi-image, multi-concept settings. These limitations restrict the broader deployment of LVLM-based systems. Therefore, this paper proposes in-context prompt tuning (ICPT). Specifically, ICPT employs a lightweight projection module capable of operating in complex scenarios to extract fine-grained visual semantics from multiple reference images, seamlessly transforming these features alongside identity-label mappings into continuous prompts. To maximize computational efficiency, this module adaptively determines the prompt length based on the intrinsic visual complexity of each concept. Crucially, to overcome the environmental biases and cross-concept interference prevalent in real-world applications, we introduce two novel geometric regularizations. These constraints refine prompt representations by decoupling key identities from transient environmental states and separating concepts to avoid semantic confusion. Extensive experiments show that ICPT achieves state-of-the-art personalization accuracy across diverse tasks and LVLM backbones.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为上下文提示调优（ICPT）的方法，通过轻量级投影模块和几何正则化技术，在无需推理时训练的情况下实现LVLM的高效个性化，在多图像多概念场景下达到最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有LVLM个性化方法严重依赖推理时训练，导致效率低下，且在复杂的多图像多概念场景下难以保持准确的个性化性能，这些限制阻碍了LVLM在真实下游系统中的广泛部署。
AI.method: 提出上下文提示调优（ICPT），核心包括：一个轻量级投影模块，可从中提取细粒度视觉语义并将其与身份标签映射转换为连续提示；该模块根据每个概念的视觉复杂度自适应确定提示长度以最大化计算效率；以及两种几何正则化约束，通过解耦核心身份与瞬态环境状态并分离不同概念来克服环境偏差和跨概念干扰。
AI.result: 在多种任务和LVLM主干网络上进行的广泛实验表明，ICPT在个性化准确率上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: ICPT通过消除推理时训练需求并引入几何正则化，有效解决了LVLM个性化中的效率与准确性问题，为LVLM在复杂多概念场景下的实际部署提供了可行的技术路径。

title: SVI-Bench: A Dynamic Microworld for Strategic Video Intelligence
summary: True video intelligence demands more than recognizing what is visible: it requires reasoning about why events unfold, predicting what would change under different conditions, and deciding what to do next. We refer to this progression, from perception through causal reasoning and simulation to strategic planning, as Strategic Video Intelligence (SVI). No existing benchmark evaluates this capability stack: in-the-wild videos lack verifiable ground truth for causal and strategic questions, while synthetic environments sacrifice the complexity of real multi-agent systems. To bridge this gap, we introduce SVI-Bench, a large-scale benchmark that leverages team sports as a dynamic microworld, combining the complexity of real-world multi-agent interaction (10-22 agents making coordinated decisions under adversarial pressure) with the verifiability of explicit rules and definitive outcomes. SVI-Bench comprises approximately 35K hours of broadcast video, 15M annotated actions, 15K hours of expert commentary, 23K game reports, and 103K structured statistical records across basketball, soccer, and hockey, all constructed via a data engine that transforms raw game data into a dense, cross-referenced corpus. We organize evaluation into 9 tasks spanning a progressive four-pillar hierarchy: Dynamic Scene Understanding, Causal Reasoning, Strategic Simulation, and Agentic Synthesis. Evaluating strong multimodal and agentic baselines, we find a capability cliff: models perform competently on perceptual tasks, achieving approximately 73% on fine-grained action QA, but degrade sharply at each successive cognitive level. Agentic tasks prove hardest: the strongest model achieves only 5% accuracy when required to autonomously gather and integrate evidence across a corpus of 1.8M clips.

AI.tldr: 提出SVI-Bench基准，通过团队体育作为动态多智能体微世界，系统评估视频理解从感知到因果推理、战略模拟和智能体合成的渐进能力栈，发现现有模型在高级认知任务上存在显著能力断层。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解基准缺乏对因果推理、战略规划和智能体决策等高级认知能力的系统评估：野外视频无法提供因果和战略问题的可验证真值，而合成环境牺牲了真实多智能体系统的复杂性。因此需要一个兼具真实复杂性和结果可验证性的基准来评估从感知到战略决策的完整能力栈。
AI.method: 构建SVI-Bench基准，利用团队体育（篮球、足球、冰球）作为动态微世界，包含约35K小时广播视频、15M标注动作、15K小时专家解说、23K比赛报告和103K结构化统计记录，通过数据引擎将原始比赛数据转化为密集交叉引用的语料库。评估体系组织为9个任务，涵盖动态场景理解、因果推理、战略模拟和智能体合成四个渐进层级。
AI.result: 强多模态和智能体基线模型在感知任务上表现尚可（细粒度动作QA约73%准确率），但随认知层级逐步提升性能急剧下降。最困难的智能体合成任务中，最强模型在需要自主收集和整合180万片段语料库证据时仅达5%准确率，清晰地揭示了从感知到高级认知的能力悬崖。
AI.conclusion: 当前视频理解模型在从感知到因果推理、战略模拟到智能体合成的认知进阶中存在严重能力断层，高层认知任务尤其需要自主证据收集与整合能力，这为未来视频智能研究指明了关键挑战方向。

title: SMART: SMPLest-X Mesh Adaptation and RAFT Tracking for Soccer Pose Estimation
comment: CVPR 2026 SoccerNet FIFA Skeleton Tracking Light Challenge, Rank 6
summary: We present our approach to the FIFA Skeletal Tracking Challenge 2026, which requires estimating 3D world-space poses of soccer players from broadcast video. Our method finetunes SMPLest-X (ViT-H, 687 M parameters) via a stratified clip split, multi-task depth supervision, and broadcast augmentation, paired with a RAFT dense optical flow camera tracker, foot-plane anchoring, and two-pass temporal smoothing. Against the FIFA baseline score of 1.053 on the validation set, SMART achieves 0.647, a 38.6% improvement; on the held-out test set, SMART scores 0.593 (Global MPJPE: 0.324 m, Local MPJPE: 0.054 m).

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMART方法，通过微调SMPLest-X (ViT-H, 687M参数)并联合分层片段拆分、多任务深度监督、广播数据增强、RAFT稠密光流相机追踪、足部平面锚定和两遍时序平滑，在FIFA骨骼追踪挑战2026中实现验证集0.647（较基线提升38.6%）和测试集0.593的成绩。
AI.motivation: 从广播视频中精确估计足球运动员的3D世界空间姿态是一项极具挑战性的任务，现有方法在复杂运动、遮挡和快速相机运动场景下性能不足，FIFA官方基线分数仅为1.053，亟需更鲁棒且高精度的解决方案。
AI.method: SMART方法以SMPLest-X（ViT-H架构，687M参数）为基础模型，采用分层片段拆分策略处理长视频序列，引入多任务深度监督以增强3D几何感知能力，并设计广播数据增强模拟实际比赛中的视觉变化；相机追踪部分使用RAFT稠密光流估计相机运动，结合足部平面锚定约束地面接触点，最后通过两遍时序平滑进一步降低抖动和噪声。
AI.result: 在验证集上，SMART取得0.647分，较FIFA官方基线1.053提升38.6%；在未公开的测试集上，SMART取得0.593分，其中全局MPJPE为0.324米，局部MPJPE为0.054米，展现出优秀的3D姿态估计精度。
AI.conclusion: SMART证明了结合大规模基础模型微调、多任务学习、光流相机追踪和几何约束可以有效解决广播视频中多人3D姿态估计的难题，为体育分析场景下的高精度骨骼追踪提供了可行的技术路径和显著的性能提升。

title: EGOSTREAM: A Diagnostic Benchmark for Streaming Episodic Memory in Egocentric Vision
summary: Continuous episodic memory is a core capability for autonomous agents operating in dynamic, real-world environments, yet current streaming video benchmarks provide limited tools for diagnosing what models remember and for how long. We introduce \egostream, a diagnostic benchmark for streaming episodic memory evaluation in egocentric vision. \egostream organizes 2,250 curated questions along seven cognitive dimensions: detail, spatial, temporal, event, social, causal, and prospective memory. We introduce the Answer Validity Window (AVW), which specifies the temporal span an answer remains valid as the observed scene evolves. This allows us to expand the questions into 8,528 recall-conditioned evaluations, enabling controlled testing from instant to ultra-long-term recall while separating genuine model forgetting from natural world-state changes. We rigorously establish baseline performance through a unified streaming MLLM framework that compares several state-of-the-art memory-management mechanisms, covering sliding windows, attention sinks, KV-cache pruning, merging, and offloading. Experiments within a unified Qwen3-VL backbone reveal that comparable aggregate accuracies mask starkly different memory profiles. For instance, token pruning preserves fine-grained details and temporal structure significantly better than token merging, while quantized offloading rescues ultra-long-term recall. Ultimately, all mechanisms operate well below real-time (>1s per frame), and top performing methods ceil at about 45\% accuracy, exposing critical gaps in current architectures. \egostream provides the diagnostic testbed needed to close these gaps.

AI.tldr: 提出了EgoStream基准，用于诊断第一人称视频流中的持续情景记忆，通过七维认知问题和答案有效窗口(AVW)机制，系统评估了多种流式MLLM记忆管理机制，揭示了当前架构在细粒度记忆保持和实时推理方面的关键缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有流式视频基准在评估自主智能体在动态真实环境中的持续情景记忆能力方面缺乏诊断性工具，无法区分模型对信息的真实遗忘与因场景自然演变导致的答案变化，因此需要一个能够系统评测模型记忆不同认知维度（如细节、空间、时间、事件、社会、因果和前瞻记忆）以及不同回忆时距的标准化测试平台。
AI.method: 构建了EgoStream基准，包含2,250个经过精心策划的问题，覆盖七个认知记忆维度；引入答案有效窗口(AVW)概念，将问题扩展为8,528个召回条件评估，从即时到超长期召回进行受控测试；并建立统一的流式多模态大语言模型框架，集成滑动窗口、注意力汇、KV缓存剪枝、合并、卸载和量化卸载等多种记忆管理机制，基于Qwen3-VL骨干网络进行系统对比。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-VL骨干网络上进行的实验表明，不同记忆管理机制在聚合准确率相近时暴露出截然不同的记忆特征：token剪枝在保持细粒度细节和时间结构上显著优于token合并，量化卸载可改善超长期召回表现；但所有机制均无法达到实时处理速度（每帧>1秒），表现最佳的方法准确率仅约45%，揭示了当前架构在持续情景记忆上的关键缺陷。
AI.conclusion: EgoStream提供了一个诊断性测试床，揭示了现有流式多模态大语言模型在持续情景记忆方面的根本性不足——包括记忆保持精度与实时处理能力的双重瓶颈，为未来设计更具记忆能力的自主智能体架构指明了改进方向。

title: nuReasoning: A Reasoning-Centric Dataset and Benchmark for Long-Tail Autonomous Driving
summary: Reasoning is essential for autonomous driving (AD) in long-tail scenarios, where vehicles must apply commonsense knowledge, understand spatial relations, infer agent interactions, and make safe decisions. However, existing AD datasets and benchmarks mainly target perception, prediction, or planning, and provide limited supervision for reasoning over realistic long-tail driving scenes. We introduce nuReasoning, a large-scale real-world dataset and benchmark for reasoning-centric AD. Following the lineage of nuScenes and nuPlan, nuReasoning advances real-world AD datasets and benchmarks toward reasoning in long-tail driving scenarios. The dataset contains 20,000 clips, each 20 seconds long, collected across multiple cities, with synchronized multi-camera images, LiDAR data, HD maps, object annotations, and human-verified reasoning annotations spanning Spatial Reasoning, Decision Reasoning, and Counterfactual Reasoning. Unlike prior datasets that focus primarily on visual question answering, nuReasoning supports both reasoning evaluation and planning evaluation, enabling a direct study of how reasoning supervision affects driving performance. Experiments show that fine-tuning VLMs on nuReasoning substantially improves driving-specific question answering, while incorporating reasoning supervision into VLA training improves planning performance even when textual reasoning outputs are disabled at inference time. These results establish nuReasoning as a foundation for evaluating and improving robust, interpretable, reasoning-driven AD systems in realistic long-tail settings.

AI.tldr: nuReasoning是一个大规模真实世界数据集与基准，专注于长尾驾驶场景中的推理任务，包含2万个20秒长的片段，覆盖空间推理、决策推理和反事实推理三类人工验证的推理标注，实验表明在该数据集上微调VLM可显著提升驾驶问答性能，且将推理监督融入VLA训练可改善规划能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集和基准主要针对感知、预测或规划任务，对长尾驾驶场景中的推理能力（如常识推理、空间关系理解、智能体交互推断和安全决策）提供的监督有限，缺乏专门用于评估和改进自动驾驶推理能力的大规模真实世界数据集。
AI.method: 论文构建了nuReasoning数据集，包含20,000个20秒长的驾驶片段，覆盖多个城市，提供多视角相机图像、LiDAR数据、高清地图、物体标注和三类人工验证的推理标注（空间推理、决策推理、反事实推理）。该数据集不仅支持推理评估，还支持规划评估，可直接研究推理监督对驾驶性能的影响。
AI.result: 在nuReasoning上微调视觉语言模型（VLM）显著提升了驾驶场景专用问答任务的性能；将推理监督融入视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型训练后，即使在推理时禁用文本推理输出，规划性能仍获得改善。
AI.conclusion: nuReasoning为在真实长尾场景中评估和改进鲁棒、可解释、推理驱动的自动驾驶系统奠定了基准，证明了推理监督对提升驾驶规划能力的有效性，为自动驾驶推理研究提供了标准化的评估平台。

title: Recognizing Co-Speech Gestures in-the-Wild
summary: While humans naturally gesture during speech, only a sparse subset of these movements are visually depictive and semantically linked to specific spoken words. Current multimodal models struggle to capture these semantic co-speech gestures, heavily bottlenecked by a lack of precisely annotated training data. To address this, we introduce the Gesture Recognition in the Wild (GRW) dataset, the first large-scale benchmark designed to map unconstrained human gestures to specific words with frame-accurate temporal boundaries. Comprising 156,688 manually annotated video clips, GRW spans a highly diverse 150-word taxonomy of physical actions, spatial descriptors, and abstract concepts. We leverage GRW to train video models to (a) classify gestures as semantic or not, (b) recognize the word corresponding to a co-speech gesture, and (c) temporally localize the gesture. We also use GRW to establish benchmarks for these three tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GRW数据集，这是首个大规模、细粒度标注的野外共语手势识别基准，包含156,688个视频片段和150类词汇，并基于该数据集训练视频模型完成语义手势分类、对应词汇识别及时间定位三项任务，填补了语义共语手势训练数据匮乏的空白。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态模型难以捕捉与特定口语词汇语义关联的共语手势，其根本瓶颈在于缺乏精确标注的训练数据，尤其是缺乏兼具语义标签和帧级时间边界的野外场景手势数据集。
AI.method: 本文构建了Gesture Recognition in the Wild（GRW）数据集，包含156,688个手动标注的视频片段，覆盖涵盖物理动作、空间描述符和抽象概念的150类词汇。基于GRW，作者训练视频模型以完成三项任务：(a) 判断手势是否为语义性手势，(b) 识别共语手势对应的词汇，(c) 对手势进行时间定位。
AI.result: GRW是首个大规模、帧级精确标注的野外语义共语手势基准，覆盖150类多样化词汇，并基于该数据集为上述三项任务建立了标准评测基准。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过提供大规模精确标注的GRW数据集，有效解决了语义共语手势识别中训练数据匮乏的核心瓶颈，为多模态模型理解人类非语言交流提供了关键数据支撑和基准任务，推动了对语音-手势联合建模的研究。

title: CoFiDA-M: Concept-Aware Feature Modulation for Cross-Domain Adaptation with Image-Only Inference
summary: Models for AI-based skin cancer screening suffer a severe performance drop when shifting from expert dermoscopic (source) images to consumer-grade clinical (target) images, hindering real-world deployment. Existing domain adaptation methods often ignore crucial semantic invariants, such as clinical concepts. While new foundation models like MONET can provide this semantic information as dense, probabilistic scores, this metadata is unavailable at test time, creating a deployment paradox for practical image-only screening tools. We address this gap by proposing CoFiDA-M, a privileged information framework that learns from concepts at training time but deploys as an image-only model. Our method trains a teacher network that uses MONET concept probabilities to guide a FiLM modulator, transforming visual features into a semantically ``edited" feature space. A lightweight, image-only student is then trained to reproduce this edited representation, not just the teacher's final predictions. This distillation ``bakes" the clinical reasoning into the student's weights. On a challenging multi-dataset benchmark, our image-only student significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, especially in melanoma recall. Our work provides a practical and generalizable framework for leveraging noisy, probabilistic metadata as privileged information, demonstrating strong cross-dataset robustness and potential for real-world deployment beyond dermatology. Implementation code is available at: https://github.com/mmu-dermatology-research/CoFiDA.git

AI.tldr: CoFiDA-M提出一种特权信息框架，在训练时利用MONET基础模型提供的密集概率化临床概念分数作为语义指导，通过教师-学生蒸馏架构将临床推理编码至学生模型权重中，最终实现仅依赖原始图像的部署，显著提升了皮肤癌筛查从皮肤镜图像到临床图像的跨域泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 基于AI的皮肤癌筛查模型在从专业皮肤镜图像迁移到消费级临床图像时性能严重下降，现有的域自适应方法忽略了临床概念等关键语义不变信息，而MONET等基础模型虽能提供密集概率化的语义元数据，但这类信息在测试时不可用，导致实际部署中无法仅依赖纯图像筛查工具。
AI.method: CoFiDA-M采用特权信息学习框架，训练阶段用一个教师网络接收MONET提供的临床概念概率分数，通过FiLM调制器将视觉特征转化为语义"编辑"后的特征空间；随后一个轻量级纯图像学生网络被训练去复现这一编辑后的表示（而非仅匹配教师的最终预测），通过知识蒸馏将临床推理"烘焙"到学生权重中，实现测试时仅需原始图像。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的多数据集基准测试上，纯图像学生网络显著优于现有最先进方法，尤其在黑色素瘤召回率指标上表现突出；该方法展现出强大的跨数据集鲁棒性，证明了利用带噪概率化元数据作为特权信息的有效性和可泛化性。
AI.conclusion: CoFiDA-M提供了一种实用且可泛化的框架，能够将不可用于测试阶段的概率化语义元数据作为特权信息有效利用，不仅解决了皮肤癌筛查中跨域部署的实际难题，也为其他需要利用语义先验知识的医学影像分析任务提供了通用解决方案。

title: KLIP: localized distribution shift detection via KL-divergence with diffusion priors in Inverse Problems
summary: Diffusion models have shown promising performance as data-driven priors for computational imaging, as well as some capacity to detect out-of-distribution (OOD) images. However, existing approaches to OOD detection often require some knowledge of the shifted distribution, fail to detect subtle or localized distribution shifts, and operate on full images, rather than the indirect measurements available in inverse problems. We propose an OOD detection metric based on the Kullback-Leibler divergence between the diffusion prior and the posterior distribution, that (i) does not require any calibration data or knowledge of the shifted distribution, and (ii) can detect whole images as OOD as well as localize OOD patches within an image. Experimentally, we show that this metric can detect subtle yet semantically meaningful distribution shifts, such as the shift from healthy liver CT scans to those with tumors, and generalizes across different types of diffusion models, datasets, and inverse problems. Our code can be found at https://github.com/voilalab/KLIP.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于扩散先验与后验分布之间KL散度的OOD检测度量，无需校准数据或对偏移分布的先验知识，即可在逆问题中检测全图或局部分布偏移。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的OOD检测方法大多需要偏移分布的部分知识，难以检测细微或局部的分布偏移，且仅能处理完整图像而无法适用于逆问题中的间接测量数据。
AI.method: 提出基于扩散先验与后验分布之间KL散度的OOD检测度量KLIP，无需校准数据或偏移分布知识；该度量既能检测整张图像的分布偏移，也能定位图像中的OOD局部区域。
AI.result: 实验表明该度量能检测细微且语义上有意义的分布偏移（如健康肝脏CT与含肿瘤肝脏CT之间的偏移），并在多种扩散模型、数据集和逆问题场景中表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提KL散度度量是一种通用且有效的OOD检测方法，适用于逆问题场景，具备无需先验知识、可检测局部偏移等优势，为扩散模型在检测任务中的应用提供了新思路。

title: SOCO: Benchmarking Semantic Object Correspondence in Vision Foundation Models
summary: Measuring structured object understanding in vision foundation models remains challenging due to inconsistent evaluation protocols and limited part-level supervision. Semantic correspondence (SC) evaluates this capability by testing whether object parts can be matched across instances and categories under large variations in appearance, viewpoint, and geometry. To enable a systematic SC evaluation, we introduce SOCO, a new benchmark for Semantic Object Correspondence that introduces a taxonomy of correspondence types and provides consistent, functionally meaningful keypoint annotations across 100 categories and over 1M correspondence pairs. In addition, SOCO includes keypoint language descriptions, enabling the evaluation of large vision-language models (LVLMs) and their fine-grained part-level understanding. Comprehensive experiments reveal that (i) vision foundation backbones encode strong semantic structure but transfer correspondences poorly across related categories and only partially capture object-part position, (ii) LVLMs are stronger at text-prompted part localization than at visual-reference cross-image matching, exposing a gap between language-grounded localization and fine-grained visual correspondence, and (iii) correspondence performance predicts performance on dense downstream tasks, including segmentation, tracking, 3D pose estimation, and 3D detection, more strongly than ImageNet classification. Together, these findings position SOCO as a benchmark for structured, part-level representation quality in vision and multimodal foundation models.

AI.tldr: SOCO是一个新的语义对应基准，包含100个类别、超过100万对标注和关键点语言描述，系统评估视觉基础模型的结构化物体理解能力；实验表明视觉主干编码了强语义结构但跨类别对应迁移差，LVLMs在文本定位上优于跨图像匹配，且对应性能比ImageNet分类更能预测下游密集任务表现。
AI.motivation: 视觉基础模型中结构化物体理解的衡量因评估协议不一致和部分级监督有限而面临挑战，现有基准缺乏系统性的对应类型分类和功能上有意义的关键点标注，也未能支持大视觉语言模型在细粒度部分级理解上的评估。
AI.method: 提出SOCO基准，引入对应类型分类体系，在100个类别上提供超过100万对功能一致的关键点标注，并包含关键点语言描述以支持LVLMs评估；通过系统实验评估视觉基础模型主干、LVLMs在文本提示定位与视觉参考跨图像匹配上的表现，并分析对应性能与下游密集任务的相关性。
AI.result: 视觉基础模型主干编码了强语义结构但在相关类别间对应迁移能力差且仅部分捕获物体部件位置；LVLMs在文本提示的部件定位上强于视觉参考的跨图像匹配，揭示了语言定位与细粒度视觉对应之间的差距；对应性能比ImageNet分类更能预测分割、跟踪、3D姿态估计和3D检测等下游密集任务的表现。
AI.conclusion: SOCO作为评估视觉和多模态基础模型中结构化、部件级表示质量的基准，揭示了当前模型在跨类别语义对应和语言-视觉对齐上的关键局限，对应性能可作为下游密集任务表现的有效先验指标。

title: Linear Scaling Video VLMs for Long Video Understanding
summary: Video vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used in long-horizon and streaming settings, yet most video encoders still rely on spatiotemporal self-attention, causing compute and latency to grow quadratically with the number of frames. Existing efficiency methods improve scalability but often lose accuracy relative to full self-attention, for example through aggressive frame/token dropping or coarse attention approximations. We introduce StateKV, an inference-time method that adapts pretrained long-video VLMs to linear-time video prefill by carrying cross-frame context in a fixed-capacity, importance-based recurrent state, paired with a second full per-frame cache used for decoding. Across three long-video benchmarks and seven models spanning three families and multiple scales, StateKV remains close to full self-attention and consistently outperforms dominant sliding-window / recency-based streaming approximations, without fine-tuning or architectural changes. StateKV also reduces video-prefill cost measured FLOPs, enabling stronger accuracy at a fixed compute budget by running larger models. These results suggest a practical step toward scalable long-video understanding.

AI.tldr: StateKV 是一种即插即用的推理时方法，通过固定容量的基于重要性的循环状态在帧间传递跨帧上下文，将长视频 VLM 的视频预填充复杂度从二次降至线性，无需微调即可在多个基准上接近全自注意力性能并优于滑动窗口方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频 VLM 的视频编码器依赖时空自注意力，其计算量和延迟随帧数呈二次增长，而现有效率方法（如激进帧/令牌丢弃或粗粒度注意力近似）虽提升可扩展性但常以牺牲精度为代价，导致长视频与流式场景下高效与高精度难以兼得。
AI.method: StateKV 提出一种结合固定容量、基于重要性的循环状态（用于在帧间传递跨帧上下文）与第二个完整的逐帧缓存（用于解码）的双缓存推理方法，在无需微调或改动架构的前提下将长视频 VLM 的视频预填充阶段复杂度降至线性。
AI.result: 在三个长视频基准测试中，StateKV 在七个模型（覆盖三个模型家族和多种规模）上保持接近全自注意力的精度，并持续优于主流的滑动窗口/基于近因的流式近似方法；同时，StateKV 降低了视频预填充的 FLOPs 成本，使得在固定计算预算下可通过运行更大模型获得更强的精度。
AI.conclusion: StateKV 提供了一种实用且可扩展的长视频理解方案，表明无需微调或架构修改即可实现线性时间视频预填充并保持高精度，为未来大规模长视频 VLM 的部署提供了有效方向。
